e5d871cb.title: Engineering IP Program Manager, Principal
e5d871cb.description:
**About Marvell**
 Marvell’s semiconductor solutions are the essential building blocks of the data infrastructure that connects our world. Across enterprise, cloud and AI, and carrier architectures, our innovative technology is enabling new possibilities.
   

  

 At Marvell, you can affect the arc of individual lives, lift the trajectory of entire industries, and fuel the transformative potential of tomorrow. For those looking to make their mark on purposeful and enduring innovation, above and beyond fleeting trends, Marvell is a place to thrive, learn, and lead.
   

  

**Your Team, Your Impact**
 IP program Manager will be part of Central Engineering’s program management team responsible for the IP development and delivery for Marvell’s products and custom silicon businesses, giving the opportunity to contribute to the successes of numerous Marvell programs
   

  

**What You Can Expect**
 The successful candidate will understand the SoC IP needs and develop plans to deliver IP Program Management from conception through to program Mass Production Release (MPR). The successful candidate will have both depth and breadth in the related IP engineering that involve cross functional organizations, in the forms of analog, logic, design for test, layout, timing, validation, PnR, etc. Good understanding of technologies and IP development process and methodology are required. Excellent interpersonal skills and communication skills are a must.
   

  

* Overall responsibility for program management of IP development and delivery to Marvell product business units with a focus on the dependencies, deliverables, and status in partnership with the other program managers.
* Define and communicate the dependencies and deliverables from the local skill groups, and manage these in partnership with the broader Central Engineering Program Management team.
* Drive closure of IP specs \& requirements
* Demonstrated strong cross\-functional leadership to chair weekly cross functional meetings assessing status, milestones, and completeness of plans with regular program updates to Marvell Executive stakeholders
* Support Marvell’s Program Management Processes
* Matrixed leadership of engineering managers distributed across the engineering organization
* Execute lessons learned, risk management, and enforce agreed to processes
* Responsibility for the successful outcome of IP development \& delivery


**What We're Looking For**
* BS in Electrical Engineering with MSEE preferred
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering or related fields and 10\-15 years of related professional experience, OR Master’s degree and/or PhD in Computer Science, Electrical Engineering, or related fields with 5 \-10 years of experience.
* 6\+ years of experience as an Engineering Project Manager in the Semiconductor industry preferred
* 6\+ years of experience as a mixed signal IP designer
* Preferred experience as a mixed signal design manager.
* Knowledge of SoC/IC design flow for advanced process technologies and process flows and methodologies in Silicon Development
* Excellent verbal and written communication and presentation skills
* Demonstrated ability to partner with technical managers to drive projects to completion
* Demonstrated effective partnerships and relationships with key stakeholders
* Excellent leadership and communication skills
* Must have a broad background in ASIC or other Microelectronics semiconductor product development


**Additional Compensation And Benefit Elements**
 With competitive compensation and great benefits, you will enjoy our workstyle within an environment of shared collaboration, transparency, and inclusivity. We’re dedicated to giving our people the tools and resources they need to succeed in doing work that matters, and to grow and develop with us. For additional information on what it’s like to work at Marvell, visit our Careers page.
   

  

 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status.
   

  

**Interview Integrity**
 To support fair and authentic hiring practices, candidates are not permitted to use AI tools (such as transcription apps, real\-time answer generators like ChatGPT or Copilot, or automated note\-taking bots) during interviews.
   

  

 These tools must not be used to record, assist with, or enhance responses in any way. Our interviews are designed to evaluate your individual experience, thought process, and communication skills in real time. Use of AI tools without prior instruction from the interviewer will result in disqualification from the hiring process.
   

  

**This position may require access to technology and/or software subject to U.S. export control laws and regulations, including the Export Administration Regulations (EAR). As such, applicants must be eligible to access export\-controlled information as defined under applicable law. Marvell may be required to obtain export licensing approval from the U.S. Department of Commerce and/or the U.S. Department of State. Except for U.S. citizens, lawful permanent residents, or protected individuals as defined by 8 U.S.C. 1324b(a)(3\), all applicants may be subject to an export license review process prior to employment.**

f95b0b70.title: Architect
f95b0b70.description:
* **Architecture**
* **Permanent Contract**
* **Mid\-Senior Level**
* **Gurugram**

  
**About Us**

  

Egis is a leading global architectural, consulting, construction engineering, operations and mobility services firm. We create and operate intelligent infrastructure and buildings that both respond to the climate emergency and contribute to balanced, sustainable and resilient development. Our 20,500 employees operate across over 100 countries, deploying their expertise to develop and deliver cutting\-edge innovations and solutions for clients. Through the wide range of our activities, we are central to the collective organisation of society and the living environment of citizens all over the world

 **About the Role**

  

* Prepare architectural concepts, schematic designs, detailed drawings, and construction documentation.
* Develop airport terminal layouts, passenger facilities, support buildings, landside and airside infrastructure.
* Coordinate with Structural, MEP, Civil, Landscape, Interior, and BIM teams.
* Ensure compliance with NBC, local building by\-laws, airport authority regulations, fire safety norms, accessibility standards, and sustainability requirements.
* Participate in design reviews, value engineering, and technical presentations.
* Review consultant and contractor drawings for quality and compliance.
* Coordinate with clients, stakeholders, regulatory authorities, and multidisciplinary teams.
* Prepare design reports, specifications, BOQs, and tender documents.
* Resolve architectural issues during construction and provide site support.
* Monitor design schedules and ensure timely delivery of project milestones.
* Ensure adherence to project quality standards and design intent.

 **What do we need from you**

  

Bachelor's Degree in Architecture (B.Arch).

* 10–15 years of relevant experience.
* Experience in Airport, Aviation, Terminal Buildings, Metro Stations, Commercial Buildings, Institutional Buildings, or Large Infrastructure Projects.
* Experience with international airport projects is preferred.
* PMC or Engineering Consultancy experience will be an advantage.

 **What's in it for you?**

  

Working knowledge on

* AutoCAD
* Revit (BIM)

a6646b84.title: Engineer Solutions Engineering
a6646b84.description:
**Accelerate your career at RXO.**
 RXO is a leading provider of transportation solutions. With cutting\-edge technology at the center, we're revolutionizing the industry with our massive network and commitment to finding solutions for every challenge.
   

  

 As an Engineer in Solutions Engineering at RXO, you will apply your analytical and engineering skills to support the design and delivery of supply chain network optimization studies. You will use rigorous data collection and analysis to identify opportunities, develop insights, and support the creation of marketable, data\-driven solutions that improve customer supply chain operations. RXO will provide you with industry\-leading tools and resources to help you grow your skills and advance your career.
   

  

**What Your Day\-to\-day Will Look Like**
* Support supply chain network and transportation optimization studies through research, data collection, and analysis.
* Perform data mining, validation, and scenario analysis to identify cost, service, and efficiency improvement opportunities within a customer’s supply chain.
* Assist in building and running models using Coupa Supply Chain Guru or similar network optimization and decision\-support tools.
* Analyze transportation, distribution, and inventory data to support recommendations and solution design.
* Develop dashboards, reports, and analytical outputs using Power BI, Excel, Access, SQL, or similar tools.
* Support the preparation of customer\-ready materials, including presentations, summaries, and visualizations.
* Collaborate with senior engineers and cross\-functional teams to refine assumptions, validate results, and iterate analyses based on feedback.
* Contribute to the development and documentation of standard operating procedures and best practices.


 What you’ll need to excel
   

  

**At a Minimum, You’ll Need**
* Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain, Logistics, Industrial Engineering, Manufacturing Engineering, or another technical and/or analytical field.
* 1 year of experience in one or more key functional areas, including supply chain management, logistics, transportation management, distribution, procurement, or decision support systems/technology.
* Strong analytical skills, including experience with data analysis and data mining using Microsoft Excel, Power BI, and/or Microsoft Access.
* Ability to structure, analyze, and interpret data to identify and scope opportunities within a customer’s supply chain.


**It’d Be Great If You Also Have**
* Exposure to supply chain network optimization, transportation modeling, or scenario analysis.
* Experience with Coupa Supply Chain Guru, Optilogic Cosmic Frog, or similar modeling tools (academic, internship, or professional).
* Experience collecting and preparing data for modeling, network optimization, or transportation redesign purposes.
* Experience developing dashboards or analytical reports using Power BI or similar visualization tools.
* Strong communication skills with experience preparing presentations or analytical summaries.
* Lean or continuous improvement exposure (Lean, Six Sigma, or similar).


**Does this sound like you? Check out what else RXO has to offer.**
**Why Join Us**
**Our Culture**
 Our values are the key to our unique culture and our ability to deliver for everyone we serve.
   

  

 We do great things when we are inclusive and work together. To perform with excellence, we learn from one another, value diverse perspectives, operate safely and build strong relationships.
   

  

**The Next Step**
 Ready to join our team? We'd love to hear from you. Fill out an application now and join our talent community to learn about future opportunities. We are proud to be an Equal Opportunity/Affirmative Action employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability, or status as a protected veteran. All applicants who receive a conditional offer of employment may be required to take and pass a pre\-employment drug test. The above statements are not an exhaustive list of all required responsibilities, duties, and skills for this job classification.

ac3f0834.title: Solution Architect – Platform & Applied AI
ac3f0834.description:
**Immediate Joiners Preferred (within 10 \- 15 days) \| 7\+ Years Experience \| CTC: ₹50 LPA\+ (based on experience)** 




 Cogniflix Artificial Intelligence Pvt Ltd (Mindflix AI) is building the next generation of AI\-powered personalisation and engagement systems across voice, conversational interfaces, and real\-time intelligence. Our platform combines Generative AI, deep learning, and scalable backend infrastructure to enable human\-like interactions at production scale.
 



 We are a focused engineering team working on problems at the intersection of distributed systems, real\-time communication, and applied AI. The work is technically demanding and the stakes are real — our systems handle live conversations, time\-critical data pipelines, and multi\-tenant workloads in production.
 



 Mindflix AI is based in Bangalore and is being built with a global outlook, including a Singapore company structure to support international expansion, enterprise partnerships, and future growth.
 



**ROLE:** 




 We are hiring a
 **Solution Architect – Platform \& Applied AI** 
 for a dual\-mandate role: to own end\-to\-end technical architecture across Mindflix AI’s core product platform — multi\-tenant, cloud\-native, LLM\-orchestrated systems — and to lead technical solutioning in client and partner conversations, while owning the translation of business requirements into buildable architecture, implementation plans, and engineering decisions that the team can execute against.
 



 You will work directly with engineering leadership and the founding team, setting the architectural standards the engineering team builds to, while ensuring that platform, product, and client\-specific requirements are translated into systems that are buildable, secure, scalable, and maintainable.
 



 This is a
 **hands\-on architecture role** 
 , not a slide\-deck role. We are looking for someone with strong backend / platform engineering roots who has grown into architectural ownership. You are expected to go deep on design, challenge weak assumptions, review code\-level decisions, and remain accountable for what ultimately ships into production.
 



 This is an immediate\-joiner\-preferred role. We are looking for someone who can start within 15 days of offer.
 



  





 Key ResponsibilitiesPlatform \& Systems Architecture
 


* Own end\-to\-end architecture for Mindflix AI’s core platforms — multi\-tenant, cloud\-native systems handling real\-time, high\-throughput workloads
* Design and govern orchestration layers for long\-running, stateful workflows underpinning agentic AI products
* Define and enforce architectural guardrails for LLM\-integrated systems, including validation, grounding, safety, fallback, and deterministic controls around probabilistic outputs
* Architect service boundaries, data models, integration patterns, and deployment topology for scalable SaaS systems
* Define standards for Infrastructure\-as\-Code, CI/CD, observability, and security gates across services



  





  





 AI / Agentic Systems
 


* Design agent orchestration architectures covering tool and function calling, memory, decomposition, and evaluation frameworks
* Define LLM adapter and scheduling layers across vendors, including routing, queueing, fallback, and cost controls
* Architect RAG pipelines, retrieval patterns, grounding strategies, and context composition for production conversational systems
* Partner with engineering on evaluation harnesses, regression test sets, and quality scoring for agentic workflows



  





  





 Solutioning \& Client Architecture
 


* Lead technical solutioning in client and partner conversations, while owning the translation of business requirements into buildable architecture, implementation plans, and engineering decisions that the team can execute against
* Produce ADRs, HLDs, solution notes, and technical proposals that leadership, engineering, and clients can act on
* Assess third\-party integrations — CRM, payment gateways, messaging/BSP platforms, identity/document\-verification services — for technical fit, risk, and effort
* Support pre\-sales, SOW, and estimation discussions with technically credible scoping and realistic risk\-adjusted effort inputs



  





  





 Engineering Leadership \& Governance
 


* Set and enforce engineering standards, design\-review processes, and architectural quality bars
* Review technical proposals and architectural decisions across internal teams and external delivery contributors
* Own technical risk assessment for new initiatives — flagging unproven claims, integration risks, dependency risks, and compliance exposure before they hit production
* Write and maintain architecture documentation, runbooks, and technical onboarding material for a fast\-moving engineering team



  





  





 What We Are Looking ForMust Have
 


* 7\+ years of software/platform engineering experience, with strong backend or platform engineering foundations
* At least 2–3 years of real architectural ownership across distributed systems, multi\-service platforms, or client\-facing solution design
* Demonstrated ownership of at least one production\-grade, distributed or multi\-tenant system from architecture through deployment
* Strong hands\-on background in cloud\-native architecture — AWS or GCP, containerised workloads, managed databases, messaging, queueing, and observability
* Experience architecting AI\-integrated systems in production, including safety, reliability, evaluation, and operational trade\-offs
* Strong fundamentals in distributed systems, service design, observability, and production failure modes
* Ability to convert ambiguous business or client requirements into technically sound, scoped designs with realistic effort and risk estimates
* Excellent technical communication — able to write ADRs/HLDs, explain trade\-offs clearly, and align engineers, leadership, and clients around the same architecture direction
* Ability to join within 15 \- 20 days of offer



  





  





 Good to Have
 


* Experience with durable workflow engines such as Temporal, Cadence, or equivalent
* Experience with agent orchestration frameworks such as LangGraph, LangChain, CrewAI, or Agno
* Exposure to compliance\-heavy domains such as data privacy, fintech, healthtech, or edtech
* Prior client\-facing or pre\-sales technical solutioning experience
* Experience with messaging/BSP platforms, payment gateways, CRM systems, or identity/document\-verification integrations
* Prior experience in an early\-stage startup environment



  





  





 The Engineering Values We Hire For
 


* **Strong fundamentals** 
 — you understand why systems behave the way they do
* **Ownership mindset** 
 — you build, review, monitor, and improve
* **Architectural accountability** 
 — you stand behind your designs when production reality tests them
* **Pragmatic problem\-solving** 
 — you choose the right solution for the actual constraints
* **Comfort with ambiguity** 
 — you bring structure where none exists yet
* **Production\-first thinking** 
 — you think in failure modes, observability, and long\-term maintainability
* **Clear communication** 
 — you document decisions, surface blockers early, and do not let things go dark



  





  





 Technology Environment
 


* **Cloud \& Infra:** 
 GCP (GKE, Cloud SQL, Pub/Sub, Secret Manager) · AWS (EC2, Lambda, RDS) · Pulumi / Terraform
* **Orchestration:** 
 Temporal · Event\-driven architectures · Multi\-tenant SaaS patterns
* **AI / ML:** 
 LLMs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Vertex AI, Gemini) · RAG · Agent orchestration · Evaluation frameworks
* **Data:** 
 PostgreSQL · Vector search (PgVector / Pinecone) · Redis
* **Integrations:** 
 WhatsApp Business API (Gupshup) · Payment gateways · CRM (LeadSquared or equivalent) · Identity/document verification (DigiLocker or equivalent)
* **Delivery:** 
 CI/CD · SAST / SCA / secrets / DAST gates · GitHub · Code review culture



  





  





 What We Offer
 


* Competitive compensation commensurate with experience (
 **CTC ₹50 LPA\+, Esop options** 
 )
* Direct access to the founding team — your architecture decisions carry visible weight
* Ownership across both the core AI platform and client\-facing solutioning
* Technically demanding work in distributed systems, real\-time infrastructure, and applied AI
* A small, high\-ownership team where engineering quality and architectural rigor matter
* Hardware of your choice and tooling budget



  





  





 How to Apply
 



 Send the following with subject line:
 **Solution Architect – Direct – \[Your Name]** 



* Your resume and LinkedIn profile
* A brief note describing one system you architected — the problem, the design, the trade\-offs, and what you would change today
* Links to public work such as architecture write\-ups, GitHub, or technical writing, if available
* Confirmation that you can join within 15 \- 20 days of offer



  





  





 Compensation
 



**INR 40 LPA\+** 
 based on experience and fit
 



  





  





 Location
 



**Whitefield, Bangalore – On\-site** 




  





  





 Contact
 



 If you are interested, please send your CV to
 **abhinav@mindflix.ai** 
 \|
 **careers@mindflix.ai**

428753e6.title: Solution Architech
428753e6.description:
**Company Description**
**MSX Company short Overview :**
 For Over 25 Years, We Have Proudly Partnered With Top Automotive OEMs And Mobility Companies Worldwide, Offering Unwavering Support In Their Pursuit Of Transforming Their Retail Strategies And Managing Operations Across Key Areas Such As
   

  

* Dealer Performance Improvement
* Repair Optimization
* Consumer Engagement


**Job Description**
 Key Responsibilities:
   

  

 Lead end\-to\-end architecture and solution design for SAP SuccessFactors modules (e.g., EC, ECP, RCM, ONB, LMS).
   

  

 Define and govern the integration strategy using APIs, OData, SOAP, REST, and middleware tools like SAP CPI.
   

  

 Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to ensure successful delivery of integrations with internal and external systems (e.g., Payroll, IAM, Financials, Data Hubs).
   

  

 Define and implement architectural standards and best practices for system performance, security, and scalability.
   

  

 Oversee and validate integration architecture, data flows, mapping documents, and error\-handling processes. Ensure compliance with enterprise and regulatory policies including GDPR, ISO 27001, SOC 2, and internal GRC requirements.
   

  

 Drive solution assurance through design reviews, risk assessments, and impact analysis.
   

  

 Contribute to project planning, estimation, and documentation of technical artifacts and governance deliverables.
   

  

 Serve as an advisor on SAP SuccessFactors roadmap, release impacts, and platform enhancements.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 Required Skills and Experience: 10\+ years of overall IT experience with at least 5 years as a Solution Architect. 6\+ years of hands\-on experience with SAP SuccessFactors (including EC, ECP, or RCM/ONB modules).
   

  

 Proven expertise in API\-based integrations (OData, REST, SOAP), and middleware tools such as SAP Cloud Platform Integration (CPI).
   

  

 Solid understanding of IAM systems, SSO, and secure API gateway concepts (e.g., Azure AD, Entra, Ping).
   

  

 Experience leading GRC assessments, including data privacy impact assessments, SoD reviews, and audit readiness.
   

  

 Familiarity with integration with legacy HR systems, payroll engines, and cloud/on\-prem ecosystems.
   

  

 Strong stakeholder engagement and ability to bridge business and technical requirements.
   

  

 Excellent documentation, presentation, and communication skills.
   

  

 Experience with Jira \& Databricks is desirable.
   

  

 Additional Information
   

  

 MSX International has been a trusted partner to leading automotive OEMs and mobility companies worldwide, providing strategic support to transform retail operations. With a strong foundation built on Dealer Performance Improvement, Repair Optimization, and Consumer Engagement, we empower businesses by integrating people, processes, and technology to drive measurable success. As the mobility industry undergoes rapid transformation, MSX International stands as a catalyst for innovation, equipping clients with cutting\-edge tools and deep industry expertise to navigate evolving market dynamics. MSX International remains the go\-to partner for leading automotive OEMs, offering innovative, research\-driven strategies to elevate retail operations and accelerate business growth.

341cea7d.title: Vice President, Solution Architect_Pipeline Requisition
341cea7d.description:
**Job Description**
**This is a Pipeline req, created in anticipation of potential future needs in BNY**
 At BNY, our culture allows us to run our company better and enables employees’ growth and success. As a leading global financial services company at the heart of the global financial system, we influence nearly 20% of the world’s investible assets. Every day, our teams harness cutting\-edge AI and breakthrough technologies to collaborate with clients, driving transformative solutions that redefine industries and uplift communities worldwide.
   

  

 Recognized as a top destination for innovators, BNY is where bold ideas meet advanced technology and exceptional talent. Together, we power the future of finance – and this is what is all about. Join us and be part of something extraordinary.
   

  

 We’re seeking a future team member for the role of Solutions Architect to join our Architecture Hub team. This role is in Pune
   

  

 In this role, you’ll make an impact in the following ways:
   

  

* Develop well\-designed, testable, efficient code for both frontend and backend systems using primarily Java and Angular tech stack.
* Integrate software components into fully functional systems while applying security and privacy principles.
* Drive adoption of best practices around engineering metrics and AI enablement of developer productivity.
* Mentor and evangelize AI/ML best practices across the organization
* Researches and implements architecture designs and patterns to improve the company's advantage in the market place
* Strategizes and contributes to enterprise level technological initiatives on architecture and design
* Defines solution architecture for domain\-specific initiatives
* Leads research, definition and implementation of architecture governance and design disciplines for business solutions
* Defines and promotes common architecture designs, methodology, standards and practices across the enterprise
* Strives to drive more value out of the company's data asset
* Provides enterprise data architecture planning, design and deployment in business solutions
* Contributes to the achievement of multiple teams' objectives


 To be successful in this role, we’re seeking the following:
   

  

* Bachelor's degree in computer science or a related discipline, or equivalent work experience required
* Advanced degree preferred
* 12\+ years of experience in software development, technology and architecture roles required
* Experience in the securities or financial services industry is a plus
* Ability to manage and forecast operating budget within the approved plan
* Strong interpersonal skills to support mentoring and teamwork.
* Ability to ensure high quality delivery of the company's architecture and design services


 At BNY, our culture speaks for itself. Here’s a few of our awards:
   

  

* America’s Most Innovative Companies, Fortune, 2024
* World’s Most Admired Companies, Fortune 2024
* Human Rights Campaign Foundation, Corporate Equality Index, 100% score, 2023\-2024
* Best Places to Work for Disability Inclusion, Disability: IN – 100% score, 2023\-2024
* “Most Just Companies”, Just Capital and CNBC, 2024
* Dow Jones Sustainability Indices, Top performing company for Sustainability, 2024
* Bloomberg’s Gender Equality Index (GEI), 2023


 Our Benefits and Rewards: BNY offers highly competitive compensation, benefits, and wellbeing programs rooted in a strong culture of excellence and our pay\-for\-performance philosophy. We provide access to flexible global resources and tools for your life’s journey. Focus on your health, foster your personal resilience, and reach your financial goals as a valued member of our team, along with generous paid leaves, including paid volunteer time, that can support you and your family through moments that matter.
   

  

 BNY is an Equal Employment Opportunity/Affirmative Action Employer \- Underrepresented racial and ethnic groups/Females/Individuals with Disabilities/Protected Veterans.
   

  

**This is a Pipeline req, created in anticipation of potential future needs in BNY**

ebd8594b.title: Associate Distinguished Engineer (Enterprise Architecture, Cloud Architecture, GenrativeAI, E-Commerce Domain)
ebd8594b.description:
**Company Description**
**👋🏼We're Nagarro** 
**.**
 We are a Digital Product Engineering company that is scaling in a big way! We build products, services, and experiences that inspire, excite, and delight. We work at a scale — across all devices and digital mediums, and our people exist everywhere in the world (18000\+ experts across 36 countries, to be exact). Our work culture is dynamic and non\-hierarchical. We are looking for great new colleagues. That is where you come in!
   

  

**Requirements**
 Job Description
   

  

* 15–19 years of overall experience in software development and technology architecture.
* Proven experience as an Enterprise Architect, Technology Architect, or Solution Architect with a strong focus on cloud architecture and generative AI.
* Deep expertise in designing and architecting large\-scale enterprise applications and eCommerce platforms.
* Strong hands\-on experience with Microsoft .NET Framework, .NET Core / .NET 6\+, ASP.NET MVC, Web API, and C\#.
* Extensive knowledge of microservices architecture, event\-driven architecture, API\-first design, and service\-oriented architecture (SOA).
* Demonstrated experience with cloud platforms, preferably Microsoft Azure; AWS experience is a plus.
* Proficiency in SQL Server, NoSQL databases, caching technologies, and messaging platforms.
* Solid understanding of DevOps practices, CI/CD pipelines, infrastructure as code, and containerization (e.g., Docker, Kubernetes).
* Experience integrating third\-party systems, payment gateways, ERP, CRM, and other enterprise applications.
* Strong knowledge of enterprise architecture frameworks, modernization strategies, and legacy system transformation.
* Ability to evaluate, select, and validate technology stacks, frameworks, and architectural patterns aligned with business goals.
* Proven track record of leading architecture reviews, technical assessments, and proof\-of\-concepts (POCs).
* Excellent stakeholder management skills with the ability to translate business requirements into robust technical solutions.
* Strong technical leadership and mentoring capabilities to guide development teams through the entire software development lifecycle.
* Experience in effort estimation, solution sizing, risk assessment, and technology roadmap planning.
* Familiarity with architecture governance, security best practices, compliance requirements, and coding standards.
* Preferred qualifications include experience in retail and eCommerce domains, legacy application modernization programs, and cloud migration initiatives.
* Architecture certifications such as Microsoft Certified: Azure Solutions Architect Expert, TOGAF, or AWS Solutions Architect are highly desirable.


**Responsibilities**
* Define and drive the overall solution architecture for enterprise applications, eCommerce platforms, and legacy systems.
* Evaluate, identify, validate, and recommend appropriate technologies, frameworks, and architectural patterns aligned with business objectives.
* Challenge existing technical approaches and provide alternative solutions to improve scalability, maintainability, security, and performance.
* Design end\-to\-end application architectures, integration strategies, and modernization roadmaps.
* Lead architecture reviews, technical assessments, and proof\-of\-concepts (POCs).
* Collaborate with business stakeholders, product teams, engineering teams, and leadership to translate business requirements into technical solutions.
* Define application, integration, security, cloud, and data architecture standards.
* Drive modernization of legacy applications to modern cloud\-native and microservices\-based architectures.
* Ensure adherence to architecture governance, coding standards, security best practices, and compliance requirements.
* Provide technical leadership and mentorship to development teams throughout the software development lifecycle.
* Participate in effort estimation, solution sizing, risk assessment, and technology roadmap planning.
* Support pre\-sales activities, solution proposals, and customer presentations when required.


**Qualifications**
 Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Information Technology, or a related field.

2df7226b.title: Senior Cloud Engineer
2df7226b.description:
****This role is eligible for our hybrid work model: Two days in\-office.****
 Our Technology team is the backbone of our company: constantly creating, testing, learning, and iterating to better meet the needs of our customers. If you thrive in a fast\-paced, ideas\-led environment, you’re in the right place.
   

  

**Why This Job’s a Big Deal**
 The Priceline Cloud Development Team is responsible for running the company’s current cloud infrastructure. It works closely with members from product, engineering, support, and infrastructure teams to satisfy system needs in line with the group’s technical vision and strategies.
   

  

**In This Role You Will Get To**
* Lead engagement with engineering and infrastructure to deliver robust, high\-traffic cloud services from inception to full operation.
* Support an agile team to integrate/implement the infrastructure for a 12\-factor, containerized/microservice platform.
* Lead in the development of cloud\-focused tooling to allow technology teams to apply cloud services.
* Collaborate with Security and Architecture teams to ensure alignment with enterprise architecture standards and governance processes.
* Interact in a collaborative and professional manner, with all levels of employees, vendors, and/or clients, in a team environment.
* Organize tasks and resources to complete work and meet deadlines.


**Who You Are**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science (or equivalent experience).
* Five or more years of dynamically more complex related experience.
* In\-depth knowledge and experience with running distributed systems in public cloud environments such as GCP, AWS, and Azure.
* In\-depth knowledge of container orchestration platforms and technologies such as Kubernetes and Istio.
* In\-depth knowledge of declarative infrastructure\-as\-code systems such as Terraform.
* Knowledge of configuration management systems such as Chef, Puppet, and Ansible.
* Experience in programming languages such as Python, Go, Bash.
* Comfortable with Linux command line. Familiar with Linux system administration, networking, and load balancing concepts
* Experience in CICD automation using tools \- GitHub and GitHub Actions.
* Illustrated history of living the values necessary to Priceline: Customer, Innovation, Team, Accountability, and Trust.
* The Right Results, the Right Way is not just a motto at Priceline; it’s a way of life. Unquestionable integrity and ethics are essential.


**Who We Are**
**WE ARE PRICELINE.**
 Our success as one of the biggest players in online travel is all thanks to our incredible, dedicated team of talented employees. Priceliners are focused on being the best travel deal makers in the world, motivated by our passion to help everyone experience the moments that matter most in their lives. Whether it’s a dream vacation, your cousin’s graduation, or your best friend’s wedding \- we make travel affordable and accessible to our customers.
   

  

 Our culture is unique and inspiring (that’s what our employees tell us). We’re a grown\-up, startup. We deliver the excitement of a new venture, without the struggles and chaos that can come with a business that hasn’t stabilized.
   

  

 We’re on the cutting edge of innovative technologies. We keep the customer at the center of all that we do. Our ability to meet their needs relies on the strength of a workforce as diverse as the customers we serve. We bring together employees from all walks of life and we are proud to provide the kind of inclusive environment that stimulates innovation, creativity and collaboration.
   

  

 Priceline is part of the Booking Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: BKNG) family of companies, a highly profitable global online travel company with a market capitalization of over $80 billion. Our sister companies include Booking.com, BookingGo, Agoda, Kayak and OpenTable.
   

  

 If you want to be part of something truly special, check us out!
   

  

**Flexible work at Priceline**
 Priceline is following a hybrid working model, which includes two days onsite as determined by you and your manager (ideally selecting among Tuesday, Wednesday, or Thursday). On the remaining days, you can choose to be remote or in the office.
   

  

**Perks \& Benefits At Priceline**
 Our benefits are designed to support your health, wellbeing, and life inside and outside of work. Eligible Priceliners have access to:
   

  

**Health \& wellness coverage** 
 including medical, dental, vision, and mental health resources
   

  

**Generous time off** 
 including PTO, holidays, a company\-wide Priceline Pause reset week, and paid volunteer days
   

  

**Work/life support** 
 including the ability to work up to 4 weeks per year from anywhere, parental leave, dependent care and family support resources, Summer Fridays, and office perks like stocked kitchens and catered meals (varies by location)
   

  

**Financial security programs** 
 such as retirement plans with company contributions, life and disability coverage, and tax\-advantaged accounts
   

  

**Signature travel perks** 
 including employee\-only discounts on hotels and flights, VIP deals, and Big Deal Bucks credits
   

  

**Additional perks \& discounts** 
 like travel and partner discounts, tuition support, legal support, and pet benefits
   

  

**A people\-first culture** 
 with Employee Resource Groups (ERGs), social events, recognition programs, and service awards that help you connect, grow, and celebrate together
   

  

*Specific benefits and programs vary by location.*
**Inclusion is a Big Deal!**
 To be the best travel dealmakers in the world, we believe our team should reflect the broad range of customers and communities we serve. We are committed to cultivating a culture where all employees have the freedom to bring their individual perspectives, life experiences, and passion to work.
   

  

 Priceline is a proud equal opportunity employer. We embrace and celebrate the unique lenses through which our employees see the world. We’d love for you to join us and help shape what makes our team extraordinary.
   

  

**Applying for this position**
 We're excited that you are interested in a career with us. For all
 **current employees** 
 , please use the internal portal to find jobs and apply.
   

  

 External candidates are required to have an account before applying. When you click Apply, returning candidates can log in, or new candidates can quickly create an account to save/view applications.

32af0ca2.title: Solutions Architect - Lead
32af0ca2.description:
Ingram Micro is a leading technology company for the global information technology ecosystem.
   

  

 With the ability to reach nearly 90% of the global population, we play a vital role in the worldwide IT sales channel, bringing products and services from technology manufacturers and cloud providers to business\-to\-business technology experts.
   

  

 Our market reach, diverse solutions and services portfolio, and digital platform Ingram Micro Xvantage™ set us apart
   

  

**Role Summary**
 The Azure Implementation Engineer is responsible for building, migrating, and onboarding customer environments into
   

  

 Microsoft Azure as part of structured delivery projects. The role works closely with Solution Architects, Project Managers, and
   

  

 Security teams to implement approved designs, execute migration waves, and prepare environments for steady\-state operations.
   

  

 The position requires hands\-on Azure deployment skills and basic Active Directory knowledge to support hybrid enterprise
   

  

 workloads.
   

  

 This is primarily a project delivery and implementation role, with limited post\-go\-live stabilisation support.
   

  

**Key Duties And Responsibilities**
 Working in collaboration with the Regional Service Centre and Azure Delivery teams, responsibilities include:
   

  

**Azure Implementation \& Project Delivery**
* Implement Azure landing zones and subscription structures as per approved architecture.
* Deploy core Azure services: Virtual Machines, VNets, Subnets, NSGs, Load Balancers, Storage Accounts.
* Configure availability, backup, DR, and security baselines.
* Execute workload onboarding and cutover activities during migration projects.
* Perform build, test, and production go\-live activities.
* Prepare implementation guides, build documents, and handover packs.
* Participate in design walkthroughs and technical workshops with customers.


**Migration Execution**
* Perform on\-prem to Azure and cloud\-to\-cloud migrations.
* Assist with discovery and assessment phases using Azure Migrate.
* Execute replication and cutover activities using ASR and Data Box.
* Support post\-migration stabilisation and optimisation phases.
* Track technical actions for migration waves and project milestones.


 Identity \& Active Directory (Basic Requirement)
   

  

* Support identity integration between on\-prem AD and Azure AD / Entra ID.
* Perform user/group sync checks and RBAC configuration.
* Understand AD fundamentals: OUs, DNS, Group Policy basics.
* Assist with MFA and conditional access rollout as part of projects.


**Automation \& Tooling**
* Implement builds using ARM, Bicep, or Terraform templates for to deploy VNets, AKS clusters, and SQL databases.
* Support Azure DevOps pipelines for infrastructure deployment.
* Use PowerShell / Azure CLI for automation during migrations and builds.


**Security Implementation**
* Hardening the environment by Zero Trust principles.
* Configuring Microsoft Entra ID (IAM) and enforcing Azure Policies.


**AI Integration**
* Build infra for Azure OpenAI and Azure AI Search.


**Operational Readiness \& Handover**
* Assist in operational readiness activities before transition to support teams.
* Create SOPs and runbooks for steady\-state environments.
* Participate in knowledge\-transfer sessions with managed services teams.
* Ensure governance, tagging, and security standards are implemented before handover.


**Qualifications And Experience**
 An Azure Support Engineer should also have the following qualifications and experience\-
   

  

* 3–5 years in cloud or infrastructure delivery roles.
* Strong hands\-on Azure implementation experience.
* Proven involvement in migration or transformation projects.
* Working knowledge of:
* Azure Compute, Storage, Networking
* Azure AD / RBAC / Hybrid Identity basics
* Windows and Linux administration experience.
* Basic automation/scripting exposure.
* Experience working in professional services / project\-based delivery environments.


**Knowledge, Skills, And Characteristics**
* Delivery\-oriented mindset with strong documentation skills.
* Comfortable working with project plans and milestones.
* Customer\-facing experience during implementations.
* Ability to follow architecture designs and escalate risks early.
* Exposure to Well\-Architected Framework and governance models is desirable.


**Required Certifications**
* AZ\-104 (Azure Administrator Associate)
* AZ\-500 (Azure Security Engineer)
* AZ \-700 ( Network Engineer)


**Optional\-**
* AZ\-400 (Azure DevOps Engineer Expert)
* AZ \-305 (Azure Solution Architect)

d201d4cc.title: Senior AWS Cloud Engineer
d201d4cc.description:
Interested in joining one of Canada’s top performing asset managers? We are seeking a forward\-thinking
 **Senior AWS Cloud Engineer** 
 to help shape the future of our hybrid cloud platform. At Connor, Clark \& Lunn Financial Group, technology is core to solving complex investment challenges. Our team designs enterprise architecture and develops shared platform services that drive innovation across the firm. As we expand our hybrid, SaaS\-first environment, we need an engineer who thrives at the intersection of cloud scalability, security, and automation — enabling resilient solutions that power a global 24/7 business.
   

  

**What You Will Do**
* Architect \& Implement scalable, secure, and reliable solutions on AWS, with seamless hybrid connectivity to on\-premises environments.
* Drive Cloud Modernization by applying Infrastructure\-as\-Code (CloudFormation, CDK, Terraform) to standardize and accelerate delivery.
* Collaborate Cross\-Functionally with developers, architects, and business stakeholders to translate requirements into technical outcomes.
* Champion Observability through proactive monitoring, alerting, and troubleshooting with concepts like AWS CloudWatch, X\-Ray, and other tooling.
* Secure the Cloud by designing network topologies with VPCs, segmentation, zero trust principles, and advanced security controls.
* Automate \& Optimize deployments and operations to reduce manual effort and increase reliability.
* Stay Future\-Ready by continuously evaluating emerging AWS and SaaS capabilities, ensuring our platforms evolve with industry best practices.
* Mentor \& Guide peers and teams in adopting cloud\-native patterns and practices.


**What You Bring**
* You are a problem\-solver and innovator with strong technical depth and a passion for collaboration.
* AWS Expertise: Proven experience with core AWS services (Lambda, ECS, SQS, RDS, S3, networking). Strong IaC knowledge (CloudFormation, CDK, Terraform).
* Hybrid\-Cloud Mindset: Hands\-on experience integrating AWS with private cloud or Azure, and building resilient connectivity (VPNs, Direct Connect, SD\-WAN).
* Security\-First Thinking: Expertise in VPC design, firewalls, routing, and applying zero trust principles.
* Observability Discipline: Proficiency with CloudWatch, X\-Ray, VPC Flow Logs, and performance troubleshooting.
* Automation Advocate: Skilled in scripting, automation, and CI/CD to eliminate repetitive tasks.
* Continuous Improvement Approach: You proactively seek opportunities to optimize technology and workflows.
* Collaborative Communicator: Strong interpersonal skills to work across technical and business teams.


**Why Join Us**
* Be part of a global, entrepreneurial culture that values innovation and continuous learning.
* Work in a hybrid environment, blending in\-office collaboration with the flexibility of remote work.
* Contribute to mission\-critical SaaS and hybrid solutions shaping the future of investment management technology.
* Grow your skills while making a measurable impact on a business that runs 24/7 worldwide.


  

  

 For a closer look at how you can build your career with us, we invite you to explore cclgroup.com.
   

  

 CC\&L Financial Group is committed to creating a diverse and inclusive environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to gender, ethnicity, religion, sexual orientation or expression, disability, or age.
   

  

 Your application will be reviewed by a member of the hiring team \- AI is not used in the screening, assessment or selection of applications at this time.

d91a2e83.title: Delivery Manager GCC
d91a2e83.description:
* Leads overall AI, Data Management, and Automation strategy within the enterprise and ensures all strategies are implemented effectively, yield a high degree of data quality and ensures customer data protection through a robust data governance program and appropriate security controls without constricting flow of business activities.

Effectively communicates the value of data to Executive Leadership and Senior Leadership Teams, offering data\-driven business insights that challenge and improve current products and processes and uses data insights to recommend cost reduction or revenue growth opportunities.

317dfbf5.description:
**Job Summary**
 The Manager\-Solutions \& BD will play a pivotal role in driving business growth by managing stakeholder relationships and developing innovative solutions. With a focus on the Hi\-Tech and Online domains this hybrid role requires a strategic thinker with 10 to 12 years of experience. The candidate will work closely with cross\-functional teams to ensure alignment with business objectives and deliver impactful solutions that enhance the companys market presence.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Lead the development and execution of business strategies to drive growth in the Hi\-Tech and Online sectors.
* Oversee stakeholder management processes to ensure effective communication and collaboration across teams.
* Provide innovative solutions that align with business objectives and enhance customer satisfaction.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams to identify and address business challenges and opportunities.

8d2422ce.title: Program Manager
8d2422ce.description:
Back
   

  

* Careers at SynthBee Inc.
* Program Manager


 SynthBee Inc. Program Manager Pembroke Pines, FL
   

  

* Full time Company website


 Apply for Program Manager
   

  

 Strategic Program Manager – Drive Cross\-Functional Alignment, OKRs, and Execution Excellence in a High\-Impact Technical Environment
   

  

**About SynthBee Inc.**
 At SynthBee we’re building Collaborative Intelligence™ maximising the potential of people and computers working together. CI™ will help humans solve the most important scientific, engineering, design, and creative challenges of our time. And create joy in the process.
   

  

**Description**
 As a
 **Program Manager,** 
 you will play a critical role in driving the successful execution of the organization's strategic initiatives. Reporting to the VP of Mission Control, you will ensure that objectives and key results (OKRs) are clearly defined, tracked, and achieved. In this role, you will coordinate cross\-functional efforts, streamline project management processes, and provide support to SynthBee team members to meet deliverables and organizational goals.
   

  

 This position is ideal for a results\-oriented professional with a strong technical background, exceptional organizational skills, and the ability to foster collaboration in a dynamic environment. By aligning resources, managing priorities, and ensuring clear communication, you will enable teams to deliver innovative and impactful solutions.
   

  

**Role Responsibilities**
* Program and Project Management: Plan, organize, and oversee the execution of engineering programs to align with departmental and organizational OKRs. Develop and maintain program schedules, ensuring timely delivery of key milestones and deliverables. Coordinate dependencies across teams and resolve potential conflicts to maintain alignment with priorities.
* Stakeholder Coordination: Act as a liaison between the VP of Mission Control and other departments to align objectives and resources. Facilitate clear communication of project goals, timelines, and expectations to internal and external stakeholders. Prepare and present status updates, reports, and dashboards to the leadership team.
* Team Support and Enablement: Partner with VP to build and maintain team culture aligned to the SynthBee Beekeepers Guide. Support unit\-level team members by removing obstacles, streamlining workflows, and providing guidance to achieve individual and team goals. Assist in resource planning and allocation to ensure teams are equipped to meet project demands. Encourage collaboration and knowledge sharing across team members to enhance productivity and innovation.
* OKR and Deliverable Tracking: Collaborate with the VP to establish OKRs for departments, ensuring they are actionable, measurable, and aligned with Mission Control. Track progress against OKRs and deliverables, identifying risks and proposing mitigations when necessary. Use data\-driven insights to continuously optimize program performance and identify areas for improvement.
* Process Optimization: Drive the implementation of best practices in project and program management, ensuring consistency and efficiency across departments. Evaluate and refine tools and methodologies to enhance program tracking, reporting, and team collaboration.
* Risk Management: Identify potential risks to program success and develop mitigation plans to address challenges proactively. Escalate critical issues to leadership with actionable recommendations for resolution.
* Cross\-Functional Collaboration: Partner with engineering, product, and operations teams to align technical initiatives with broader organizational goals. Facilitate seamless collaboration between software engineering teams and other departments to ensure successful program execution.
* Perform other related duties as assigned or as directed. The omission of specific duties does not preclude the supervisor from assigning duties that are logically related to the position.


 Apply for Program Manager
   

  

 Your Privacy Choices
   

  

 Read our Privacy Policy
   

  

 Your Opt Out Preference Signal is Honored
   

  

 Privacy Preference Center
   

  

 Gusto and its advertising partners use cookies and other tracking technologies in order to, among other things, improve and personalize the website and show you ads promoting Gusto products, services, and features on other sites or apps that you may use or visit. Under some applicable privacy laws, these advertising activities may be considered a “sale” or “share” of data, or “targeted advertising". To opt out of these uses or disclosures, you can update your consent preferences by sliding the toggles to the left and then clicking the “Confirm My Choices” button.
   

  

 Consent preferences set using the toggles will only apply to the web browser you’re currently using. You will need to update your preferences for each different device or browser you use to visit our website unless you have a Gusto account and are logged in. If you clear your cookies, your preferences will also reset.
   

  

 We may also disclose personal information, such as your name, email address, and contact information to our partners so they can show you ads that are more relevant to your interests or market their products or services to you. To opt\-out of “sales” or “sharing” of your data, or “targeted advertising” associated with your personal information, please complete our Opt\-Out Form.
   

  

 For more details, please read our Privacy Notice.
   

  

 Manage Consent Preferences
   

  

 Strictly Necessary Cookies
   

  

 Always Active
   

  

 These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.
   

  

 Performance Cookies
   

  

 Performance Cookies
   

  

 These cookies allow us to count visits and traffic sources so we can measure and improve the performance of our site. They help us to know which pages are the most and least popular and see how visitors move around the site. All information these cookies collect is aggregated and therefore anonymous. If you do not allow these cookies we will not know when you have visited our site, and will not be able to monitor its performance.
   

  

 Targeting Cookies
   

  

 Targeting Cookies
   

  

 These cookies may be set through our site by our advertising partners. They may be used by those companies to build a profile of your interests and show you relevant adverts on other sites. They do not store directly personal information, but are based on uniquely identifying your browser and internet device. If you do not allow these cookies, you will experience less targeted advertising.

de79a4f7.title: Presales / Proposal Engineer
de79a4f7.description:
We are seeking a highly motivated
 **Proposal Writer** 
 to support our AI and Digital Transformation practice. This role offers a unique opportunity to work closely with Sales, AI Architects, Engineers, and Business Leaders to develop compelling proposals and solutions for enterprise clients. The ideal candidate is a strong communicator with excellent writing skills, an interest in Artificial Intelligence and emerging technologies, and the ability to transform business requirements into clear, structured, and persuasive proposals.
 



  





**Role : Proposal Writer** 




**Location : Remote work** 




**Employment Type : FTE** 




**No of Openings: 2** 




  





**Responsibilities:**



* Assist in the preparation of proposals,
 **RFP/RFI responses, Statements of Work (SOWs),** 
 presentations, and executive summaries.
* Translate client requirements and
 **discovery discussions into well\-defined solution proposals.**
* Collaborate with Sales, Delivery, Product, and Engineering teams to gather information and develop winning responses.
* Research
 **AI, GenAI, Cloud, Data, and Digital Transformation solutions** 
 to support proposal development.
* Support the creation of project scope, timelines, assumptions, deliverables, and engagement models.
* Help articulate business value,
 **ROI, and transformation outcomes** 
 for enterprise clients.
* Assist in preparing commercial documents, pricing frameworks, and proposal presentations.
* Identify proposal risks, dependencies, assumptions, and exclusions.
* Maintain proposal repositories, reusable content libraries, case studies, and knowledge assets.
* Manage multiple proposal activities while ensuring accuracy, consistency, and timely delivery.



**Required Qualifications** 



* Bachelor's degree (completed or pursuing final year) in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, Business Administration, or a related field.
* Strong written and verbal communication skills.
* Excellent research, analytical, and problem\-solving abilities.
* Ability to organize information and present complex ideas in a clear and structured manner.
* Strong attention to detail and commitment to delivering high\-quality work.
* Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, PowerPoint, Excel) and Google Workspace.



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Exposure to AI, Generative AI, Cloud Computing, Data Analytics, or Digital Transformation concepts.
* Experience with proposal writing, business analysis, technical writing, research projects, or consulting assignments.



  





**About Techolution:**




 Techolution is the
 **world's \#1 AI Acceleration Partner** 
 and the inventor of
 **BPA 4\.0** 
 , the groundbreaking AI platform that delivers
 **guaranteed ROI from enterprise AI in 30 days or less** 
 .
 



 With over 10\+ years of experience, we specialize in turning AI into measurable business value—helping global enterprises achieve dramatic efficiency gains (like 42x improvements in key processes), modernize legacy systems, migrate to the cloud (as a Google Premier Partner), and deploy custom AI solutions across industries such as healthcare, manufacturing, media, banking, government, and life sciences.
 



  





 Our mission is simple yet powerful:
 **"TURN AI INTO ROI"** 
 — where it matters most. We go beyond generic AI by offering risk\-free innovation, including our
 **100k Challenge** 
 (2x quantifiable savings in 100 days or your money back), rapid diagnostics via
 **BPA Value Finder** 
 , and AI\-powered managed services that deliver twice the quality at half the cost.
 



  





 Backed by 12 patents, 5 notable awards (including Inc. 5000 recognition), 2 published books, and a track record of solving real\-world challenges—from patient prioritization during COVID\-19 to quality control in supply chains and air quality monitoring—we empower teams to thrive in an AI\-driven future.
 



  





 At Techolution, we're building "innovation done right" with a passionate, collaborative team focused on delivering next\-level impact, workforce enablement, and trustworthy, enterprise\-scale automation. Join us to be part of redefining how businesses operate with AI.
 



  





 Visit us
 **@
 
 www.techolution.com
 
 :** 
 To know more about our revolutionary core practices and getting to know in detail about how we enrich the human experience with technology.

1dbc4e1e.title: Presales Manager
1dbc4e1e.description:
Company Description SUNROOOF, a subsidiary of the MAGPPIE group, has developed a pioneering lighting system that recreates the experience of natural sunlight indoors. Using advanced technology, specialized optics, and thoughtful design, SUNROOOF can transform any enclosed space into a courtyard\-like environment. The solution allows people to enjoy an outdoor ambiance while remaining indoors, enhancing comfort and well\-being. As an innovation\-focused company, SUNROOOF offers team members the opportunity to contribute to cutting\-edge lighting and spatial design solutions.
   




**Job Summary:** 

  





 We are seeking a dynamic and results\-driven Pre\-Sales Manager to do further work on our generated leads by talking with our HNI clients. The ideal candidate will leverage their extensive network to drive business growth and meet targets, contributing significantly to the company’s success.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities:** 




 ●    Proven track record in calling with a credible background.
 



 ●    Ability to make calls daily to handle inquiries effectively.
 



 ●    Able to handle HNI clients effectively.
 



 ●    Develop new relationships in an effort to grow business and help company expand.
 



 ●    Aim to convert inquiries into showroom visits through effective communication.
 



 ●    Represent the company professionally and maintain its reputation.
 



 ●    Provide accurate information and assistance to potential clients.
 



 ●    Collaborate with team members to optimize calling and WhatsApp engagement strategies.
 



  





**Key Requirements:** 




 ●    Exceptional English language proficiency with polished speaking skills.
 



 ●    Strong communication skills with clarity in speech.
 



 ●    Proficient in engaging customers on WhatsApp.
 



 ●    Strong follow up skills required.
 



 ●    Bachelor's degree or equivalent experience.
 



 ●    2\+ years prior industry related business development experience.
 



 ●    Focused and goal\-oriented.
 



 ●    Prior experience in a reputable organization in Interior, Architecture, Luxury Furniture, Premium Realty is preferred.

660166cf.title: HubSpot Solution Architect m/w/d
660166cf.description:
Wir suchen
   

  

 Du Bist Optimal Für Diese Position Geeignet, Wenn Du Digital\-Native Bist Und Dich Bereiche Wie Zum Beispiel „CRM“, „Automation“ Oder „HubSpot“ Begeistern. Zu Deinen Aufgaben Bei CIXON Gehört
   

  

* Entwerfen von Marketing\-Automation\-Konzepten sowie digitalen \& modernen Vertriebs\- und Kundenservice\-Prozessen, die unsere Kunden auf die digitale Spur bringen
* Realisierung von digitalen Kampagnen in HubSpot (Segmentierung, E\-Mail\-Marketing, Nurturing und Automatisierung)
* IT\-Beratung rund um CRM\-Software in Form von Kundenterminen, Projektgesprächen, Workshops, Onboardings und Schulungen.
* Datengetriebenes Reporting und Optimierung von Prozessen zur Effizienzsteigerung


 Vergütung: Fixes Gehalt ab 45\.000€ brutto pro Jahr und ein variabler Bonus je nach Performance.
   

  

 Dein Profil
   

  

* Mindestens 2 Jahre Erfahrung mit IT\-Projekten, idealerweise Beratung \& CRM\-Software.
* Grundlegende Kenntnisse im Umgang mit HubSpot oder anderen CRM\-Systemen.
* Verhandlungssichere Deutsch\- und Englischkenntnisse.
* Lösungsorientiertes Denken über mehrere Projekte hinaus mit Blick aufs große Ganze.
* Teamplayer der gern remote arbeitet und genauso gern auch mal unterwegs ist.


 Warum CIXON
   

  

* 100% Remote Arbeitskultur mit Standort Deutschland \& virtuellem Office.
* Vergütung: Fixes Gehalt je nach Berufserfahrung ab 45\.000€ brutto pro Jahr und variablem Bonus je nach Performance.
* Steuerfreie Sachbezüge bis 600 € pro Jahr
* Dynamisches, junges Team und coole Teamevents (schau mal auf unseren YouTube\-Kanal).
* Spannende Projekte mit großem Wachstumspotential.
* Exklusive Workshops von HubSpot.
* Flexible Arbeitszeiten mit klaren Zielvorstellungen.
* Variabler Erfolgs\-Bonus.
* Proaktive Förderung von Fort\- und Weiterbildung.

a97be6b9.title: Pre-Sales Engineer
a97be6b9.description:
We're looking for a Pre\-Sales Engineer to be the technical bridge between OMS's product and prospective clients — labs evaluating whether OMS fits their workflow, accreditation requirements, and team. You'll run product demonstrations, answer deep technical questions, and help labs understand exactly what OMS can do for them before they sign. In a market where buyers are often NDT Level IIIs and NABL assessors, surface\-level pitches don't work — you need to know the product and the domain.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Deliver tailored OMS product demonstrations to prospective clients — labs, lab groups, and enterprise accounts
* Qualify technical requirements during discovery calls and translate them into platform capability discussions
* Respond to RFPs and technical questionnaires with accurate, compelling answers
* Build and present proof\-of\-concept configurations for high\-value prospects
* Work closely with the sales team on deal strategy, objection handling, and proposal development
* Maintain demo environments and scenario libraries for different lab types — NDT, calibration, testing
* Feed client feedback from the evaluation process back to Product and Domain teams to inform the roadmap


**Requirements**
* 3–6 years of experience in pre\-sales, solutions engineering, or technical consulting for enterprise SaaS
* Ability to run confident, tailored product demonstrations to technical and non\-technical audiences
* Strong written communication — able to respond to RFPs, prepare proposals, and write technical evaluation summaries
* Familiarity with lab management, quality management systems, or NDT/inspection workflows preferred
* Experience working alongside a sales team in a quota\-carrying environment
* Basic technical depth — able to speak credibly about APIs, integrations, and data workflows
* Willingness to travel to client sites in India and occasionally Australia


 What you get
   

  

 Hybrid work — Bengaluru with client travelCompetitive salary with performance\-linked incentivesWork at the front line of OMS's growth into enterprise and multi\-lab accountsBuild deep knowledge of both the product and the NDT/lab accreditation domainCareer path into Sales Lead, Solutions Architect, or Customer Success

e895d80a.title: Solution Architect - Multi Site Rollout
e895d80a.description:
RESPONSIBILITIES


* Manage opportunities and assist sales teams in the preparation, delivery, presentation and negotiation of multi\-site rollout proposals, contracts and pricing.
* Respond to RFPs, RFQ s and proactive bids while working closely with all teams to develop the win strategy, competitor evaluation and creating differentiated value propositions.
* Develop a deep understanding of Blackbox services capabilities.
* Achieve sales and profit goals through joint account planning, partner teaming (internal \& external), on\-site client interface/visits, engagement/solution development and implementation support/follow\-up.
* Lead the design and execution strategy for multi\-site rollout services, ensuring seamless deployment and standardized configurations across diverse geographic locations.
* Lead collaboration with SMEs from other pre\-sales engineering groups to provide technical input where needed.
* Engineer deployment solutions for network refresh projects, working closely with clients to modernize legacy infrastructure, while minimizing downtime and business disruption.
* Drive infrastructure refresh initiatives, including server, storage, and network hardware upgrades, aligned with evolving business and technology requirements.
* Define support models and resource planning for Smart Hands services, enabling on\-site technical assistance across various customer environments.
* Design scalable and flexible frameworks for on\-demand support, including SLA\-based engagements to handle ad\-hoc technical requirements across IT infrastructure domains.
* Collaborate with Structured Cabling SMEs to engineer solutions that are compliant with standards and optimal network performance.
* Coordinate and deliver detailed Wi\-Fi site surveys, including predictive and physical surveys, to ensure optimal coverage, capacity, and performance for enterprise wireless networks.
* Plan and manage deployment solutions for Wireless Access Point replacement and refresh projects, ensuring minimal user impact and improved wireless experience across all business\-critical areas.

  



KNOWLEDGE, SKILLS \& ABILITIES


* Strong business acumen and understanding of clients IT related business goals and challenges to ensure proper translation of the client’s needs into solutions.
* Understanding various pricing models such as per port, resource based, ticket based, onsite, remote or Hybrid.
* Experience of solutioning on deals involving multi\-site rollouts, network refresh projects, Smart Hands services, on\-demand support, structured cabling projects (both copper and fiber), Wi\-Fi site surveys and Access Point (AP) replacement and refresh projects, etc.
* Strong understanding of Pre\-sales/Solutions process and activities with hands\-on experience good bid/project management skills ability to manage multiple bids simultaneously.
* Ability to develop and deliver technical presentations with customers and tailor content to audience as appropriate.
* Display sustained energy and determination to meet challenging deliverables within stringent timelines.
* Ability to work independently with diverse \& global teams and interact confidently with customers and internal stakeholders at all levels.
* Fluent English written and verbal communication skills.
* Experience running support teams and/or operations a plus.
* Experience with Enterprise Networking and Unified Communications technologies.
* Strong Microsoft office skillset with specific emphasis on Word, Excel and Power Point.

  



EDUCATION AND EXPERIENCE


* Degree in a computer Science and Engineering or equivalent role relevant experience.
* 6\+ years in a customer/client facing technical role (Pre/Post Sales, Sales Engineering, Consulting, Solutions Architecture, Service Delivery, etc.) with a strong knowledge of various network architectures, virtualization, Cloud, Unified Communications and mobility solutions.
* 4\+ years of pre\-sale experience developing multi\-site rollout solutions or managed services solutions.
* ITSM training and certifications (ITIL,COBIT, etc.) a plus
* Extensive consulting experience, providing large, global customers with strategic and tactical planning for technology solutions.
* Demonstrated and verifiable track record of prior successful customer engagements (Examples of solution designs, statements of work and/or technical project plans are required).
* Experience with enterprise OEMs with a specific emphasis on Cisco.

  



CERTIFICATIONS



Industry certifications on technology partners, processes in one or more of the following preferred:


* ITIL
* BICSI
* Cisco Networking (e.g. CCNA)

  



KEY TECHNOLOGIES


* Enterprise Networking
* Structured Cabling
* Unified Communications
* Network Architecture
* Wireless Networking

c78ac042.title: Lead Solutions Engineer
c78ac042.description:
**At Cadence, we hire and develop leaders and innovators who want to make an impact on the world of technology.**
 Understand/review Design specification and develop verification strategy/Test plan/coverage plan. Development of constrained random verification environments and verification components. Writing tests/sequences/functional coverage/assertions to meet verification goals. Developing c\-based test cases for SOC verification.
   

  

**Required Experience**
* Strong background on functional verification fundamentals, environment planning, test plan generation, environment development
* System Verilog experience and experience with UVM based functional verification environment development is required.
* Good knowledge of verilog/vhdl/C/C\+\+/Perl/Python.
* Expertise in AMBA protocols. (AXI/AHB/APB).
* Good knowledge of at least one of the USB/PCIE/Ethernet/DDR/LPDDR or similar protocols
* Good handle on using one or more version control software
* Good handle on using one or more load sharing software


**Desirable Skills And Experience**
* Prior experience with Cadence tools and flows is highly desirable.
* Familiarity with ARM/CPU architectures is a plus.
* Experience in developing c\-based test cases for SOC verification
* Some experience with assembly language programming
* Good knowledge of some of the protocols like UART, I2C, SPI, JTAG
* Embedded C code development and debug
* Formal Verification experience


 Strong vocabulary, communication, organizational, planning, and presentation skills are essential. Ability to work independently and productively with high quality output and results in a fast paced and dynamic environment. Ability and desire to learn new methodologies, languages, protocols etc. Must be open to constant personal development and growth to meet the evolving demands of the semiconductor industry. Self\-motivated and willing take up additional responsibilities to contribute to team’s success.
   

  

**We’re doing work that matters. Help us solve what others can’t.**

356320bb.title: JOB: Test Solutions Engineer At Micron Technology In Hyderabad
356320bb.description:
**APPLY HERE**
**Location:** 
 Hyderabad
   

  

**Company:** 
 Micron Technology
   

  

 NAND Probe/ Back End Testing
   

  

* Improve Probe testing coverage, quality and on NAND products
* Own the probe test flow, review and sign off probe test program release to ensure quality control
* Utilise state\-of\-the\-art in\-house engineering equipment to support product characterisation and electrical failure analysis
* Develop creative testing algorithms to improve testing efficiency


 New Generation Product Development
   

  

* Responsible for new product startup and yield improvement
* Support design verification and in\-depth circuit of new products using CAD tools and Verilog simulations
* Work with the wafer fab process/integration group to address process\-related defects affecting product yield
* Identify design marginalities and recommend design fix for circuit\-related problems


 Functional and Design Validation
   

  

* Design novel test algorithms and develop test programs for validating NAND features and commands
* Use high\-speed tester hardware to perform validation of new NAND devices
* Analysis of failures generated from the evaluations
* Automation of program development and work processes using scripting


 Product Yield Enhancement
   

  

* Identify causes of low yield through systematic analysis
* Work closely with various engineering groups in resolving process/defects related issues
* Perform electrical/physical failure analysis to understand the failure mechanism relating to defects / fab process
* Utilize statistical tools for detailed data analysis on product to drive yield improvement projects


 Managed NAND (MNAND) Products
   

  

* Develop high quality and cost\-efficient MNAND test strategies
* Understand 3D NAND defect mechanisms and MNAND system error recovery features
* Collaborate with test engineering teams to define and secure necessary test fixtures for memory and system testing
* Conduct electrical failure analysis of the MNAND products through different phases of the product life cycling such as qualification, high volume manufacturing and customer returns.
* Extensive usage of data parsing and data analysis for improving yields, test times and quality of the products.


 Solid State Drive (SSD) Firmware Validation
   

  

* Develop and maintain manufacturing Firmware for testing of SSDs.
* Build the Manufacturing FW to self\-test SSDs during the development phase
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives in terms of test coverage through optimization of code.
* Ensure SSD are tested to meet or exceed the required functionality, usability, quality/reliability and performance with an efficient manufacturing firmware.

06a9302b.title: Senior Group Technical Architect
06a9302b.description:
Gautam Buddha Nagar, Uttar Pradesh
  
Job Summary
  
To play a pivotal role in designing and implementing complex/large scale technical solutions, that are scalable and in line with industry best practices, latest technology trends.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
1\. To architect\| design and develop (through Team) solution for product/project \& sustenance delivery
  
2\. To bridge the gap between client needs and business goals by gathering requirements, crafting innovative solutions with deep domain/technology expertise, and driving successful implementations that propel strategic initiatives.
  
3\. To ensure knowledge up\-gradation and work with new technologies so that the solution is current and meets quality standards and the client requirements
  
4\. To review architecture and design deliverables and ensure solutions adhere to industry best practices ,architectural standards simultaneously establish and enforce governance /compliance measures.
  
5\. To train and develop team so as to ensure that there is an adequate supply of trained manpower in the said technology and delivery risks are mitigated
  
6\. To submit Whitepapers, participate in industry forums and file Patents
