e2ada1aa.title: AI/ ML - Solutions Architect
e2ada1aa.description:
**AI /ML Solutions Architect** 




  





 Searce's AIML Architect contributes to the design and delivery of AI solutions, overseeing technical execution and fostering the growth of junior solutions consultants.
 



 You are the founder, the architect, and the Directly Responsible Individual (DRI) who bridges AI vision with enterprise\-ready systems.
 



 Your mission is to futurify enterprise platforms with applied AI — from architecture to adoption — while ensuring scalability, security, and responsibility.
 



  





**What are we looking for** 




*real solver?* 




**Solver? Absolutely. But not the usual kind.** 
 We're searching for the architects of the audacious \& the pioneers of the possible. If you're the type to dismantle assumptions, re\-engineer ‘best practices,’ and build solutions that make the future possible NOW, then you're speaking our language.
 


* Improver. Solver. Futurist.
* Great sense of humor.
* ‘Possible. It is.’ Mindset.
* Compassionate collaborator. Bold experimenter. Tireless iterator.
* Natural creativity that doesn’t just challenge the norm, but solves to design what’s better.
* Thinks in systems. Solves at scale.



**This Isn’t for Everyone.** 
 But if you’re the kind who questions
 *why* 
 things are done a certain way— and then identifies 3 better ways to do it — we’d love to chat with you.
 



  





**Your Mission: The Role** 




 solving for better.
 



  





 You are a transformation\-owning, outcome\-delivering, forward\-deployed solver (fds) who architects AI\-native systems that move from hype to real outcomes. You’ll be a Directly Responsible Individual (DRI) for designing and spearheading applied AI architectures that reimagine how enterprises work, compete, and grow.
 



 Let’s be clear: this is not your typical architect role where success is measured in reference to diagrams and “innovation theater.” At Searce, you prototype, build, and deploy real\-world AI platforms that embed into workflows, scale responsibly, and generate measurable enterprise impact.
 



 This role is about engineering the future and building the bridge between business vision and a scalable reality. If you’re a strategist who can architect, a builder who can influence, and a visionary who can blueprint the complex, we’ve got a seat for you at the front of the table.
 



  





**Your Responsibilities** 




 what you will wake up to solve.
 



  




* **Architect \& Lead:** 
 \- Lead \& own outcome of all the POCs to showcase solution capabilities. Deliver compelling presentations and demonstrations of Searce's capabilities.
* **Enable AI\-powered Products:** 
 Develop and design comprehensive solution proposals, technical specifications and business use\-cases.
* **Mentor \& Grow:** 
 Guide the architectural design of cloud, data, and AI solutions, ensuring they are robust, scalable, and directly aligned with client requirements.
* **Optimize Performance \& Cost:** 
 Continuously optimize AI models and their architectures for performance, efficiency, and cost\-effectiveness, ensuring solutions deliver maximum value.
* **Pre\-Sales Leadership:** 
 Lead technical engagements, workshops, POCs, and demos that showcase real AI ROI to enterprise customers.
* **Build \& Deliver:** 
 Drive AI reference architectures into production\-ready solutions that integrate seamlessly into enterprise IT ecosystems.
* **Client Partnership:** 
 Engage deeply with executives and technical leaders, becoming a trusted advisor on their AI transformation journey.
* **Stay Ahead:** 
 Track emerging AI/ML trends (generative AI, copilots, agent frameworks) and apply them intelligently to unlock enterprise value.



  





**Experience \& Relevance** 




  




* 6\+ years in AI, ML and solution architecture with enterprise exposure.
* Several years in technical leadership roles, managing architecture teams.
* Proven success delivering applied AI architectures in enterprise environments.
* Industry exposure across tech, finance, healthcare, retail, or manufacturing.
* Background in consultative solution design and enterprise adoption.
* Hands\-on experience deploying AI\-powered workflows, copilots, and automation.
* Strong record of client\-facing delivery and technical advisory leadership.



  





**Functional Skills** 




  




* **Technical Consulting Mastery:** 
 Translate complex business challenges into applied AI\-enabled architectures.
* **Team Leadership:** 
 Manage, mentor, and inspire high\-performing AI solution architects.
* **Architectural Visionary:** 
 Designs and co\-creates comprehensive solution blueprints, championing an engineering\-first design philosophy.
* **Enterprise\-Grade Architecture:** 
 Design AI solutions that integrate with IT systems, cloud platforms, and enterprise processes.
* **Pre\-Sales \& Technical Storyteller** 
 : Crafts compelling, client\-ready proposals, architectural decks, and technical demonstrations. Doesn't just present; shapes the strategic technical narrative behind every proposed solution.
* **Technology \& Market Insight:** 
 A strong understanding of the AI/ML technology landscape, including emerging trends
* **Client Engagement:** 
 Strong communicator, equally comfortable with CxOs and data scientists.
* **Commercial Acumen:** 
 Understanding of how technology solutions impact business metrics, revenue, and return on investment (ROI).
* **Cross\-Functional Technical Bridge:** 
 Learns the language of delivery, sales, and engineering—and acts as the bridge that keeps them in sync.



  





**Tech Superpowers** 




  




* **AI/ML Expertise:** 
 Deep hands\-on experience with
 **LLMs** 
 ,
 **Generative AI** 
 ,
 **RAG pipelines,** 
 conversational AI, and automation frameworks.
* **Cloud\-Native Mastery:** 
 Proven work with AWS (SageMaker, Bedrock), Azure (OpenAI, Cognitive Services), GCP (Vertex AI).
* **Programming Depth:** 
 Strong in Python, APIs, model integration, microservices architecture.
* **MLOps \& Scale:** 
 Skilled with deployment pipelines, monitoring, evaluation, and responsible scaling.
* **Responsible AI:** 
 Strong grounding in bias mitigation, explainability, privacy, and security.
* **Prototype to Production:** 
 Ability to rapidly iterate, demo, and scale solutions into enterprise\-ready platforms.
* **Systems Thinking:** 
 See the full stack — from model architecture to workflow embedding to measurable outcomes.

e2b69dc0.title: Solutions Architect
e2b69dc0.description:
**Project Description:** 



* We are seeking a highly experienced Solution Architect to design, guide, and govern scalable software solutions across the organization—ranging from individual components to fully integrated enterprise platforms.
* This role requires strong expertise in AWS cloud technologies, AI infrastructure, and advanced AI governance practices, ensuring solutions align with business strategy, security standards, and responsible AI policies.



  





**Responsibilities:** 




 Architecture \& Solution Design
 



 • Design end\-to\-end architectures spanning:
 



 o Component\-level services (microservices, APIs)
 



 o Domain platforms
 



 o Enterprise\-wide ecosystems
 



 • Define architecture patterns, standards, and reusable frameworks
 



 • Translate business requirements into scalable and secure technical solutions
 



 • Ensure interoperability across systems, data layers, AI services, and platforms
 



  





 Enterprise Architecture Strategy
 



 • Develop and maintain enterprise architecture roadmaps
 



 • Align IT strategy with business goals and digital transformation initiatives
 



 • Establish governance models (TOGAF/SAFe or similar)
 



 • Lead architecture review boards and technical decision\-making processes
 



  





 Cloud Architecture (AWS)
 



 • Architect and optimize cloud\-native and hybrid solutions using AWS services
 



 • Define cloud migration strategies and modernization approaches
 



 • Ensure high availability, resiliency, cost optimization, and performance
 



 • Implement Infrastructure\-as\-Code and automation best practices
 



  





 AI, Data \& Intelligent Systems Architecture
 



 • Design AI/ML infrastructure, pipelines, and enterprise integration patterns
 



 • Architect solutions incorporating LLMs, generative AI, and intelligent agents
 



 • Guide adoption of AI technologies within enterprise platforms and products
 



 • Establish patterns for:
 



 o RAG (Retrieval\-Augmented Generation)
 



 o Feature stores and data pipelines
 



 o Model deployment, versioning, and scaling
 



  





 AI Governance, Observability \& Control
 



 • Define and implement enterprise AI governance frameworks covering:
 



 o Responsible AI usage (fairness, bias mitigation, explainability)
 



 o Data privacy, lineage, and compliance
 



 o AI risk classification and policy enforcement
 



 • Establish AI observability and monitoring capabilities, including:
 



 o End\-to\-end tracing of AI/ML and LLM flows using tools such as OpenTelemetry
 



 o Monitoring of prompts, responses, latency, and model behavior using platforms like Langfuse or equivalent
 



 o Metrics for model performance, drift, hallucination rates, and usage patterns
 



 • Design and enforce agent governance and control mechanisms, including:
 



 o Monitoring and auditing of autonomous and semi\-autonomous AI agents
 



 o Guardrails for agent behavior, tool usage, and decision boundaries
 



 o Human\-in\-the\-loop (HITL) workflows and escalation patterns
 



 o Policy\-based control over agent actions and integrations
 



 • Implement AI lifecycle governance, including:
 



 o Model validation, approval workflows, and audit trails
 



 o Continuous evaluation and feedback loops
 



 o Secure model and prompt management
 



  





 Cross\-Disciplinary Architecture Leadership
 



 • Act as a strategic liaison across Semantic, Data, and ML architecture domains
 



 • Facilitate alignment between knowledge graphs, ontologies, data platforms, and ML systems
 



 • Provide architectural guidance to specialized architects, ensuring cohesive enterprise integration
 



 • Bridge gaps between business semantics, data engineering, and machine learning pipelines
 



  





 Security, Compliance \& Governance
 



 • Ensure architectures meet enterprise security standards (e.g., Zero Trust)
 



 • Define policies for data governance, access control, and auditability
 



 • Align AI and cloud solutions with regulatory and compliance frameworks
 



  





 Collaboration \& Leadership
 



 • Work with engineering, product, data, and AI teams to align solutions
 



 • Mentor architects and senior engineers
 



 • Act as a trusted advisor to leadership and stakeholders
 



  





**Mandatory Skills Description:** 




 Core Architecture
 



 • 8\-12\+ years in software engineering and architecture roles
 



 • Proven experience designing large\-scale distributed systems
 



 • Strong knowledge of:
 



 o Microservices and event\-driven architectures
 



 o API management and integrations
 



 o Enterprise integration patterns (EIPs)
 



  





 AWS Technologies
 



 Compute \& Containers
 



 • Amazon EC2, AWS Lambda
 



 • Amazon ECS / EKS (Kubernetes)
 



 Networking \& Integration
 



 • Amazon VPC, Route 53, API Gateway
 



 • AWS App Mesh, EventBridge, SNS, SQS
 



 Data \& Storage
 



 • Amazon S3, EBS, Glacier
 



 • Amazon RDS, Aurora, DynamoDB, Redshift
 



 DevOps \& Automation
 



 • AWS CloudFormation / CDK / Terraform
 



 • AWS CodePipeline, CodeBuild, CodeDeploy
 



 Observability
 



 • Amazon CloudWatch, AWS X\-Ray
 



 Security
 



 • AWS IAM, Cognito, KMS, Secrets Manager
 



 • AWS Organizations and Control Tower
 



  





 AI/ML, LLM \& Observability Expertise
 



 • Experience with AWS AI/ML stack:
 



 o Amazon SageMaker
 



 o Amazon Bedrock (LLMs \& foundation models)
 



 o AWS Glue, Lake Formation
 



 • Hands\-on experience with:
 



 o LLM\-based architectures and agent\-based systems
 



 o AI observability tools (e.g., OpenTelemetry, Langfuse, Prometheus/Grafana)
 



 o Prompt lifecycle management and evaluation pipelines
 



 • Strong understanding of:
 



 o AI governance frameworks and enterprise AI controls
 



 o Agent orchestration, monitoring, and guardrails
 



 o Data lineage, quality, and compliance
 



  





 Architecture Frameworks \& Practices
 



 • TOGAF or equivalent enterprise architecture frameworks
 



 • Domain\-driven design (DDD)
 



 • Cloud\-native and serverless patterns
 



  





  





 Soft Skills
 



 • Strong communication and stakeholder management
 



 • Strategic thinking with hands\-on technical depth
 



 • Ability to influence senior leadership and cross\-functional teams
 



 • Mentorship and leadership capabilities
 



  





**Nice\-to\-Have Skills Description:** 




 • AWS Certified Solutions Architect \- Professional
 



 • AWS Specialty Certifications (Machine Learning, Security)
 



 • Experience implementing enterprise AI governance frameworks
 



 • Background in regulated industries
 



 • Exposure to multi\-cloud or hybrid environments
 



 • Experience integrating data, semantic, and ML architectures
 



  





**Languages:** 



* English: Advanced

158803c6.title: Principal Solution Architect - ERP Ecosystem
158803c6.description:
Egis is a leading global consulting, construction engineering and operating firm. We work together with our clients, across every aspect of transport, energy, and the built environment to build a more balanced, sustainable, and resilient world. The Egis Group has more than 50 years of experience and a team of 22,000 employees in over 120 countries around the world. Joining our Group means, above all, sharing our values as a people\-first company, strongly committed to sustainability and innovation.
   

  

  

  

 In the UK we're proud to be delivering some of the most iconic projects which help connect people, protect our environment, and meet emission reduction targets. From motorways to tramways, and nuclear power plants to smart cities, clients choose us to help them solve their most complex challenges \- delivering climate\-responsible growth that meets the needs of communities, industry and the planet.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 The Solution Architect is responsible for defining, ensuring consistency, and strengthening the robustness of IS architectures within the EARTH ecosystem scope (ERP, HCM, CRM, E\-PROD “Project and Portfolio Management” and complementary SaaS solutions).
   

  





 This is a high\-visibility role for a transformational leader, offering the opportunity to work extensively with international IT and business high\-level stakeholders. Working closely with the ERP Ecosystem Run (L2\-L3\) Delivery Manager and the Middleware integration leader, the Solution Architect will contribute directly to the stability, performance, and evolution of the EARTH solutions ecosystem, reducing structural incidents, and strengthening end\-to\-end business process fluidity \& data quality.
   

  

  

  




**Qualifications**

**Solution \& Technical Architecture**




 • Own the target and existing architecture for the EARTH ecosystem, covering applications, interfaces, data flows and key dependencies across Oracle Fusion ERP, HCM, PPM and satellite solutions.
   

  





 • Define, document and enforce architecture standards, integration patterns, API principles, data\-flow models and technical design guardrails.
   

  





 • Ensure end\-to\-end solution consistency, scalability, security, maintainability and alignment with enterprise architecture principles. Business–IT Alignment
   

  





 • Translate business needs into sustainable technical solutions, working closely with Business Analysts, BPOs, IT leadership and delivery teams.
   

  





 • Support prioritization of technical choices based on business value, risk reduction, operational efficiency and long\-term reusability.
   

  





 • Reduce the gap between business expectations and delivery by clarifying solution options, impacts, constraints and arbitration points. Project Framing, Design and Build\-to\-Run
   

  





 • Contribute to project framing and design phases, validating integration within the existing ecosystem and anticipating impacts on Run, supportability and performance.
   

  





 • Embed operability, monitoring, documentation and support requirements from the design stage to secure smooth Build\-to\-Run transition. Challenge customization, duplication and technical complexity to limit technical debt and promote reusable core model capabilities.
   

  





**Contribution to Run and Continuous Improvement**




 • Provide L3 expertise on major incidents and recurring structural issues, identifying root causes related to interfaces, data, dependencies or solution design.
   

  





 • Drive actions to improve IS stability, performance, data quality and end\-to\-end business process fluidity.
   

  





 • Promote automation, monitoring, knowledge capitalization and AI\-assisted practices to increase efficiency and reduce manual effort. Governance and Capitalization
   

  





 • Contribute to sustainable architecture governance across a multi\-application, multi\-country and multi\-stakeholder environment.
   

  





 • Participate in architecture reviews, technical decision\-making forums and solution arbitration with Enterprise Architecture and IT leadership.
   

  





 • Establish reliable documentation for architectures, interfaces, data flows, decision records and operational knowledge base content.
   

  





 Essential Experience
   

  





 • Significant experience as a Solution Architect, Lead Architect or Senior Functional/Technical Architect in complex enterprise application environments.
   

  





 • Strong exposure to Oracle Fusion ERP and Oracle HCM; experience with Oracle Integration Cloud, OCI and integration architecture is highly expected.
   

  





 • Experience working across Build and Run contexts, including project framing, solution design, support transition, incident analysis and continuous improvement.
   

  





 • Proven ability to operate in international, matrixed and multicultural organizations with both IT and business stakeholders. Technical \& Functional Expertise
   

  





 • Deep understanding of ERP, HCM, CRM, PPM and complementary SaaS ecosystems, with the ability to assess dependencies, data flows and integration impacts.
   

  





 • Knowledge of Dynamics 365 CRM B2B is a plus; experience with Planview or comparable PPM solutions is appreciated.
   

  





 • High ownership, curiosity, resilience and capacity to work in a changing environment where documentation and governance are still being strengthened.
   

  





 • Strong command of architecture documentation, interface mapping, data\-flow modelling, technical debt management and architecture governance practices.
   

  





 • Good understanding of ITIL\-oriented Run processes, especially incident, problem, change, release and knowledge management. Leadership \& Soft Skills
   

  





 • Strong analytical mindset with the ability to structure complex topics, identify root causes and propose pragmatic architecture options.
   

  





 • Excellent communication and influencing skills, able to align diverse stakeholders and explain technical matters to senior business and IT audiences.
   

  





 • Balanced strategic and operational posture, combining long\-term architecture vision with hands\-on pragmatism in Run and delivery contexts.
   

  





**Sucess Metrics**




 Architecture for the EARTH ecosystem is progressively documented, controlled and shared with Run, Build and Enterprise Architecture stakeholders.
   

  





 • Reusable solution patterns, integration standards and data\-flow principles are defined and applied across new initiatives.
   

  





 • Structural incidents and recurring root causes linked to solution design, interfaces or data quality are reduced through corrective architecture actions.
   

  





 • Business–IT alignment improves through clearer arbitration, stronger architectural governance and better readability of solution impacts. WORKING CONDITION
   

  





 • Build\-to\-Run handovers become more reliable, with clear documentation, supportability requirements and operational readiness checks.
   

  





 • Location: Bangalore, India. This is an office\-first role; remote work is permitted only on an occasional and exceptional basis.
   

  





 • International Exposure: This role involves frequent collaboration with European time zones and global teams, requiring flexibility and strong cross\-cultural communication skills.
   

  

  

  




**Additional Information**

 • Education: Bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Information Systems, Engineering, Business Administration or a related field.
   

  





 • Experience: Typically, 10\+ years of experience in enterprise applications, including at least 5 years in solution architecture, integration architecture or senior ERP/HCM architecture roles.
   

  





 • Preferred background: consulting, system integration, large international IT organization, global ERP transformation program or complex SaaS ecosystem management.
   

  





 • Preferred certifications: Oracle Cloud certifications, TOGAF or equivalent architecture certification, ITIL Foundation or higher.

69d50438.title: Senior Solution Architect
69d50438.description:
**Location:** 
 Kolkata, India
   

  

**Function:** 
 (DEAI HV) Engineering
   

  

**Requisition ID:** 
 R0131139
   

  

**Our Company**
 We're Hitachi Vantara, the data foundation trusted by the world's innovators. Our resilient, high\-performance data infrastructure means that customers \- from banks to theme parks \- can focus on achieving the incredible with data. If you've seen the Las Vegas Sphere, you've seen just one example of how we empower businesses to automate, optimize, innovate \- and wow their customers. Right now, we're laying the foundation for our next wave of growth. We're looking for people who love being part of a diverse, global team \- and who get excited about making a real\-world impact with data.
   

  

**The Team**
 The Hitachi Vantara Solutions Architecture and Engineering team is seeking a
 **Senior Solution Architect** 
 with deep expertise in
 **container platforms, Red Hat OpenShift, virtualization, and automation** 
 to drive modern infrastructure architectures across enterprise environments.
   

  

**The Role**
 In this role, you will define and deliver
 **cloud\-native, containerized, and hybrid infrastructure solutions** 
 built on Hitachi’s Integrated Platforms—leveraging
 **OpenShift, Kubernetes, virtualization technologies, and advanced automation frameworks like Ansible and MCP** 
 .
   

  

 You will work at the intersection of
 **platform engineering, DevOps, and infrastructure modernization** 
 , helping customers transition from traditional data centers to
 **automated, scalable, and resilient cloud\-native ecosystems** 
 .
   

  

**What You’ll Do**
**Architecture \& Platform Engineering**
* Design and deliver cloud\-native architectures leveraging Red Hat OpenShift, Kubernetes, and container ecosystems
* Architect hybrid cloud platforms integrating virtualization (Red Hat Virtualization, KVM, VMware) with containerized workloads
* Develop reference architectures and validated designs for enterprise\-scale deployments


**Automation \& Infrastructure as Code**
* Lead automation initiatives using Ansible, MCP (Model Context Protocol), and IaC frameworks
* Build reusable, scalable automation pipelines for provisioning, configuration, and lifecycle management
* Drive GitOps and DevOps practices across infrastructure and platform layers


**Solution Development \& Validation**
* Design, implement, and validate integrated solutions on Hitachi Unified/Integrated Platforms
* Create test plans, performance benchmarks, and validation reports for containerized and virtualized environments
* Ensure solutions meet enterprise requirements for high availability, resilience, and scalability


**Container \& OpenShift Leadership**
* Act as a subject matter expert for OpenShift and Kubernetes platforms
* Define best practices for container lifecycle management, security, observability, and multi\-cluster operations
* Enable customers to modernize applications using microservices and container\-first strategies


**Collaboration \& Thought Leadership**
* Partner with engineering, product, and field teams to influence roadmap and innovation
* Deliver technical presentations, whitepapers, and executive briefings
* Engage with customers and partners as a trusted advisor to drive transformation initiatives


**What You Bring**
**Core Technical Expertise**
* Deep experience with Red Hat OpenShift, Kubernetes, and container ecosystems
* Strong background in virtualization technologies (Red Hat Virtualization, KVM, Hyper\-V, VMware)
* Proven experience designing hybrid cloud and modern data center platforms
* Hands\-on expertise with Ansible automation and Infrastructure as Code frameworks
* Familiarity with MCP (Model Context Protocol) or modern automation/orchestration paradigms


**Infrastructure \& Platform Knowledge**
* Solid understanding of compute, storage, and networking across enterprise environments
* Experience with software\-defined infrastructure and hyperconverged platforms
* Strong knowledge of storage protocols (NFS, SAN, etc.) and networking fundamentals (TCP/IP, etc.)
* Hitachi storage experience is a plus
* Experience with GPU\-enabled systems and modern hardware platforms is a plus


**Cloud \& DevOps**
* Experience with public cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) and hybrid integrations
* Strong understanding of DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, GitOps, and platform engineering principles


**Automation \& Scripting**
* Hands\-on experience in Python, shell scripting, and automation frameworks
* Exposure to tools like Terraform, Jenkins, or equivalent CI/CD technologies


**What Sets You Apart**
* Passion for cloud\-native transformation and platform innovation
* Ability to simplify complex systems into scalable, automated architectures
* Strong problem\-solving mindset with the ability to operate at enterprise scale and ambiguity
* Exceptional communication skills with experience influencing senior technical and executive stakeholders


**Why Join Us?**
* Work on cutting\-edge container and hybrid cloud platforms at global scale
* Collaborate with top industry talent and Fortune 100 customers
* Drive innovation across OpenShift, automation, and next\-gen infrastructure
* Be part of a culture that values learning, ownership, and impact


**Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or equivalent experience
* Extensive hands\-on experience in enterprise infrastructure, containers, and automation


**About Us**
 We're a global team of innovators. Together, we harness engineering excellence and passion for insight to co\-create meaningful solutions to complex challenges. We turn organizations into data\-driven leaders that can make a positive impact on their industries and society. If you believe that innovation can inspire the future, this is the place to fulfil your purpose and achieve your potential.
   

  

**Fostering innovation through diverse perspectives**
 Hitachi is a global company operating across a wide range of industries and regions. One of the things that sets Hitachi apart is the diversity of our business and people, which drives our innovation and growth.
   

  

 We are committed to building an inclusive culture based on mutual respect and merit\-based systems. We believe that when people feel valued, heard, and safe to express themselves, they do their best work.
   

  

**How We Look After You**
 We help take care of your today and tomorrow with industry\-leading benefits, support, and services that look after your holistic health and wellbeing. We're also champions of life balance and offer flexible arrangements that work for you (role and location dependent). We're always looking for new ways of working that bring out our best, which leads to unexpected ideas. So here, you'll experience a sense of belonging, and discover autonomy, freedom, and ownership as you work alongside talented people you enjoy sharing knowledge with.
   

  

 We're proud to say we're an equal opportunity employer and welcome all applicants for employment without attention to race, colour, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, veteran, age, disability status or any other protected characteristic. Should you need reasonable accommodations during the recruitment process, please let us know so that we can do our best to set you up for success.

7791affb.title: Enterprise Architect
7791affb.description:
We are seeking an experienced
 **Senior Corporate Technology Architect** 
 with a primary focus on
 **Finance and HR business domains to drive technology and process architecture strategy** 
 across the enterprise.
 **This role is central to advancing Oracle Fusion ERP and Workday implementations, modernizing data warehousing capabilities, and governing responsible AI adoption.** 
 The Architect will serve as a trusted advisor to business and technology leaders, development teams, and enterprise governance bodies, bridging strategy and delivery across a complex and evolving technology landscape.
 



 A key aspect of this role is active participation in
 **AmpliFi** 
 , a multi\-year enterprise transformation program focused on modernizing OCFO financial business processes and systems through the implementation of Oracle Fusion ERP and the sunsetting of PeopleSoft. The Architect will play an important role in shaping the architectural direction of this program, ensuring alignment with enterprise standards, and enabling successful delivery across its full lifecycle.
 



**Key Responsibilities** 




 The Corporate Technology Architect will develop and maintain current and target state architectures and roadmaps, with particular depth in
 **Oracle Fusion ERP and Workday** 
 as the anchor platforms for Finance and HR. This includes portfolio analysis of the application inventory to rationalize platforms, reduce redundancy, and align investments with business strategy. Within the context of AmpliFi, the Architect will provide ongoing architectural guidance to support the transition from PeopleSoft to Oracle Fusion, helping to define integration patterns, data migration approaches, and decommissioning strategies that minimize risk and support business continuity.
 



 A significant focus will be placed on data warehousing and data platform architecture, encompassing data lakehouse design, data mesh concepts, and metadata management to enable trusted, analytics\-ready data across supported domains. The Architect will also govern
 **AI and Generative AI use case** 
 s for feasibility, and policy adherence, collaborating closely with the AI Center of Excellence and vendors to align domain initiatives with enterprise AI strategy while proactively identifying and mitigating risks.
 



 A critical responsibility is preparing and enabling development teams to meet Technical Architecture Group requirements, guiding teams through architecture review processes, ensuring solution designs are well\-documented and defensible, and reducing rework stemming from governance gaps. The Architect will work with leads in technology evaluations, engage vendors on roadmap alignment, and develop well\-reasoned recommendations for technology and business leadership.
 



**This role will also research on new Orchestration tools, COTS software and aligning them with cybersecurity policies relevant to Finance and HR, translating requirements into practical architectural guidance and ensuring security controls and risk mitigations are embedded into solution designs from the outset.** 
 The Architect will present roadmaps and recommendations to the Technical Architecture Group, champion build versus buy strategies, and represent Finance and HR domains in enterprise architecture forums.
 



**Required Qualifications** 




 Candidates must bring deep experience with Oracle Fusion ERP or Workday, meaningful background in Corporate Finance or HR domains, and strong familiarity with data warehousing, data lakehouse, and data mesh architectures. Experience with large\-scale ERP transformation programs, particularly Oracle Fusion implementations and PeopleSoft migrations, is highly desirable given the scope and significance of the AmpliFi program. Practical knowledge of AI and Generative AI frameworks including RAG\-based implementations is expected, along with broad proficiency across AWS, OCI, and Azure cloud platforms, enterprise security frameworks, and integration patterns.
 



 Experience navigating architecture review boards, working with AI COE and vendor partners, and using APM tools such as Ardoq is highly valued. Strong communication, leadership, and influencing skills are essential, as this role drives outcomes across a broad set of stakeholders without direct authority. Financial Services or Insurance industry experience is preferred but not required.

f2e48b4f.title: SeniorAnaplan consultant/ Solution Architect
f2e48b4f.description:
**Senior Anaplan Consultant / Solution Architect**

About Us:

Atlas Systems Inc. is a Software Solutions company headquartered in East Brunswick, NJ. Incorporated in 2003, Atlas provides comprehensive range of solutions in the area of GRC, Technology, Procurement, Healthcare Provider and Oracle to customers across the globe. Combining our unparalleled experience of over a decade in the software industry and global reach, we have grown with extensive capabilities across industry verticals.

For more information, please visit our website https://www.atlassystems.com/

Please click on the link below to apply for this position:

https://atlas.bamboohr.com/careers/596

Position Summary

We are seeking an experienced Anaplan Consultant / Solution Architect to partner with business stakeholders and deliver enterprise Connected Planning solutions across Finance, Supply Chain, Sales, Workforce Planning, and Operations.

The ideal candidate combines strong consulting skills with deep Anaplan technical expertise. This role requires engaging with business users to understand planning challenges, define future\-state solutions, assess existing planning platforms, lead migration initiatives, build scalable Anaplan models, and provide executive\-level reporting and analytics.

You will work closely with business leaders, IT teams, data architects, and project managers to deliver high\-quality planning solutions that improve business decision\-making and operational efficiency.

Senior Anaplan Consultant / Solution Architect

Location: Bangalore

Employment Type

Full\-Time

Key Responsibilities

Business Consulting \& Stakeholder Engagement

* Engage with business users to understand current planning processes and pain points.
* Conduct discovery workshops, requirement gathering sessions, and solution assessments.
* Translate business requirements into scalable Anaplan solution designs.
* Recommend industry best practices and Connected Planning approaches.
* Act as a trusted advisor throughout the project lifecycle.

Solution Design \& Architecture

* Design scalable Anaplan solution architectures following DISCO and Planual best practices.
* Define model architecture, data hubs, integrations, security, and governance.
* Recommend reusable design patterns and standardized model structures.
* Collaborate with enterprise architects to align with broader technology strategy.

Legacy Assessment \& Migration Planning

* Assess existing planning environments including:
* Microsoft Excel
* SAP BPC
* SAP Analytics Cloud
* Oracle Hyperion
* Oracle EPM
* Workday Adaptive Planning
* IBM Planning Analytics (TM1\)
* Custom Planning Applications
* Prepare migration roadmaps and implementation strategies.
* Define phased migration plans with risk assessments.
* Identify opportunities for process optimization and automation during migration.
* Develop data migration, validation, and reconciliation strategies.

Anaplan Model Development

* Build enterprise\-grade Anaplan models from business requirements.
* Develop:
* Lists
* Modules
* Line Items
* Actions
* Processes
* UX Pages
* Dashboards
* Management Reports
* Data Hubs
* Configure workflow and planning scenarios.
* Implement forecasting, budgeting, scenario planning, allocations, and simulations.
* Optimize model performance and workspace utilization.

Data Integration

* Design and implement integrations with enterprise systems including:
* SAP S/4HANA
* Oracle ERP
* Workday
* Salesforce
* Snowflake
* Azure Data Factory
* Informatica
* MuleSoft
* Boomi
* REST APIs
* Support automated data loads and scheduled integrations.
* Ensure data quality, consistency, and reconciliation.

Reporting \& Analytics

* Develop executive dashboards and management reports.
* Build KPIs, planning metrics, forecasting models, and scenario analysis.
* Create periodic operational, financial, and executive reporting.
* Deliver ad hoc analysis for business leadership.
* Support board\-level reporting requirements.

Testing \& Deployment

* Prepare unit, integration, and user acceptance testing plans.
* Coordinate testing with business stakeholders.
* Support deployment using Application Lifecycle Management (ALM).
* Validate migrated models and production readiness.

Governance \& Documentation

* Maintain technical and functional documentation.
* Establish model governance standards.
* Prepare solution design documents, process flows, and user guides.
* Ensure compliance with enterprise architecture and security standards.

User Enablement

* Conduct user demonstrations and workshops.
* Train business users and model owners.
* Provide hypercare and post\-go\-live support.
* Mentor junior model builders and consultants.

Continuous Improvement

* Identify opportunities to improve planning processes.
* Recommend automation and optimization initiatives.
* Evaluate new Anaplan platform capabilities.
* Drive adoption of Connected Planning across business functions.

Required Qualifications

* Bachelor's degree in Engineering, Computer Science, Information Systems, Finance, Business, or a related discipline.
* 5\+ years of experience implementing enterprise planning solutions.
* 3\+ years of hands\-on Anaplan implementation experience.
* Experience delivering multiple end\-to\-end Anaplan implementations.
* Strong consulting and client\-facing experience.
* Excellent analytical and problem\-solving skills.
* Outstanding communication and stakeholder management abilities.

Technical Skills

Anaplan

* Model Building
* Connected Planning
* Data Hubs
* New UX
* ALM
* Lists
* Modules
* Line Items
* Actions
* Processes
* Formula Optimization
* Model Performance Tuning
* Security
* Workspace Management

Planning Domains

* Financial Planning \& Analysis (FP\&A)
* Budgeting
* Forecasting
* Sales Planning
* Supply Chain Planning
* Workforce Planning
* Demand Planning
* Inventory Planning
* S\&OP
* Scenario Planning

Integration Technologies

* Anaplan Connect
* CloudWorks
* REST APIs
* ETL Platforms
* SAP Integration
* Oracle Integration
* Azure Data Factory
* Boomi
* MuleSoft
* Informatica

Reporting

* Executive Dashboards
* KPI Reporting
* Variance Analysis
* Forecast Reporting
* Operational Reports
* Board Reporting
* Management Information Systems (MIS)

Preferred Qualifications

* Anaplan Certified Model Builder (Level 2\)
* Anaplan Solution Architect Certification
* Master Anaplanner (Preferred)
* Experience with Agile/Scrum methodologies
* Knowledge of ERP and EPM platforms
* Experience in global enterprise implementations

Key Competencies

* Business Consulting
* Solution Design
* Requirements Analysis
* Enterprise Architecture
* Stakeholder Management
* Strategic Thinking
* Process Improvement
* Analytical Problem Solving
* Client Relationship Management
* Communication \& Presentation Skills
* Cross\-functional Collaboration
* Change Management

Success Measures

* Deliver scalable, maintainable, and high\-performing Anaplan models.
* Successfully migrate legacy planning solutions with minimal business disruption.
* Improve planning accuracy, forecasting quality, and reporting efficiency.
* Achieve high user adoption through effective stakeholder engagement and training.
* Deliver projects on time, within scope, and aligned with business objectives.

Pay: ₹2,000,000\.00 \- ₹3,000,000\.00 per year

Benefits:

* Health insurance
* Paid time off
* Provident Fund
* Work from home

Work Location: In person

be53b3f6.title: Enterprise Architect
be53b3f6.description:
**Company Overview**
 Milestone Technologies is a global IT managed services firm that partners with organizations to scale their technology, infrastructure and services to drive specific business outcomes such as digital transformation, innovation, and operational agility. Milestone is focused on building an employee\-first, performance\-based culture and for over 25 years, we have a demonstrated history of supporting category\-defining enterprise clients that are growing ahead of the market. The company specializes in providing solutions across Application Services and Consulting, Digital Product Engineering, Digital Workplace Services, Private Cloud Services, AI/Automation, and ServiceNow. Milestone culture is built to provide a collaborative, inclusive environment that supports employees and empowers them to reach their full potential.
   

  

 Our seasoned professionals deliver services based on Milestone’s best practices and service delivery framework. By leveraging our vast knowledge base to execute initiatives, we deliver both short\-term and long\-term value to our clients and apply continuous service improvement to deliver transformational benefits to IT. With Intelligent Automation, Milestone helps businesses further accelerate their IT transformation. The result is a sharper focus on business objectives and a dramatic improvement in employee productivity. Through our key technology partnerships and our people\-first approach, Milestone continues to deliver industry\-leading innovation to our clients. With more than 3,000 employees serving over 200 companies worldwide, we are following our mission of revolutionizing the way IT is deployed.
   

  

**Job Overview**
**Job Overview**
 We’re hiring an Enterprise Architect to define and govern the technical blueprint for an AI\-first, data\-centric platform. The role spans target architecture, reference patterns, and guardrails across orchestration, knowledge systems, retrieval pipelines, security, and operations. You’ll partner with product, security, data, and engineering leads to translate business outcomes into resilient, scalable designs\-then guide teams to deliver them with measurable quality, cost, and reliability.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Target Architecture \& Roadmap: Define the end\-to\-end architecture (experience, orchestration, agents/tools, data/knowledge, security, observability) and a phased roadmap.
* Reference Patterns \& Standards: Establish patterns for multi\-agent orchestration, connector/adapter design, model routing, policy\-as\-code, and evaluation/observability; produce reference implementations.
* Knowledge \& Retrieval: Architect the coexistence of knowledge graph reasoning and retrieval (RAG) baselines; select graph/embedding stores, query patterns, and caching strategies.
* Integration \& Platform Services: Define typed interfaces and contracts for AI engines, vector/graph stores, SQL/warehouse, and external tools; standardize retries, idempotency, and failure isolation.
* Security \& Governance: Embed SSO/IDP, secret management, entitlement models (role/row/column), data minimization, auditability, and red\-team controls into the design.
* Evaluation \& SLOs: Institutionalize quality gates (faithfulness/correctness, precision/recall, latency), automated re\-evaluation on change, and service SLOs with error budgets.
* Operability: Drive choices for tracing/logging/metrics, incident response, capacity planning, and cost/performance budgets; ensure CI/CD, IaC, and environment promotion gates.
* Technical Leadership: Review designs/PRs, mentor leads, resolve cross\-team trade\-offs, and communicate architecture decisions to technical and non\-technical stakeholders.


**Required Skills**
* Architecture Mastery: 3\-5\+ years designing distributed systems or platforms (microservices, event\-driven, API\-first) on cloud environments.
* AI/LLM Platform Patterns: Practical experience with multi\-agent orchestration, model/embedding selection, RAG pipelines, and knowledge graph solutions.
* Data \& Knowledge Stores: Hands\-on with one or more: graph DBs (RDF/SPARQL or property graph/Gremlin), vector DBs (pgvector, Milvus, Pinecone, Weaviate), SQL/warehouse.
* Security\-by\-Design: SSO/OAuth/OIDC, secrets management, least\-privilege design, policy\-as\-code, audit logging, and data privacy controls.
* Interfaces \& Contracts: Strong API design (REST/gRPC), typed schemas (OpenAPI/JSON Schema), error taxonomies, idempotency, and backoff strategies.
* Observability \& Reliability: OpenTelemetry (traces/metrics/logs), call graphs, SLOs/error budgets, resiliency patterns (circuit breakers, bulkheads, retries, backpressure).
* DevOps \& Delivery: IaC (Terraform/CloudFormation), CI/CD, artifact/version management, environment promotion and change control.
* Communication \& Leadership: Clear decision records, stakeholder alignment, and the ability to mentor senior engineers and influence across teams.


**Good To Have Skills**
* Graph \& Query Expertise: SPARQL, SHACL, Gremlin/PGQL; ontology/taxonomy stewardship and data lineage/provenance.
* Evaluation Tooling: Experience with LLM evaluation harnesses (e.g., custom scoring frameworks, judge models, A/B test rigs), regression dashboards, and automated re\-eval pipelines.
* Model \& Tooling Ecosystem: Familiarity with OpenAI, open\-weights (Llama/Mistral), and connector protocols (e.g., MCP\-style adapters).
* Runtime \& Infra: Service mesh (Istio/Linkerd), API gateways, Kafka/event streaming, feature flags, multi\-tenancy, and cost governance for model/runtime spend.
* Security \& Compliance: Exposure to SOC 2/ISO 27001 (or comparable) practices; prompt\-injection mitigation and data\-exfiltration controls for LLMs.
* Languages \& Stacks: Proficiency in one or more: Python, TypeScript/Node.js; comfortable reading/writing infra and application code to produce reference blueprints.
* UX \& HITL Patterns: Designing clear approval flows and rationale/explanation UX for human\-in\-the\-loop actions.


 This role is ideal for a hands\-on architect who can set a clear architectural runway, codify patterns, and steer multiple teams toward secure, explainable, and cost\-effective AI capabilities at enterprise scale.
   

  

**Compensation**
 Estimated Pay Range:
   

  

 Exact compensation and offers of employment are dependent on circumstances of each case and will be determined based on job\-related knowledge, skills, experience, licenses or certifications, and location.
   

  

****Our Commitment to Diversity \& Inclusion****
 At Milestone we strive to create a workplace that reflects the communities we serve and work with, where we all feel empowered to bring our full, authentic selves to work. We know creating a diverse and inclusive culture that champions equity and belonging is not only the right thing to do for our employees but is also critical to our continued success.
   

  

 Milestone Technologies provides equal employment opportunity for all applicants and employees. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment and will not be discriminated against on the basis of race, color, religion, gender, gender identity, marital status, age, disability, veteran status, sexual orientation, national origin, or any other category protected by applicable federal and state law, or local ordinance. Milestone also makes reasonable accommodations for disabled applicants and employees.
   

  

 We welcome the unique background, culture, experiences, knowledge, innovation, self\-expression and perspectives you can bring to our global community. Our recruitment team is looking forward to meeting you.
   

  

  

**\*\*\*Notice to Job Seekers Regarding Impersonation and Fraudulent Job Offers\*\*\***
 It has come to our attention that unauthorized individuals and entities are impersonating Milestone Technologies, Inc. on various job boards/portals,
 **specifically Naukri.com and Linkedin.com**
**Please be advised of the following official Milestone Technologies recruitment policies:**
**Official Communication Channels**
 All legitimate email communications from our recruitment team will originate ONLY from the domains:
 **@milestone.tech.** 
 We do not use generic email services (e.g. @gmail.com, @yahoo.com, @outlook.com) or unofficial third party messaging apps to conduct formal business.
   

  

**No Recruitment Fees**
 Milestone Technologies never requests any form of payment, "security deposit", "laptop/equipment fee", or "processing fee" at any stage of the recruitment or onboarding process. Any request for money in exchange for an interview or job offer is a scam.

a74e04bb.title: Cloud System Engineer
a74e04bb.description:
**Job Purpose**
 Cloud System Engineer will function as a core infrastructure specialist within cloud engineering, integrating compute, storage, virtualization and Backup into multi\-tenant cloud platforms, while enabling automation, orchestration, and service delivery via IaaS frameworks.
   

  

**Roles \& Responsibilities**
* Deploy, configure, and manage enterprise\-grade servers (Dell, HPE, Supermicro GPU/CPU platforms)
* Perform OS provisioning (Linux/Windows) and lifecycle management
* Monitor system performance and optimize CPU, memory, and IO utilization
* Implement firmware upgrades, patching, and hardware health monitoring
* Support workload sizing and capacity planning for cloud tenants
* Manage and administer storage platforms (Block, File, Object – e.g., PowerScale, SAN/NAS, SDS)
* Configure storage pools, volumes, quotas, and replication policies
* Ensure optimal performance through tiering, caching, and load balancing
* Implement data lifecycle management and storage efficiency (dedupe, compression)
* Monitor storage health, latency, and throughput KPIs
* Deploy and manage hypervisors (VMware, KVM, Hyper\-V)
* Manage VM lifecycle: provisioning, cloning, migration, decommissioning
* Configure HA, DRS, clustering, and resource scheduling
* Optimize hypervisor performance and troubleshoot VM\-related issues
* Support multi\-tenant virtualization environments and cloud orchestration platforms
* Design and manage backup solutions (e.g., Commvault, Veeam)
* Configure backup policies for VMs, databases, file systems, and applications
* Monitor backup jobs, ensure SLA compliance, and troubleshoot failures
* Perform restore operations (file\-level, VM\-level, cross\-platform)
* Implement DR strategies including replication, snapshot management, and failover testing
* Integrate compute, storage, and virtualization into cloud orchestration platforms
* Support IaaS platform provisioning and service catalog enablement
* Automate provisioning using scripts/tools (e.g., Ansible, Terraform )
* Ensure API\-driven integration for cloud service consumption
* Monitor infrastructure using enterprise tools (alerts, logs, dashboards)
* Perform root cause analysis (RCA) for incidents and failures
* Participate in change management and release processes
* Ensure adherence to SLA, uptime, and service availability targets
* Implement hardening (OS, hypervisor, storage access)
* Ensure compliance with enterprise security policies
* Manage access control (RBAC, IAM integration)
* Support audit readiness and regulatory compliance
* Maintain LLDs, HLDs, SOPs, and runbooks
* Prepare reports on capacity, utilization, incidents, and availability
* Contribute to service improvement and optimization initiative


**Experience \& Educational Requirement**
 BE/B\-Tech or equivalent with Computer Science or Electronics \& Communication
   

  

**Relevant Experience**
* Experience: 5–12 years of experience in Data Center / Cloud Infrastructure
* Cloud Infrastructure Expertise: Proven track record in the design, operations, and maintenance of public/private cloud platforms, including service migration from on\-premises to cloud or between enterprise data centers.
* Proficiency with containerization and orchestration technologies (Kubernetes, Docker).
* Private Cloud Technologies: Hands\-on experience with OpenStack, VMware, Nutanix, and Kubernetes\-based private cloud platforms, along with SaaS integration.
* Multi\-Cloud \& Hybrid Cloud: Skilled in design, deployment, and maintenance of hybrid/multi\-cloud architectures with seamless connectivity and governance.
* Cloud Migration \& Consulting: Strong expertise in cloud migration strategy, execution, and advisory consulting for enterprise clients.
* Automation \& DevOps: Proficient in Infrastructure as Code (Terraform, Ansible, etc.), CI/CD pipelines, and automation practices for cloud deployments.


**Preferred Technical Skills**
* Servers: Dell PowerEdge, HPE ProLiant, GPU Servers
* Storage: SAN/NAS/Object, PowerScale, SDS platforms
* Hypervisors: VMware ESXi, KVM, Hyper\-V
* Backup: Commvault / Veeam / enterprise backup tools
* OS: Linux (RHEL/CentOS/Ubuntu), Windows Server
* Networking basics (VLANs, IP, load balancing)
* Cloud platforms (OpenStack / VMware Cloud / Azure Stack type environments)
* Automation (Ansible, Python, PowerShell)
* Container / Kubernetes awareness
* DR orchestration and multi\-site replication
* Strong troubleshooting and analytical ability
* Ability to work in 24x7 support / operations model

**Position** 
 : Delivery Leader (US Healthcare Contact Center)
 



**Experience:** 
 18\+ years
 



**Location**

 : Healthcare BPO
 



  





**About Latinum:** 




 Latinum is seeking an experienced Delivery Leader to lead large\-scale US Healthcare Contact Center Operations. The ideal candidate will have extensive experience managing member and provider services for US healthcare payers, driving operational excellence, client satisfaction, business transformation, and financial performance. This role requires a strategic leader capable of managing complex delivery environments while leading digital transformation and business growth initiatives.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Lead and manage large\-scale US Healthcare Contact Center operations supporting 200–400\+ FTEs.
* Oversee operations across Member Services, Provider Services, Eligibility, Enrollment, Claims Support, and related healthcare processes.
* Ensure achievement of operational KPIs, SLAs, quality, compliance, customer satisfaction, and productivity targets.
* Establish strong governance frameworks and drive delivery excellence across multiple business functions.
* Act as the primary point of contact for senior client stakeholders, ensuring alignment with business objectives and delivery expectations.
* Support business growth by contributing to solutioning, operating model design, pricing discussions, and client pursuits.
* Identify operational risks and implement mitigation strategies to ensure uninterrupted service delivery.
* Lead transformation initiatives leveraging Automation, AI, Analytics, and Digital technologies to improve operational efficiency.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives using Lean Six Sigma methodologies.
* Own operational budgets, workforce planning, forecasting, productivity, and cost optimization.
* Develop leadership capability by mentoring Managers and Senior Managers while fostering a high\-performance culture.
* Drive employee engagement, talent development, and retention across the organization.



  





**Required Skills \& Experience** 



* 18\+ years of experience in US Healthcare Operations, with a significant focus on Contact Center delivery.
* Minimum 10\+ years of leadership experience managing large healthcare contact center teams.
* Strong expertise in US Healthcare Member Services (mandatory) along with Provider Services.
* Experience managing healthcare operations including:
* Member Services
* Provider Services
* Claims Support
* Eligibility
* Enrollment
* Proven experience leading large teams and managing end\-to\-end service delivery.
* Strong understanding of operational governance, SLA management, quality, compliance, workforce management, and customer experience.
* Experience managing operational budgets, productivity, cost optimization, and financial performance.
* Strong stakeholder management and executive\-level communication skills.
* Demonstrated experience leading transformation initiatives involving Automation, AI, Analytics, and Digital technologies.
* Ability to lead business expansion initiatives, solutioning, and strategic client engagements.



  





**Preferred Skills** 



* Hands\-on experience with US Healthcare payer platforms such as Facets, QNXT, PEGA, WGS, and payer portals.
* Lean Six Sigma Green Belt or Black Belt certification.
* Experience in operational excellence and continuous improvement programs.
* Exposure to AI\-enabled workflows, analytics\-driven operations, and digital transformation initiatives.
* Experience supporting business development, deal pursuits, and solution design.



  





**Educational Qualification** 



* Bachelor's degree required.
* Master's degree (MBA or equivalent) preferred.
* Healthcare industry certifications will be an added advantage.



  





**Ideal Candidate Profile** 



* Strategic and customer\-focused leader with strong business acumen.
* Proven ability to lead large, complex healthcare delivery organizations.
* Strong problem\-solving, decision\-making, and change management capabilities.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills.
* High ownership, accountability, and ability to thrive in dynamic business environments.
* Experience contributing to new business pursuits, solutioning, and operational transformation.



  





  





 Interested candidates can share their profiles to prajwal@latinumhr.com and job@ats.latinumhr.com
