 Job ID: A10402885

ad67ce88.title: Sr. Technical Program Manager, Customer Experience and AI, Amazon Now (Project Tez)
ad67ce88.description:
**Description**
 Amazon Now is Amazon's quick commerce business, one of its largest and fastest growing, running 8\+ marketplaces and handling 700k\+ orders a day scaling to 2MM by year end. Amazon NOW CX is the customer experience org behind it. We are looking for a Sr. Technical Program Manager to own the customer experience end to end and build AI as a worldwide platform for Quick Commerce.
   

  

 This role owns the journey from storefront through checkout and into delivery, returns, and lifecycle, and on top of it drives the three largest bets in the org: AI as a platform capability built once and run everywhere, customer service as a first class product experience, and the growth of what the store sells through product and selection discovery expansion. The north star is surfaceless shopping where customers shop by intent and the platform does the rest.
   

  

 Key job responsibilities
   

  

* Own the AI platform roadmap for Quick Commerce, from foundations (context, evaluation, guardrails) through customer facing capabilities (discovery, basket building, AI assisted support), targeting less than 3 seconds from intent to basket and 80% self served support.
* Stand up customer service as a managed tech and product program, driving contacts per order from 5% toward below 0\.1%, a direct lever on profitability at 2MM orders a day.
* Drive multi region stores with overlapping catchments and selection growth across categories.
* Own the cross surface programs from storefront and merchandising through personalization, cart, and checkout that turn a visit into an order.
* Own the delivery promise, tracking, post order, returns, and refunds experience.
* Own notification and lifecycle programs including LiveKit, a worldwide real time platform Tez CX operates for all of Amazon.
* Own deals, offers, and savings programs that shape what a customer pays.
* Run weekly roadmap reviews with engineering counterparts, bi monthly roadmap planning cycles, AI syncs and workshops, and ML coordination.


 A day in the life
   

  

 You start the day reviewing AI experiment results and customer metrics across marketplaces. Mornings are spent in roadmap reviews with SDMs and principal engineers, aligning technical design with what reaches the customer. You run AI workshops where teams demo new capabilities and decide what ships next. Afternoons shift to customer service program reviews, tracking CPO trends and unblocking self service launches. You coordinate across shopping, post order, and growth teams to ensure each surface ships as one experience. You represent the customer experience in leadership forums where the org's biggest bets are reviewed. Your internal stakeholders are engineering managers, principal engineers, product managers, and org leadership. Your customers are the hundreds of thousands of shoppers who use Amazon Now every day across 8\+ marketplaces.
   

  

**About The Team**
 Tez CX is the customer experience org for Amazon Now, Amazon's quick commerce business. We build and operate the full shopping journey across 8\+ marketplaces including India, MENA, North America, EU, UK, and Japan. We run Tier 1 services at thousands of transactions per second. Some of what we build has become canonical worldwide platforms the rest of Amazon runs on, LiveKit and our proprietary design system among them. We are at an inflection point, building AI as a platform capability, standing up customer service as a designed experience, and growing what the store sells, each cutting across across and beyond customer facing surfaces.
   

  

**Basic Qualifications**
* 3\+ years of software development experience
* 5\+ years of technical program management working directly with software engineering teams experience
* Experience managing programs across cross functional teams, building processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience with software development lifecycle and Agile methodologies
* Understanding of AI and ML concepts, model lifecycle, and how AI systems are built and evaluated


**Preferred Qualifications**
* 5\+ years of project management disciplines including scope, schedule, budget, quality, along with risk and critical path management experience
* Experience managing projects across cross functional teams, building sustainable processes and coordinating release schedules
* Experience defining KPI's/SLA's used to drive multi\-million dollar businesses and reporting to senior leadership
* Experience in a high volume, transactional and distributed system environment
* Experience building or operating AI/ML platforms or AI powered customer experiences
* Experience launching products across multiple countries or regions simultaneously


 Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.
   

  

  

**Company** 
 \- ADCI \- Karnataka
   

  

 Job ID: A10462037

83c470f5.title: Delivery Manager
83c470f5.description:
**WHO WE WANT?** 




 Someone who has personally felt the pain of a delivery that went sideways — missed milestones nobody saw coming, a team shipping features the client never asked for, a war room at 11pm because the go\-live was tomorrow. Someone who has carried accountability when things went wrong, and knows exactly what it costs when delivery breaks down.
 



  





**WHERE DO YOU COME FROM?** 




 IIT / NIT / BITS grad, class of 2010 or later. 8–14 years across delivery, engineering, and client engagement — with genuine hands\-on software delivery depth. You have owned a programme end\-to\-end: staffed it, scoped it, de\-risked it, and stood in front of the client when it shipped. Not a coordinator. Not a status reporter. Someone who has made hard calls under pressure and lived with the outcome.
 



  





**WHERE DO WE LOOK?** 




 Companies that build and ship — not just bill:
 



 ThoughtWorks, EPAM, GlobalLogic, Publicis Sapient, Freshworks, Postman, Chargebee, Razorpay, BrowserStack, LambdaTest — or high\-growth startups where delivery discipline was survival, not process.
 



  





**WHERE SHOULD WE NOT GO?** 




 TCS, Infosys, Wipro, HCL delivery towers, Cigniti — anywhere that mistakes a PMO dashboard for delivery, or confuses activity with outcomes.
 



  





**WHAT KIND OF PERSON?** 




 Obsessively accountable. Knows that delivery is not a function — it is a culture. Has held a team together when scope exploded and timelines collapsed. Understands that AI is reshaping how software gets built — companies like Anthropic, Cursor, Windsurf, Sarvam AI, and Krutrim are compressing what used to take quarters into weeks. Wants to be the person who makes that velocity real for clients. Do not wait for clarity. Creates it.
 



  





**HOW TO PITCH THIS ROLE** 




**What is this role, really?** 




 Nomiso builds AI\-powered products and delivers complex digital transformation programmes for enterprise clients. The Delivery Manager is the person who holds the entire execution together — the bridge between the promise made in the sales room and the value realized in production. This is not a co\-ordination role. It is an ownership role. You will staff, plan, de\-risk, and drive — and you will be the person the client calls when something matters.
 



  





**Reporting line** 




 This person reports directly to the VP Customer Success. No layers. No bureaucracy. Just accountability, outcomes, and the authority to act.
 



  





**On compensation** 




 Do not lead with the number. This role is not for someone optimising their CTC. It is for someone who wants to build a reputation on the back of real delivery. The right candidate will ask “what are we solving and what does winning look like?” before they ask what it pays — and when they do ask, tell them: the company rewards people who make things happen, not people who manage reports.
 



  





**The signal to watch for** 




*If the first thing they negotiate is the title, remote days or the package — they’re not the one*

ebf97abc.title: Pre-Sales Engineer-ELV
ebf97abc.description:
**Job Title:** Pre\-sales Engineer – **ELV / ICT / Security Systems**

**Location:** Thiruvananthapuram, Kerala  
**Experience:** 3\-6 Years (ELV / ICT / Security Systems)  
**Employment Type:** Full\-Time  
**Compensation:** Attractive package based on experience, certifications, and technical proficiency.

**About Ital Solutions Private Limited**

Ital Solutions Pvt. Ltd. is a leading system integrator specializing in **Audio Visual (AV), Extra\-Low Voltage (ELV), CCTV, ICT, and IT Infrastructure** solutions.  
We collaborate with **global technology leaders** to design and deliver **reliable, intelligent, and future\-ready** systems that help organizations **connect, collaborate, and secure** their operations.

With over a decade of success and a rapidly expanding portfolio across **corporate, institutional, and government sectors**, Ital Solutions is committed to **engineering excellence, innovation, and customer satisfaction**.

We are now looking for an **experienced and technically strong Presales Engineer ELV** who can bridge client needs and technical design to deliver **strategic, value\-driven solutions** across ELV and ICT domains.

**Role Overview**

The **Presales Engineer – ELV / ICT / Security Systems** will be responsible for **solution design, estimation, and proposal development** for integrated low\-voltage systems.  
You will collaborate with **clients, consultants, OEMs, and internal teams** to deliver technically sound and commercially competitive proposals that align with project requirements and industry standards.

This role demands a **solution\-oriented professional** who combines **technical expertise, analytical thinking, and commercial awareness** to ensure every bid and proposal reflects engineering precision and business competitiveness.

**Key Responsibilities Solution Design \& Estimation**

* Analyze tender documents, drawings, and project scopes to prepare **accurate BOQs, system designs, and technical proposals**.
* Design integrated solutions across **CCTV, Access Control, Public Address, Fire Alarm, Intercom, SMATV/IPTV, and Structured Cabling** systems.
* Recommend **value\-engineered alternatives** that improve cost efficiency and technical performance.
* Validate designs and ensure **technical compliance** with consultant and client specifications.

**Proposal \& Documentation**

* Prepare detailed **technical proposals, compliance statements, and cost sheets**.
* Maintain **up\-to\-date system drawings, schematics, and version\-controlled documentation**.
* Collaborate with project and procurement teams for accurate equipment selection and pricing.
* Ensure **proposal quality, accuracy, and timely submission** for all tenders and bids.

**Client, Consultant \& Vendor Coordination**

* Attend **client meetings, technical discussions, and consultant presentations** to explain proposed solutions confidently.
* Coordinate with **OEMs and distributors** for product specifications, technical clarifications, and quotations.
* Support the sales team with **pre\-bid queries, product demonstrations, and competitive positioning**.

**Post\-Award Technical Support**

* Provide **handover documentation and technical clarifications** to project execution teams post\-award.
* Assist with **design updates, material finalization, and integration planning** during the implementation phase.

**Innovation \& Knowledge Development**

* Keep abreast of **emerging technologies, standards, and integration trends** in ELV, ICT, and security systems.
* Contribute to the development of **standard design templates, product libraries, and internal technical documentation**.
* Share insights with management to support **continuous improvement and knowledge sharing** across teams.

**Required Skills \& Qualifications**

* **Bachelor’s or Diploma** in Electronics, Electrical, Communication, or related Engineering disciplines.
* **3\-6 years** of hands\-on experience in **Presales / Design / Estimation** within ELV, ICT, or Security Systems (India or GCC experience preferred).
* Strong technical proficiency in:
* **CCTV, Access Control, Public Address, Intercom, Fire Alarm, SMATV/IPTV, Structured Cabling, and Networking.**
* Skilled in **BOQ preparation, system schematics, and cost estimation** using industry\-standard tools.
* Proficient in **AutoCAD, MS Excel, and CRM/ERP platforms.**
* Excellent communication, presentation, and documentation skills.
* Strong analytical mindset and ability to **balance technical precision with commercial strategy.**

**Preferred Certifications (Added Advantage)**

* **CCNA / CompTIA Network\+ / EC\-Council** or equivalent networking certifications.
* **Vendor certifications** (Hikvision, Bosch, Honeywell, Axis, Dahua, Extron, Crestron, etc.).
* Familiarity with **tendering processes, BOQ compliance, and international standards** (TIA/EIA, IEEE, ONVIF).
* Manufacturer or partner training in **security or AV system integration**.

**Why Join Ital Solutions?**

* Opportunity to design and deliver **high\-impact, enterprise\-grade ELV \& ICT solutions**.
* Work with **top\-tier global technology brands and large\-scale clients**.
* A collaborative, engineering\-driven culture focused on **innovation and performance excellence**.
* **Attractive compensation**, incentive programs, and **career progression** to Senior Presales or Design Engineering roles.
* Access to **continuous technical training, OEM certifications, and learning platforms.**

**How to Apply**

If you’re passionate about **technology, system design, and creating impactful solutions**, we’d love to hear from you!

* Send your updated CV and a brief cover letter to: **hr@ital.in**

**Subject Line:** *Application for Presales Engineer – ELV / ICT / Security Systems*

Benefits:

* Cell phone reimbursement

Work Location: In person

 Westernacher is a diverse work environment and is proud to be an equal\-opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status. Westernacher is also committed to compliance with all fair employment practices regarding citizenship and immigration status.
   

  

 Life@Westernacher

These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. c12c5201.title: Lead Software Engineer - Salesforce Service Cloud
c12c5201.description:
*EPAM is a leading global provider of digital platform engineering and development services. We are committed to having a positive impact on our customers, our employees, and our communities. We embrace a dynamic and inclusive culture. Here you will collaborate with multi\-national teams, contribute to a myriad of innovative projects that deliver the most creative and cutting\-edge solutions, and have an opportunity to continuously learn and grow. No matter where you are located, you will join a dedicated, creative, and diverse community that will help you discover your fullest potential.*


We are looking for a **Lead Salesforce Service Cloud Developer** to join our L2 production support team. The role involves deep technical troubleshooting, root cause analysis, and implementing robust fixes for complex Service Cloud issues. The candidate should be comfortable working in CET shift hours and collaborating closely with global stakeholders, AMS teams, and business users.

**Responsibilities**

* Provide L2 support for Salesforce Service Cloud applications in production environments
* Perform advanced troubleshooting of incidents, defects, and performance issues
* Conduct root cause analysis (RCA) and implement permanent fixes
* Handle complex Apex, LWC, and integration\-related issues
* Review and optimize existing Service Cloud customizations and configurations
* Support and enhance Case Management; Queues, Omni\-Channel, and Assignment Rules; Entitlements, SLAs, and Milestones; Email\-to\-Case, CTI, and channel integrations
* Collaborate with functional consultants and business teams
* Participate in deployments, hotfixes, and release validations
* Ensure adherence to Salesforce best practices, performance, and security standards
* Create and maintain technical documentation and RCA reports

**Requirements**

441bd5da.title: Solutions Architect ( Azure Integration and AI Platform)
441bd5da.company: Zymr, Inc. | AI-Native Product Engineering Services
441bd5da.description:
**Job Title** 
 : Senior Solution Architect (Azure Integration \& AI Platforms)
 



**Experience** 
 : 12\+ Years
 



**Location** 
 : Ahmedabad/Pune
 



**Educational Qualification** 
 : B.Tech, B.E, M.E., M. Tech in Computer Science, or other engineering/technical equivalent degree.
 



  





 We are looking for a Senior Solution Architect with deep hands\-on expertise across enterprise Azure platforms and a strong background in supply chain, logistics, and ecommerce domains. You will serve as the bridge between business stakeholders and engineering teams — translating complex business requirements into detailed, actionable architectures and implementation plans at user story level.
 



 You will be central to shaping the evolution of our cloud platform — driving event\-driven integration patterns, enforcing security and compliance posture, optimising for performance and cost, and embedding AI\-assisted development practices across the team. You will also design controlled, governed environments for AI experimentation, lead secure platform uplift and modernisation, evaluate AI agents through compliant pathways, and baseline and uplift the enterprise integration landscape — all under strong AI governance, security and privacy guardrails.
 



  





**Responsibilities** 



* Lead end\-to\-end solution design — ADRs, KDDs, sequence/data\-flow diagrams, ICDs — and facilitate architectural workshops to align stakeholders on scope, approach, and trade\-offs.
* Elicit and refine requirements with business stakeholders; decompose designs into user\-story\-level specs with acceptance criteria, technical constraints, and dependency mappings.
* Design controlled, isolated cloud environments for AI experimentation — network isolation, RBAC, audit logging, cost governance, and gated promotion\-to\-production workflows.
* Lead secure platform uplift and modernisation — assess current\-state architecture, identify risk hotspots, design isolated dev environments, and produce a prioritised remediation roadmap.
* Define LLM\-assisted development guardrails and architect compliant AI agent evaluation pathways with human\-in\-the\-loop controls and measurable production\-readiness criteria (accuracy, hallucination, repeatability).
* Architect and govern event\-driven integrations on Service Bus, Event Grid, and Event Hub (pub/sub, saga, CQRS, outbox); oversee APIM configurations including OAuth2/Entra ID, rate limiting, versioning, and multi\-region topology.
* Architect Function Apps, Logic Apps, and container\-based workloads (AKS, Container Apps); lead AI\-specific risk assessments covering prompt injection, data leakage, excessive agency, and auditability.
* Embed DevSecOps in Azure DevOps CI/CD pipelines; define observability strategies (Application Insights, KQL dashboards, SLIs/SLOs, DLQ handling); own cloud cost posture via FinOps principles; champion AI tooling (GitHub Copilot, Claude, Cursor, Azure AI Foundry).



**Requirements** 



* 5\+ years of hands\-on
 **Azure** 
 solution architecture —
 **APIM** 
 ,
 **Service Bus, Function Apps** 
 , Event
 **Grid/Hub, and Logic Apps,** 
 and containerization using
 **AKS** 
 / ACA — in an enterprise context.
* Experience designing isolated cloud environments with network isolation, tenant segregation,
 **RBAC** 
 /MFA, audit logging, and Production data separation.
* Strong hands\-on experience in
 **.NET / C\#** 
 development.
* Hands\-on
 **AI/LLM** 
 governance — prompt injection, data leakage, hallucination, insecure output handling, and human\-in\-the\-loop oversight.
* Azure Monitor proficiency — Application Insights, KQL, workbooks, production alert design; containerisation experience with Docker, AKS, and/or Azure Container Apps.
* Working knowledge of Azure Entra ID (OAuth2, OIDC, Managed Identities, Conditional Access) and Azure networking (VNets, Private Endpoints, App Gateway, Front Door).
* Proven event\-driven architecture at scale (pub/sub, saga, CQRS, outbox); ability to produce artefacts from capability diagrams to user\-story breakdowns; ecommerce/ERP integration experience (order management, catalogue, fulfilment).
* RAG/AI agent solution design including vector databases and staged evaluation criteria; active use of multiple AI dev tools (GitHub Copilot, Claude, Cursor, Azure AI Foundry); strong written and verbal communication for technical and business audiences.
* **Supply** 
**chain** 
 ,
 **e\-commerce** 
 , and
 **logistics domain** 
 expertise — EDI, integration patterns, master data flows, and distribution/wholesale operational constraints.



**Nice to Have** 



* WMS integration (inbound/outbound flows, inventory sync, exception handling) and Shopify integration (storefront APIs, Webhooks, ERP/
 **WMS** 
 connectivity).
* **Sage** 
**ERP** 
 integration and decoupling strategies; Microsoft Dynamics 365 F\&O in a supply chain or logistics context.
* **Azure AI Foundry** 
 model deployment — Data Zone vs. Regional Standard deployment types and data residency considerations.
* **MCP** 
 (Model Context Protocol) or AI agent orchestration frameworks (LangGraph, Pydantic AI, AutoGen, OpenAI Agents SDK); n8n or similar workflow automation platforms.
* **OpenTelemetry** 
 and distributed tracing; IDP or golden\-path template library ownership.
* Certifications: AZ\-305 (Azure Solutions Architect Expert), AZ\-204, AZ\-900, or equivalent.

b7ed319e.title: AWS Solution Architect
b7ed319e.description:
We are looking for an experienced
 **AWS Solutions Architect** 
 with expertise in
 **Generative AI and Amazon Bedrock** 
 to design and deliver modern cloud\-native AI solutions for enterprise customers.
 



  





 In this customer\-facing role, you will work closely with business stakeholders, engineering teams, and cloud architects to define solution architectures, lead technical workshops, and implement secure, scalable, and cost\-efficient AI applications on AWS. The ideal candidate combines strong AWS architecture experience with hands\-on expertise in Bedrock, Retrieval\-Augmented Generation (RAG), AI agents, and cloud\-native application design.
 



  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Lead customer discovery sessions, technical workshops, and architecture discussions.
* Design secure, scalable, resilient, and cost\-optimized AWS cloud solutions.
* Architect and implement enterprise Generative AI solutions using Amazon Bedrock and foundation models.
* Guide customers through cloud modernization, application migration, and AI adoption initiatives.
* Prepare High\-Level Designs (HLDs), Low\-Level Designs (LLDs), architecture diagrams, Statements of Work (SOWs), and technical proposals.
* Define best practices for security, scalability, governance, observability, and operational excellence.
* Collaborate with DevOps, FinOps, Data Engineering, AI, and Delivery teams to ensure successful project execution.
* Act as a trusted technical advisor throughout the customer engagement lifecycle.
* Mentor engineering teams on AWS architecture, cloud\-native design patterns, and Generative AI implementation.
* Stay current with emerging AWS services, AI technologies, and industry best practices.



  





**Requirements** 




**Required Skills \& Experience** 



* 8\+ years of experience designing, architecting, and delivering enterprise cloud solutions.
* Minimum 2 years of hands\-on experience with AWS cloud architecture.
* Experience in customer\-facing consulting, professional services, or solution architecture roles.
* Proven ability to design secure, scalable, highly available, and cost\-optimized cloud solutions.
* Experience leading technical discussions, architecture reviews, and customer workshops.
* Strong expertise in designing and implementing solutions using AWS services, including:
* Compute: EC2, Lambda, ECS/Fargate
* Networking: VPC, Route 53, API Gateway
* Storage \& Databases: S3, RDS, DynamoDB
* Integration \& Orchestration: Step Functions, EventBridge
* Security \& Identity: IAM, Secrets Manager, KMS
* Monitoring \& Observability: CloudWatch, AWS X\-Ray



  




* Hands\-on experience designing and implementing Generative AI solutions using AWS services.
* Experience with:
* Amazon Bedrock
* Foundation Models (Claude, Llama, Titan, etc.)
* Prompt Engineering
* Model evaluation and optimization
* Amazon Bedrock Knowledge Bases
* Guardrails for Amazon Bedrock
* Experience building intelligent AI agent solutions, including:
* Agentic workflows and autonomous task execution
* Tool calling and external API integrations
* Memory management and multi\-step reasoning
* Workflow orchestration using AWS services
* Designing scalable, reliable, and low\-latency AI applications
* Experience with:
* Infrastructure as Code (Terraform and/or AWS CloudFormation)
* CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, Jenkins, Azure DevOps, AWS CodePipeline)
* Containerized deployments
* Multi\-region deployments and release strategies
* Strong understanding of:
* Cloud monitoring and observability
* Performance optimization and troubleshooting
* Cost optimization for AWS and Generative AI workloads
* Security best practices, IAM policies, encryption, and API key management
* Governance, compliance, and data privacy for AI applications
* Working knowledge of one or more programming languages:
* Python (Preferred)
* TypeScript
* Java or Node.js
* Experience integrating cloud applications with enterprise platforms and APIs.



  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* AWS Certified Solutions Architect – Professional or Associate.
* AWS Certified AI Practitioner or Machine Learning Specialty (preferred).
* Experience with LangChain, LangGraph, LlamaIndex, CrewAI, or similar AI frameworks.
* Experience deploying production\-grade Generative AI applications on AWS.
* Exposure to MLOps, Kubernetes (EKS), or SageMaker is an advantage.

a4fa5217.title: Solutions Architect - Digital Buildings
a4fa5217.description:
**FPC Digital.**




 At FPC Digital, we are driven by a bold vision: to become a global leader in digitally transforming real estate into secure and sustainable environments that set the digital building standard and benefit both people and our planet.
   

  





 Our mission is clear: to empower the global delivery of intelligent, secure and vendor\-agnostic digital buildings that prioritize human\-centric design, operational effectiveness and sustainability.
   

  





 As an aspiring leader in Digital Building Design, Delivery and Operations, FPC Digital specializes in creating spaces that are not only smart and connected but also environmentally responsible. With a dedicated team operating across the Americas, EMEA, APAC and India, we are shaping a more innovative and sustainable built environment.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

**Overview.**




 We are looking for a Digital Buildings Architect to support the design and delivery of digital building solutions across international projects.
   

  





 This role sits within the Digital Engineering team and focuses on smart building design, systems integration and digital infrastructure. You will work alongside senior architects and engineers to help shape how Independent Data Layers, building systems, networks and cloud platforms are brought together to deliver secure, sustainable and human centric buildings.
   

  





 The ideal candidate will architect integrated solutions across BMS, IoT, analytics, and enterprise platforms while managing engineering teams and ensuring successful project execution from concept through handover.
   

  





  

  





**Key Responsibilities.**




 Support Solution Architecture and Integration Design.
   

  




* Assist senior colleagues in developing digital building architectures covering building systems, networks, cloud platforms and Independent Data Layers.
* Help document integration between systems such as BMS, HVAC, lighting, metering, access control, vertical transport, IoT devices and workplace applications.
* Prepare and maintain technical artefacts including diagrams, data flow maps, interface schedules, device lists and point schedules.
* Contribute to the definition of IP addressing, VLAN structures, device naming and tagging that support scalability, security and analytics.



 Smart Building Requirements, Energy and User Outcomes.
   

  




* Work with senior architects, project managers and client stakeholders to capture and refine smart building requirements, user journeys and use cases.
* Support the design of solutions that improve comfort, wellbeing, maintainability, space utilisation and energy performance, not just connectivity.
* Assist in selecting and specifying sensors, platforms and analytics tools that support optimisation, FDD and reporting against ESG and performance KPIs.



 Cybersecurity and OT Network Support.
   

  




* Help apply secure by design principles to digital building architectures, aligned with client policies and recognised standards.
* Support coordination with client IT and security teams on topics such as segmentation, remote access and monitoring.
* Contribute to OT cyber risk assessments and remediation activities on projects, under guidance from senior team members.



 Delivery Coordination, QA and Technical Support
   

  




* Support the Digital Solutions and MSI teams through the full project lifecycle, from concept and design through construction, commissioning and handover.
* Assist in reviewing contractor and vendor submissions for alignment with the agreed architecture, standards and scope.
* Help develop integration test plans, commissioning scripts and data validation checklists, and support their execution on projects.
* Provide day to day technical support to project managers and site teams, escalating complex issues to senior architects as needed.



 Client, Stakeholder and Partner Engagement
   

  




* Participate in client workshops, design meetings and technical reviews, contributing to discussions and capturing actions and requirements.
* Support the preparation of technical content for proposals, scopes of work, deliverables and client presentations.
* Help coordinate with technology partners and vendors to align solutions, clarify interfaces and resolve design questions.



 Standards, Knowledge Management and Continuous Improvement
   

  




* Use and help refine FPC Digital’s standards, templates and playbooks for MSI, IDL, smart building design and OT cyber.
* Contribute to internal knowledge libraries, lessons learned and case studies from live projects.
* Take part in training sessions, brown bag talks and communities of practice, both as a learner and, over time, as a contributor.



 Team Leadership \& People Management
   

  




* Lead and mentor solution engineers, deployment coordinators, and technical specialists.
* Support resource planning and team allocation across programs.
* Support hiring, training, performance management, and career development.
* Build technical capability within the remote center of excellence.


**Qualifications**

**Education.**



* Preferred: Degree in Engineering, Building Services, Computer Science, IT, or a related technical discipline.
* Equivalent industry experience will be considered.
* Additional training or certifications in any of the following would be beneficial but not essential:
   

  




	+ Controls, BMS or systems integration
	+ Networking fundamentals
	+ Cloud platforms, data engineering or analytics



**Experience.**



* Industry Expertise:
   

  




	+ Bachelor’s degree in Engineering (Electrical, Mechanical, Controls, or related field).
	+ 12–15 years of experience in BMS, smart buildings, or digital infrastructure
	+ Exposure to commercial, workplace, life sciences, mixed use or similar building projects is preferred.
	+ Strong knowledge of: Niagara Framework, BACnet / BACnet SC, Modbus,MQTT,,OPC, Cloud IoT platforms
	+ Experience managing teams
	+ Good to have knowledge of OT cybersecurity frameworks (NIST, IEC 62443\).
* Technical Skills:
	+ Good understanding of at least some key building systems and protocols, for example BMS, HVAC, lighting, metering, access control, BACnet, Modbus, MQTT or REST APIs.
	+ Experience with integration design, data flows or connecting systems through gateways, APIs or middleware is desirable.
	+ Awareness of IP networking concepts (addressing, VLANs, routing, firewalls) and an interest in developing deeper OT networking skills.
	+ Interest or experience in analytics, FDD, dashboards, digital twins or data visualisation is beneficial.
	+ Any exposure to tagging standards or ontologies (for example Haystack, Brick, custom schemas) would be a plus.
* Soft Skills:
* Clear written and verbal communication, able to present technical information in a structured and accessible way.
* Strong analytical and problem solving skills with attention to detail in documentation and design outputs.


**Additional Information**

**Our Culture and Values.**




 At FPC Digital, our values guide everything we do:
   

  





 Integrity: We act with honesty, accountability and a commitment to doing what’s right.
   

  





 Diversity and Inclusion: We celebrate diverse perspectives and foster an inclusive environment where everyone thrives.
   

  





 Collaboration: By working together, we unlock creativity and deliver exceptional results for our clients.
   

  





 Effectiveness: We strive to deliver impactful solutions that maximize value and drive measurable outcomes.
   

  





**Why Join Us?**




 FPC Digital is more than a company, it’s a mission\-driven organization focused on delivering human\-centric, effective and sustainable solutions. We value professional development, continuous learning and work\-life balance.

a2394ca2.title: Solutions Architect
a2394ca2.description:
Solutions Architect

Location: Bangalore, Karnataka Type: Full\-Time / Contract Department: Engineering

About the Role: We are seeking an experienced Solutions Architect to lead the technical

blueprinting of a highly scalable, enterprise\-grade booking and operations platform. You will

own the software architecture, defining business logic and multi\-tenant structures, while

working closely with our DevOps/Cloud Engineering team who will provision the AWS

infrastructure.

Project Overview

The project involves building an integrated, multi\-location platform from the ground up. The system

manages the complete customer journey—from online booking, dynamic pricing, and online

payments, to in\-person digital consent workflows, walk\-in management, and complex reception

operations. The backend relies heavily on modern web stacks (React, Node.js) and is hosted

entirely on AWS.

Key Responsibilities

Architectural Design: Blueprint a "Clean Architecture" that is modular, API\-first, and highly

extensible to support future business expansion (e.g., loyalty programs, international taxation,

and multi\-currency support).

Multi\-Tenant Strategy: Design strict application\-level and database\-level tenant isolation.

Ensure that data from multiple franchise locations never intersects while leveraging shared

infrastructure.

Technical Documentation: Author the comprehensive Technical Design Document (TDD).

Map out database schemas, API structures, internal services, and deployment topologies prior

to development.

Complex Business Logic Translation: Architect scalable state machines for intricate

requirements, including dynamic event\-day pricing grids, 48\-hour cancellation/rescheduling

validation logic, and digital signature workflows with automated S3 PDF generation.

Analytical Decoupling: Design data pipelines that separate high\-volume operational

transactions (OLTP) from historical reporting and stakeholder dashboards (OLAP), ensuring

real\-time queries do not impact booking performance.

Security \& RBAC: Architect a highly granular Role\-Based Access Control (RBAC) matrix that

seamlessly handles permissions for super administrators, multi\-location stakeholders, and

single\-location staff.

Required Qualifications

Experience: 7\+ years in software engineering with at least 3\+ years in a dedicated Solutions

Architect or Principal Engineer role designing B2B/B2C SaaS platforms.

Tech Stack Expertise: Deep architectural knowledge of the MERN stack (MongoDB,

Express, React, Node.js) and modern microservices or modular monolith patterns.

Cloud Architecture: Strong understanding of AWS cloud\-native patterns. Ability to design

architectures that a DevOps team can easily translate into infrastructure (e.g., S3, RDS,

caching layers).

Domain Knowledge: Extensive experience designing true multi\-tenant database architectures

and data isolation strategies.

Deliverables: Demonstrated ability to produce extremely thorough Technical Design

Documents (TDDs), API specifications, and database entity\-relationship models.

Nice to Have

Experience architecting booking systems, ticketing platforms, or complex inventory

management software.

Familiarity with digital consent logic, automated document formatting (PDFs), and payment

gateway integrations.

Previous experience working in an agile environment where architecture and DevOps run as

distinct, highly collaborative tracks.

e12470ca.title: Solutions Engineer I (12 months Contract)
e12470ca.description:
At F5, we strive to bring a better digital world to life. Our teams empower organizations across the globe to create, secure, and run applications that enhance how we experience our evolving digital world. We are passionate about cybersecurity, from protecting consumers from fraud to enabling companies to focus on innovation.
   

  

 Everything we do centers around people. That means we obsess over how to make the lives of our customers, and their customers, better. And it means we prioritize a diverse F5 community where each individual can thrive.
   

  

**About the Company:**
 F5 gives the world’s largest businesses, service providers, governments, and consumer brands the ability to securely deliver every app, anywhere—with confidence. We do this by working collaboratively in an innovative environment, helping each other succeed. We take great pride in being trusted advisers to our customers, offering the best solutions for their interests. If our mission and culture excite you, we would love to talk to you!
   

  

**The SE Job Overview:**
 The Solutions Engineer (SE) is a sales and technical role with focus on customer/partners and is part of the sales organization. The SE’s primary responsibility is to support the sales team with technical skills and provide technical knowledge around F5 solutions to our customers. To be effective, an SE needs to have excellent technical skills and knowledge on both F5 products and the “eco\-system” that we work in. Fear not, we do provide training and certification to keep abreast with these critical skills!
   

  

 The high\-level objective is to achieve the allocated sales target and selling relevant F5 solutions and products to our customers business needs, in partnership with the Sales Account Manager. From our customer(s) perspective, the SE is a trusted adviser who proactively learns and understands their technical and business challenges and is able to propose effective solutions to mitigate their concerns/offer gainful solutions. The F5 SE not only presents the technical features but also business benefits in the Technical Value Proposition.
   

  

 Sounds interesting? Read on!
   

  

**What you’ll do:**
* Articulate the F5 product strategy, messaging and positioning F5’s value proposition and solutions for customer business objectives
* Provide technical expertise through sales presentations, solution designs, solution demonstrations, proof of concepts by various mediums – in\-person/virtual presentations, white boards etc
* Determine viability of opportunity and map out organizational structure.
* Drive the sales process in partnership with the Account Manager, by identifying the Technical Decision Maker, getting their technical validation, support, and sponsorship.
* Consistently provide world\-class customer service through the customer life cycle
* Work collaboratively with internal technical and sales resources, share best practices, updates, offer and seek expertise as the need arises in various opportunities.


**How you’ll do it:**
* Experience in secure Cloud architectures, Security product like WAF, ZTNA, Firewall, SSL VPN, NGINX
* Experience with public/private cloud vendors and automation toolsets, CICD.
* Experience with SaaS vendor and able to articulate SaaS benefits
* Experience with container orchestration solutions (eg: OpenShift, Kubernetes)
* Expert in one or more programming languages like Python, Golang, JavaScript. Linux Scripting


**What you’ll bring:**
* 3\+ years of related industry experience
* 2\+ years of experience in a similar customer facing technical role
* Familiarity/experience with F5 or similar industry solution deployment a plus
* Relevant certifications a plus


 The Job Description is intended to be a general representation of the responsibilities and requirements of the job. However, the description may not be all\-inclusive, and responsibilities and requirements are subject to change.
   

  

**Please note that F5 only contacts candidates through F5 email address (ending with @f5\.com) or auto email notification from Workday (ending with f5\.com or** 
**@myworkday.com)** 
**.**
**Equal Employment Opportunity**
 It is the policy of F5 to provide equal employment opportunities to all employees and employment applicants without regard to unlawful considerations of race, religion, color, national origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, sensory, physical, or mental disability, marital status, veteran or military status, genetic information, or any other classification protected by applicable local, state, or federal laws. This policy applies to all aspects of employment, including, but not limited to, hiring, job assignment, compensation, promotion, benefits, training, discipline, and termination. F5 offers a variety of reasonable accommodations for candidates. Requesting an accommodation is completely voluntary. F5 will assess the need for accommodations in the application process separately from those that may be needed to perform the job. Request by contacting accommodations@f5\.com.

cd9dd829.title: Solutions Engineer , Chennai
cd9dd829.description:
TrendAI™, the global AI security leader and enterprise business unit of Trend Micro, empowers organizations with full AI visibility and consolidated security that inspires confidence, drives innovation, and eliminates risk.
   

  

 At TrendAI™, we’re always seeking exceptional talent; people who want to collaborate with the best and push boundaries together. Here, your work goes beyond building a career. You will help protect what matters and play a vital role in shaping a safer, more trustworthy AI\-powered future.
   

  

 AI Fearlessly.
   

  

**Solutions Engineer, Chennai**
**About Trendai™**
 TrendAI™, the global AI security leader and enterprise business unit of Trend Micro, empowers organizations with full AI visibility and consolidated security that inspires confidence, drives innovation, and eliminates risk. Trusted by the largest enterprises and governments across 185 countries, TrendAI™ secures the entire organization, from identities to infrastructure to data. AI Fearlessly. Learn more: trendaisecurity.com
   

  

**Position Overview**
 The Solutions Engineer (SE) with Delhi/Bangalore, will be the technical bridge between our Sales Representatives and their pre\-sales customers. As a TrendAI product expert will guide customers and prospects in the selection and deployment of Trend Micro Next\-Gen security solutions and take joint ownership with Sales team in developing customer relationships, providing leadership in security architecture and help influence customer’s technical strategy with strong problem\-solving skills. A Solutionsan an architecturesolutionsunderstandingpre\-sales supportan skillspanellisteventswebinarsworkshopsDevelopcustomerssolvesolutionsproducts'the more the the the cybersecuritycustomers Engineer is a trusted advisor to customers by developing an understanding of customer needs, risks, tolerance and technology gaps and implementation.
   

  

**PRIMIRY RESPONSIBILITY**
* Apart from being a technologist, you are expected to understand customer journey with product and it’s experience and help customer to navigate through it smoothly
* Obsessed with Customer Success during entire part of his engagement, onboarding and product experience journey
* A strong pillar to build and train sales organisation. You shall be an extremely good storyteller and help sales team to sell better and effectively
* Understand emerging ecosystem of cyber security partners like SOC services partner, CSP (cloud service partners), MSSP etc.
* Leveraging channel partners by upscaling and training for customer engagement is integral part of the role
* Conduct routine update on the new product/ technology to the internal sales staff
* Work closely with Regional / Global Product Manager and Product Marketing Manager to obtain the latest Product/ Technology know how
* Confidently deliver engaging technical demonstrations highlighting Trend Micro products advantages and benefits via solid messaging, presentation skills and public speaking
* Encourage and empower the partners and channel to propose, position and convince the customers with our products and solution
* Present to all levels of an organisation complex technical issues and solutions in a meaningful, engaging, and digestible manner
* Apply strong problem\-solving skills to design solutions that solves the customer problems
* Developing close relationships to help influence the technical strategy of the customer
* Deliver training to customer and prospects about Trend Micro solutions
* Working with company technical support personnel to ensure ongoing quality of support and customer health
* Contribute to departmental best practices, strategies, methodologies and documentation for increased efficiencies
* Continuous self\-improvement and learning to maintain current technical knowledge, participate in technical communities of interest
* Most of the sales engineers actively participate in webinar, workshop and other industry event as a speaker or panelist. Very good public speaking skill will be added advantage to the role


**Experience**
* Rich experience in delivering highest quality presales Support and Solution by bringing unique value on to the table for customers
* Strong understand and knowledge on SOC operations, security analytics capabilities, cloud architect understanding, cloud native application security, SASE, CASB, Zero trust model will be key advantage.
* Knowledge and understating on Microsoft O365, Azure, google, AWS services will be added advantage.
* Exposure to security software solutions like Firewall, Content Security, Intrusion prevention, encryption, data leakage, data protection and monitoring security will be added advantage
* Good written and spoken communication skills in English
* A strong interest in all aspects of cybersecurity and a passion for customer security
* Excellent of understanding of public cloud technologies such as AWS and Azure


 TrendAI™ strives to build an environment of equity and inclusion, which reflects diverse points of view. We welcome, value, promote, and celebrate diversity – the very experiences and attributes that make us who we are, including but not limited to race, ethnicity, nationality, gender, gender identification, sexual orientation, level of ability, age, religion, veteran status, socio\-economic status, and political philosophy.
   

  

 We embrace change, empower people, and encourage innovation. Join Trend Micro and Thrive with us.

2b786bfe.title: Solution Engineer
2b786bfe.description:
**Overview**
 Atlassian is on the lookout for a passionate Solutions Engineer to join the amazing APAC Solutions Engineering team looking after Atlassian’s largest Indian customers. We are committed to being a trusted advisor to our largest customers, helping them realize their full potential with Atlassian. If you're ready to be part of a team that is an essential part of the wider GTM strategy, apply today and connect with our friendly Recruitment team.
   

  

**Working at Atlassian**
 Atlassians can choose where they work – whether in an office, from home, or a combination of the two. That way, Atlassians have more control over supporting their family, personal goals, and other priorities. We can hire people in any country where we have a legal entity. Interviews and onboarding are conducted virtually, a part of being a distributed\-first company.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
**Our Team’s Values**
* Excellence: Strive to exceed expectations and ensure stakeholders love working with us.
* Team \> Individual: We win and lose together, supporting each other and celebrating our successes as a team.
* Intentional Positivity: We move forward with positive intent, assuming the best in those around us.
* Own Your Domain, Your Way: Drive and own your work, making it successful and uniquely yours.


**What You’ll Do**
* Be a Technical Leader: Own the technical engagement in pre\-sales opportunities, building trusted advisor relationships with customer technical teams.
* Advocate for Atlassian: Understand and position our solutions in the context of customer goals, highlighting our technical differentiators.
* Empathise with Customers: Practice empathy to understand customer pain points and technical challenges.
* Lifelong Learning: Stay updated on changes and continuously discover new ways to enhance your product, technical, and customer knowledge.
* Drive Business Outcomes: Own and drive your business and sales outcomes, helping to achieve our revenue goals.


**How We Work Together**
* We solve problems as a team and we’re always willing to help each other.
* We believe in a distributed\-first work model, allowing employees to work from various locations across the region while maintaining strong connections and collaboration.
* Empowered to "Be The Change You Seek," we encourage trying new things and learning from failures.


**Qualifications**
**Your Background**
* Experience with an Enterprise sales cycle, understanding deal dynamics and value selling.
* 7\+ Years of Experience working with Enterprise Customers in a pre\-sales, consulting or customer facing capacity.
* Ability to collaborate with prospects, channel partners, and sales teams to provide winning solutions.
* Technically minded or experienced in working with technology.
* Comfortable in a multi\-functional context, engaging with executives or technical audiences.
* Familiarity with Collaboration, Scaled Agile, ITSM, or DevOps solution spaces is a plus.
* Experience working with Indian customers.
* Knowledge of how software is defined, built, and deployed.
* Prior use of Atlassian products is a plus.
* Local language skills is a plus

0e147aea.title: Solutions Architect – Vision AI & Vision OS
0e147aea.description:
**Solutions Architect, Vision AI and Vision OS** 




*Architect Vision AI solutions from customer discovery through POC delivery* 




**Location:** 

 Chennai (On\-site, with periodic customer travel)
 




**Reports to:** 

 Engineering Leadership
 




**Experience:** 

 6 to 10 years
 




**Type:** 

 Full\-time
 




**Languages:** 

 English, Hindi and Tamil
 




**About LIFO Technologies** 




**LIFO Technologies is a Chennai\-based deep\-tech company building Vision AI and edge compute systems for industrial and enterprise applications. We design and ship hardware, software, and AI together, from chip to cloud. We are a pre\-Series A funded company with over 15 years of operations.** 




**The Role** 




**We are hiring a Solutions Architect to own the technical solution from customer discovery through proof\-of\-concept delivery for our Vision AI engagements. You will partner with sales on new opportunities, architect the right solution, and drive POCs hands\-on with a small team of a lead engineer and developers. The role suits an engineer who can hold a credible conversation with a customer and also be able to debug a model pipeline with the team.** 




**What You Will Own** 




**Solutioning and Pre\-Sales** 




**•    Run technical discovery with prospect customers across engineering, operations, IT, and field teams.** 




**•    Translate ambiguous customer requirements into clear solution architectures, effort estimates, and POC plans.** 




**•    Define camera coverage, edge hardware selection, model pipeline, integration approach, dashboard requirements, and delivery assumptions for each opportunity.** 




**•    Write or own the technical sections of proposals, RFP responses, and customer presentations.** 




**•    Partner with sales on shaping deals, handling technical objections, and running customer pitches and demos.** 




**POC Delivery and Team Leadership** 




**•    Drive POCs end\-to\-end with a small team of a lead engineer and developers, holding both technical and timeline accountability.** 




**•    Build and tune model pipelines, calibrate against field data, and validate feasibility against customer success metrics.** 




**•    Work with hardware and field teams on camera placement, data capture, lighting, and environmental constraints during the POC.** 




**•    Set the customer cadence during the POC: weekly updates, demo days, evidence packs, and exception walkthroughs.** 




**•    Hand off successful POCs to the product engineering team with clean documentation, deployment playbooks, and known constraints.** 




  





**What We Are Looking For** 




**Must Have** 




**•    6 to 10 years of hands\-on experience in computer vision, deep learning, or applied ML, with at least 2 years in customer\-facing technical roles (Solutions Architect, Pre\-Sales Engineer, Technical Lead, or equivalent).** 




**•    Strong Python and software engineering habits: version control, code review, testing, reproducibility, and maintainable production code.** 




**•    Deep experience with PyTorch or TensorFlow, OpenCV\-based video and image pipelines, and at least one production vision domain (OCR, ANPR, object detection, tracking, anomaly detection, or industrial video analytics).** 




**•    Hands\-on experience with edge or on\-prem inference stacks: NVIDIA Jetson, TensorRT, ONNX Runtime, or similar.** 




**•    Track record of taking POCs from blank\-page architecture to working customer demonstration on a defined timeline.** 




**•    Ability to scope customer requirements, make technical trade\-offs clear, and communicate credibly with both engineers and senior business stakeholders.** 




**•    Experience leading or mentoring small engineering teams through delivery sprints.** 




**•    Willingness to travel to customer sites and work in industrial environments when required.** 




**Nice to Have** 




**•    Prior work as a Solutions Architect or Pre\-Sales Engineer at a Vision AI, computer vision, edge AI, or industrial automation company.** 




**•    Experience with multi\-camera systems, evidence workflows, or video systems that stand up in audit or operational review.** 




**•    Familiarity with embedded Linux, camera integration (RTSP, ONVIF), or hardware\-aware optimisation.** 




**•    Exposure to enterprise sales cycles and B2B technical procurement realities.** 




**•    Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science, Electronics, or related field.** 




  





**Why Join LIFO** 




**•    Sit at the centre of customer\-facing technical work: every interesting new opportunity flows through you first.** 




**•    Run POCs with full technical authority, not behind a handoff layer.** 




**•    Direct exposure to enterprise and industrial customers across multiple sectors.** 




**•    A platform to evolve into solutions or pre\-sales leadership as the function scales.**

e697b47c.title: Solution Engineer Senior
e697b47c.description:
**Job Summary**
 Responsible for analyzing and gathering business and technical requirements to design and document fit\-for\-purpose solutions. Contributes to solution development, design, integration and testing, and configuration of technology solutions ensuring that delivered solutions adhere to defined architecture and security standards. Works closely with with cross\-functional teams, vendors, and business partners to ensure smooth execution and continuous improvement in solution performance and quality. Ensure seamless solution implementation and effective issue resolution.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Supports the design of fit\-for\-purpose solutions by collaborating with stakeholders to identify integration points and ensure alignment with business processes and goals. Supports technical analysis, design and customization of potential solutions including evaluating the technical fit and viability of commercial\-off\-the\-shelf products versus custom built solution. Develops and maintains technical design documents, workflows, and architecture diagrams. Assists in defining and executing the test strategy and validating solutions against business objectives. Ensures smooth interoperability by validating integrations and documenting configuration steps. Identifies and communicates potential technical dependencies and risks. Works with vendors and IT service providers to address technical issues, evaluate and improve product functionality and ensure proper configuration according to design specifications. Designs and implements data migration solutions to ensure data accuracy and reliability. Develops, designs, tests, maintains and configures solutions and systems as needed. Serves as subject matter expert and point of contact on content, processes, procedures and functionality associated with assigned applications for projects and application support (as needed). Documents recommendations to enhance business process efficiency and increase adoption of standard application features and capabilities, aligning solutions with enterprise standards. Supports continuous improvement initiatives by following established design standards and learning to identify potential enhancements in solution design or workflow efficiency. Assists technical and infrastructure groups in understanding the solution design and specifications. Works closely with IT technical service providers to ensure outsourced work packages are delivered to specifications, meeting key parameters of quality, schedule, cost, data privacy, security, performance, and scalability. Participates in formal design reviews, cybersecurity reviews and code reviews (where applicable) to ensure the detailed design specifications have been understood and coding standards and cybersecurity regulations have been adhered to by the development team(s).

Programming Principles \- Applies programming languages, frameworks, and patterns to design, write, configure, test, and maintain software/solutions/systems that are efficient, secure, scalable, and reliable. 797f38c6.title: Enterprise Architect
797f38c6.description:
**Job Description** 




  





 The Enterprise Architect will be responsible for designing, governing, and evolving large‑scale enterprise solutions leveraging Java‑based platforms, Generative AI capabilities, and Big Data ecosystems. This role requires close collaboration with business stakeholders, delivery teams, and leadership to ensure scalable, secure, and future‑ready architectures aligned with business strategy.
 



 Technical Skills \& Expertise
 



**Core Technologies** 



* Java/J2EE, Spring Boot, REST APIs, Microservices architecture
* Cloud Platforms: GCP (architecture \& deployment)
* DevOps \& Platforms: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines



**Generative AI** 



* Hands‑on experience with LLMs (OpenAI, Claude, Llama, Mistral, etc.)
* RAG architectures, Vector Databases (Pinecone, FAISS, OpenSearch, etc.)
* Frameworks \& tools: LangChain, LangGraph, Agentic AI frameworks
* Prompt engineering, orchestration, and AI governance practices



**Big Data \& Analytics** 



* Data processing frameworks: PySpark, Scala, Hive, Kafka, Databricks
* Data platforms: Data Lakes, Lakehouse architectures
* SQL \& NoSQL databases
* Data governance, quality, and metadata management



**Architecture \& Governance** 



* Enterprise integration patterns
* System scalability, performance, and resiliency design
* Security‑by‑design and compliance (enterprise standards)
* Experience working in large enterprise or regulated environments



  





  





  





  





**Roles \& Responsibilities** 




  





**Enterprise Architecture \& Strategy** 



* Define and own enterprise architecture vision, principles, standards, and reference architectures
* Translate business goals and roadmaps into technology blueprints and transition architectures
* Evaluate trade‑offs across scalability, performance, cost, security, and time‑to‑market
* Govern architecture decisions across multiple teams and programs
* Ensure alignment of solutions with long‑term enterprise and product strategy
* Mentor architects and senior engineers; guide technical decision‑making across teams



  





**Java \& Application Architecture** 



* Architect large‑scale enterprise applications using Java/J2EE, Spring Boot, and microservices
* Define REST‑based, event‑driven, and API‑first integration patterns
* Guide modernization of legacy monoliths into cloud‑native and microservices‑based systems
* Ensure best practices for JVM performance, resilience, caching, and fault tolerance
* Set standards for code quality, design patterns, and reusable enterprise components



  





**Generative AI Architecture** 



* Lead Generative AI use‑case discovery, design, and implementation across business functions
* Design enterprise‑grade RAG architectures, AI agents, assistants, and automation workflows
* Own GenAI architecture aspects such as:
* LLM selection and orchestration
* Prompt engineering strategies
* Vector database design and embedding pipelines
* AI workflow orchestration and agent frameworks
* Define governance for responsible AI, security, privacy, and cost controls
* Present and demonstrate AI solutions directly to client and executive stakeholders



  





**Big Data \& Data Platform Architecture** 



* Design and govern enterprise data platforms including data lakes, lakehouse, and analytics layers
* Architect batch, near‑real‑time, and streaming data pipelines
* Enable AI‑ready data architectures with metadata management, lineage, and quality controls
* Guide teams on scalable storage, compute, and query patterns for high‑volume data systems
* Ensure tight integration between transactional systems and analytical platforms
* Nice to have experience in Mainframe migration using PySpark.



  





**Cloud, DevOps \& Platforms** 



* Define hybrid and cloud‑native architectures on GCP
* Architect containerized platforms using Docker and Kubernetes
* Drive DevOps and CI/CD strategies for faster, reliable delivery
* Align infrastructure and platform decisions with application, AI, and data needs
* Optimize architecture for cost, resilience, and operational efficiency



  





**Governance, Security \& Compliance** 



* Ensure solutions meet enterprise security, compliance, and regulatory standards
* Embed security‑by‑design and privacy‑by‑design principles
* Review architecture for performance, scalability, availability, and disaster recovery
* Support audits, risk assessments, and architectural sign‑offs



  





**Leadership, Mentoring \& Collaboration** 



* Act as a technical authority across multiple teams and programs
* Mentor architects, tech leads, and senior engineers
* Review and guide solution designs, POCs, and complex implementations
* Collaborate closely with product managers, PMO, delivery managers, and leadership
* Mentor architects and senior engineers; guide technical decision‑making across teams
* Support pre‑sales, RFP responses, SOW design, and effort estimations when required



  





  





**Mandatory Skills** 




 GCP, Pyspark, Java, SQL, Architect

d8f39395.title: Google Lead Architect (Associate Director)
d8f39395.description:
🚀
 **Accenture is Hiring: Google Lead Architect (Associate Director)** 




 📍
 **Location:** 
 Bengaluru, Mumbai, Pune
 



 📌
 **Experience:** 
 18\+ Years (Google Cloud Platform, Solution Architecture, Cloud Transformation, Pre\-Sales)
 



 Accenture is seeking a seasoned
 **Google Cloud Lead Architect** 
 to drive cloud transformation, modernization, and AI\-led innovation for global enterprise clients. This strategic leadership role will be responsible for shaping GCP solutions, leading large\-scale pursuits, and enabling cloud\-native and AI\-powered business transformation initiatives.
 



  





 🔹 Key Responsibilities
 



 ✅ Lead end\-to\-end GCP solution architecture for large\-scale transformation and modernization programs
 



 ✅ Design enterprise\-grade Google Cloud solutions across compute, networking, storage, databases, security, analytics, and AI/ML services
 



 ✅ Architect AI/GenAI solutions leveraging Vertex AI, Gemini, RAG frameworks, and Agentic AI capabilities
 



 ✅ Drive cloud\-native modernization using GKE, Cloud Run, Cloud Functions, event\-driven architectures, and microservices
 



 ✅ Lead technical solutioning for client pursuits, RFPs, proposals, architecture reviews, and discovery workshops
 



 ✅ Design scalable data platforms utilizing BigQuery, Dataplex, Pub/Sub, Dataflow, Datastream, and Cloud Storage
 



 ✅ Collaborate with Google Cloud teams on co\-sell opportunities, partner programs, and strategic initiatives
 



 ✅ Mentor architecture teams and contribute to reusable assets, accelerators, and best practices across the Cloud \& AI practice
 



  





 🔹 What We're Looking For
 



 ✔ 18\+ years of overall IT experience with strong Solution Architecture and Cloud Transformation expertise
 



 ✔ Deep expertise in Google Cloud Platform (GCP) services, architecture, and cloud\-native technologies
 



 ✔ Strong experience with:
 


* Google Kubernetes Engine (GKE)
* Cloud Run
* BigQuery
* Pub/Sub
* Dataflow
* Terraform
* Anthos
* Cloud Security
* Application Modernization



 ✔ Proven experience in AI/ML and Generative AI on GCP, including:
 


* Vertex AI
* Gemini
* RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation)
* AI Agents / Agent Builder
* LangChain / LlamaIndex



 ✔ Strong background in pre\-sales, solutioning, proposal development, and client\-facing architecture engagements
 



 ✔ Experience leading large cloud transformation and migration programs
 



 ✔ Ability to engage with CXOs, Enterprise Architects, and senior technology stakeholders
 



  





 💡 Preferred Qualifications
 



 🔸 GCP Professional Cloud Architect Certification (Mandatory)
 



 🔸 Additional Google Cloud certifications preferred
 



 🔸 Experience working with large enterprise accounts and strategic cloud transformation programs
 



 🔸 Exposure to Google Cloud partner ecosystem, co\-sell engagements, and cloud adoption frameworks
 



 🔸 Strong communication, stakeholder management, and leadership capabilities
 



 📢
 **If you're a Google Cloud Architect passionate about driving large\-scale cloud transformation and AI innovation, we'd love to hear from you.** 




 📩 Interested candidates can share their updated resume with deepender.kaur@accenture.com or reach out directly via LinkedIn.

f87be1f3.title: Lead Software Engineer - Salesforce Service Cloud
f87be1f3.description:
*EPAM is a leading global provider of digital platform engineering and development services. We are committed to having a positive impact on our customers, our employees, and our communities. We embrace a dynamic and inclusive culture. Here you will collaborate with multi\-national teams, contribute to a myriad of innovative projects that deliver the most creative and cutting\-edge solutions, and have an opportunity to continuously learn and grow. No matter where you are located, you will join a dedicated, creative, and diverse community that will help you discover your fullest potential.*


We are looking for a **Lead Salesforce Service Cloud Developer** to join our L2 production support team. The role involves deep technical troubleshooting, root cause analysis, and implementing robust fixes for complex Service Cloud issues. The candidate should be comfortable working in CET shift hours and collaborating closely with global stakeholders, AMS teams, and business users.

**Responsibilities**

* Provide L2 support for Salesforce Service Cloud applications in production environments
* Perform advanced troubleshooting of incidents, defects, and performance issues
* Conduct root cause analysis (RCA) and implement permanent fixes
* Handle complex Apex, LWC, and integration\-related issues
* Review and optimize existing Service Cloud customizations and configurations
* Support and enhance Case Management; Queues, Omni\-Channel, and Assignment Rules; Entitlements, SLAs, and Milestones; Email\-to\-Case, CTI, and channel integrations
* Collaborate with functional consultants and business teams
* Participate in deployments, hotfixes, and release validations
* Ensure adherence to Salesforce best practices, performance, and security standards
* Create and maintain technical documentation and RCA reports

**Requirements**

* 8\-11 years of professional experience
* Strong hands\-on expertise in Salesforce Service Cloud
* Proficiency in Apex (Triggers, Classes, Async Apex) and Lightning Web Components (LWC)
* Deep understanding of Salesforce security model (OWD, sharing rules, profiles, permission sets)
* Knowledge of governor limits and performance tuning
* Background in debug logs, monitoring, and production issue analysis
* Strong SOQL/SOSL skills
* Experience working in production support, AMS, or L3 roles
* Capability to handle high\-pressure production issues and critical incidents
* Strong communication skills for coordination with European stakeholders
* Willingness to work in CET time zone shifts on a regular basis
* Proficiency in English at an Upper\-Intermediate level (B2\) or higher

**Nice to have**

* Experience with integrations (REST/SOAP APIs, middleware)
* Exposure to CTI, Omni\-Channel, or Digital Engagement
* Familiarity with Field Service Lightning
* Salesforce certifications (PD1, PD2, or Service Cloud Consultant)
* Experience working with ITIL\-based support processes

**We offer**

* Opportunity to work on technical challenges that may impact across geographies
* Vast opportunities for self\-development: online university, knowledge sharing opportunities globally, learning opportunities through external certifications
* Opportunity to share your ideas on international platforms
* Sponsored Tech Talks \& Hackathons
* Unlimited access to LinkedIn learning solutions
* Possibility to relocate to any EPAM office for short and long\-term projects
* Focused individual development
* Benefit package:
	+ Health benefits
	+ Retirement benefits
	+ Paid time off
	+ Flexible benefits
* Forums to explore beyond work passion (CSR, photography, painting, sports, etc.)
