47b4d79f.title: Senior Delivery Manager
47b4d79f.description:
**Company:** 
 People Impact
   

  

**LinkedIn:** 
 Visit LinkedIn
   

  

**Business Type:** 
 Startup
   

  

**Company Type:** 
 Product
   

  

**Business Model:** 
 B2B
   

  

**Funding Stage:** 
 Pre\-seed
   

  

**Industry:** 
 Fintech
   

  

**Salary Range:** 
 ₹ 25\-35 Lacs PA
   

  

**Job Description**
**Application Managed Services (AMS) Lead**
 The Application Managed Services (AMS) Lead is a senior leadership position responsible for driving the successful delivery, operational management, and strategic growth of Managed Services and Build\-Operate\-Transfer (BOT) engagements within the Applications portfolio. This role serves as the primary delivery owner for assigned accounts, ensuring service excellence, client satisfaction, operational efficiency, and continuous improvement across application development, support, and modernization initiatives.
   

  

 Working closely with account leaders, delivery teams, and business stakeholders, the AMS Lead will align delivery strategies with client objectives, foster high\-performing teams, and enable scalable, technology\-driven solutions. The role reports directly to the ADMS Leader.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Portfolio Leadership \& Service Delivery
* Act as the Delivery Lead for assigned AMS and BOT engagements within the Applications portfolio.
* Ensure consistent delivery of high\-quality services across application development, enhancement, maintenance, and support projects.
* Oversee delivery across a broad technology landscape, including custom applications, packaged solutions, cloud\-native platforms, mobile applications, and web\-based systems.
* Drive adoption of automation and operational best practices to improve efficiency, service quality, and reliability.
* Monitor and achieve key delivery excellence metrics, ensuring minimal disruptions and client escalations.
* Client Engagement \& Relationship Management
* Build trusted partnerships with client stakeholders and serve as a strategic advisor for application services.
* Develop and execute delivery roadmaps aligned with clients’ digital transformation, modernization, and business objectives.
* Ensure transparent communication, proactive issue management, and consistently high levels of customer satisfaction.
* Support account growth by identifying opportunities for service expansion and value creation.
* Delivery Governance \& Leadership
* Lead and mentor multidisciplinary teams delivering application services across assigned engagements.
* Establish strong governance frameworks, including delivery reviews, health assessments, risk management, and escalation management.
* Oversee the complete application lifecycle, including design, development, deployment, operations, maintenance, and support.
* Ensure adherence to delivery standards, quality processes, and contractual commitments.
* Resource \& Capability Management
* Partner with resource management teams to optimize workforce planning, utilization, and deployment across engagements.
* Manage and develop cross\-functional teams comprising developers, testers, Scrum Masters, DevOps engineers, integration specialists, and other technical professionals.
* Foster a culture of continuous learning by driving capability development, mentoring, and technology upskilling initiatives.
* Support succession planning and talent development strategies within the delivery organization.
* Governance, Performance \& Compliance
* Define and implement governance structures, review mechanisms, KPI frameworks, and performance dashboards.
* Track service performance, delivery metrics, risks, and improvement opportunities.
* Ensure compliance with organizational standards, contractual obligations, security requirements, and operational policies.
* Drive continuous improvement initiatives to enhance service quality, efficiency, and customer outcomes.
* Cross\-Functional Collaboration
* Work closely with Transition Managers, Transformation Teams, Change Management functions, and other stakeholders to ensure seamless service onboarding and operational stability.
* Collaborate with Business Analysts, Functional Consultants, DevOps teams, and Integration Engineers to strengthen delivery practices and drive innovation.
* Support organizational initiatives related to service transformation, automation, and operational excellence.


**Experience \& Qualifications**
**Professional Experience**
* 10\+ years of experience in IT application delivery, support, and managed services.
* Minimum 5 years of leadership experience managing large\-scale application portfolios and delivery teams.
* Demonstrated success in delivering and managing complex AMS, BOT, modernization, integration, and transformation engagements.
* Experience managing distributed teams across global delivery models, including onshore, offshore, and hybrid environments.


**Educational Qualifications**
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, Engineering, or a related discipline (required).
* MBA, M.Tech, or equivalent postgraduate qualification (preferred).
* Industry certifications such as PMP, ITIL, Agile/SAFe, Scrum, AWS, Azure, or GCP certifications are advantageous.


**Required Skills \& Competencies**
 Application \& Technology Expertise
   

  

* Strong understanding of application development, maintenance, support, and DevOps practices across the software development lifecycle.
* Experience with custom application technologies such as .NET, Java, and Python.
* Familiarity with enterprise platforms including SAP, Oracle, Microsoft technologies, SaaS solutions, and cloud\-native architectures.
* Knowledge of cloud platforms such as AWS, Microsoft Azure, and Google Cloud Platform (GCP).


 Strategic Delivery Leadership
   

  

* Proven ability to lead large\-scale application delivery and managed services engagements.
* Experience driving digital transformation, application modernization, integration, and operational excellence initiatives.
* Strong decision\-making, problem\-solving, and stakeholder management capabilities.


 Client \& Account Management
   

  

* Ability to engage and influence senior business and technology stakeholders, including executive leadership.
* Strong relationship management skills with experience managing complex client environments and evolving business priorities.
* Commercial awareness with the ability to identify growth and optimization opportunities.


 People Leadership
   

  

* Demonstrated success in leading, coaching, and developing high\-performing teams.
* Expertise in workforce planning, talent development, employee engagement, and performance management.
* Ability to foster collaboration across geographically dispersed teams.


 Governance, Quality \& Operations
   

  

* Strong knowledge of delivery governance, SLA management, KPI monitoring, and service improvement frameworks.
* Hands\-on experience with Agile, DevOps, ITIL, and application operations methodologies.
* Focus on quality, compliance, risk management, and operational excellence.


 Tools \& Platforms
   

  

* Experience with delivery and operations tools including JIRA, Azure DevOps, Git, Jenkins, ServiceNow, and related platforms.
* Familiarity with monitoring, logging, automation, testing, and performance management tools.
* Understanding of modern automation practices and AI\-enabled delivery optimization approaches.


**Success in this role will be measured through delivery excellence, client satisfaction, operational efficiency, team development, service stability, and contribution to account growth and transformation initiatives.**

de3302b0.title: Delivery Manager - Engineering
de3302b0.description:
**Responsibilities**
**What You'll do**
 In the role of Delivery Manager \- Engineering at Principal Financial Group, you will be working hand\-in\-hand with our product development team, you will interpret user needs and transform them into clear technical specifications. Making sure our software products remain scalable, stable, and efficient will be critical for your success. Coordinate, direct, and finalize projects/initiatives according to business objectives. Lead one or more engineering teams to achieve remarkable value for the business.
   

  

**You'll Have Opportunity To**
 Lead a high\-performing engineering team of 8–14 members, driving technical excellence, innovation, and delivery across RIS Modernization initiatives. This role is responsible for technical strategy, solution development, and operational execution, ensuring alignment with business objectives and architectural standards
   

  

 Technical Solution \& Design
   

  

* Practice and implement design thinking approach.
* Leverage enterprise level methodologies, tools, processes, technologies, design patterns in implementations.
* Collaborate with Architects and business for aligning designs \& builds with Business Unit specific architecture roadmap and guidelines
* Take charge of technical roadmap for multiple systems, ensuring alignment with business goals and architectural standards.
* Guide the team in crafting scalable, reliable, and secure distributed systems using cloud\-native technologies (AWS, microservices, observability, security\-by\-design).
* Evaluate and introduce new technologies, frameworks, and tools to improve engineering outcomes.


 Engineering Leadership \& Culture
   

  

* Foster a culture of technical excellence, innovation, and continuous improvement.
* Champion engineering guidelines \& best practices, including code quality, automated testing, CI/CD, and DevOps principles.
* Drive adoption of modern software engineering methodologies (Agile, Lean, DevOps) to improve team productivity and delivery velocity
* Build Engineering mindset within teams to challenge the status quo.


 Engineering Delivery
   

  

* Translate complex business requirements into actionable engineering deliverables, balancing speed and quality.
* Coordinate end\-to\-end delivery, from discovery and solutioning to deployment and support, across multiple projects.
* Implement data driven metrics approaches to monitor delivery progress, code quality, and system reliability
* Work alongside with architects, product managers, and business stakeholders to define and deliver technical solutions.
* Represent engineering in multi\-functional forums, advocating for technical priorities and resource needs.
* Collaborate with internal and external partners to successfully implement end to end solutions.


 Talent Development \& Technical Mentorship
   

  

* Lead a team(s) of total 8 to 14 engineers.
* Drive development programs on Upskilling \& Reskilling people in areas of Architecting \& Solutioning
* Focus on self\-learning and outcome\-based goals in Technology
* Mentor engineers in advanced system design and software craftsmanship.
* Develop and complete upskilling programs on emerging technologies, architectural thinking, and leadership growth.
* Empower senior engineers to take ownership of technical initiatives and drive innovation.


**Qualifications**
**Who You are:**
 Education: Graduate/Bachelors Engineering degree
   

  

**Must Have \- AWS**
* 10 to 13 years of Technology Experience \& 5\-6 years of strong development background using Distributed and Cloud technologies.
* Application Design Skills \& applied understanding of design patterns
* Exposure to microservices and strong Java \& AWS skills
* Good understanding of modern web technologies
* Active in modern engineering needs \- cloud\-native, microservices, observability, security\-by\-design
* Experience in system designing \& development including considerations for non\-functional systems qualities.
* Experience as an IT professional.
* Ability to influence decision\-making.
* Advanced planning, organizational, decision\-making and communication skills required.
* Strong leadership and presentation skills required. Must be able to maintain a high degree of accuracy and confidentiality.
* Strong analytical \& problem\-solving skills
* Strong interpersonal and excellent interaction skills.


**Additional Information**
 As a leader at Principal, you’re responsible for activating our strategy, meeting evolving customer needs, and crafting an inclusive culture. Our leadership expectations serve as a guide to the standards encouraged from all our leaders. Our leaders need to be a positive brand ambassador of our core values and purpose. They need to understand our code of conduct and know the responsibility to comply. They stay respectful of diversity and differences and work towards building inclusive teams and partnerships.

e7020c6c.title: Metricstream Delivery Lead
e7020c6c.description:
**ERM Industrial Assets Department**
 We are seeking an experienced and results\-driven MetricStream Delivery Lead to oversee the successful delivery of MetricStream solutions at Glencore. The ideal candidate will have a strong background in project management, excellent leadership skills, and a deep understanding of Governance, Risk, and Compliance (GRC) processes. You will be responsible for delivering to project timelines and manage technical and functional resources both internally as well as with Glencore’s third\-party vendors. You will work closely with cross\-functional teams across multiple locations globally.
   

  

**The main tasks and responsibilities include:**
* Lead the delivery of MetricStream implementation at Glencore, ensuring alignment with business objectives and timelines.
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams, including IT, business stakeholders, and external vendors, to define project scope, goals, and deliverables.
* Develop and maintain detailed project plans, including resource allocation and timelines.
* Monitor project progress to plan, identify risks, and implement mitigation strategies to ensure timely delivery.
* Facilitate regular project meetings to communicate status, address challenges and escalations as necessary.
* Ensure adherence to best practices and standards in project management and GRC implementations.
* Provide mentorship and guidance to team members, fostering a collaborative and high\-performance environment.


**Technical Experience:**
* Degree (e.g., BA, BSc) or professional certifications in computer science, Information technology, or a related field.
* 10\+ years’ experience delivering and managing MetricStream implementations in global organizations.
* Proven experience as a delivery lead, preferably with MetricStream or similar GRC platforms.
* Strong understanding of project management methodologies (Agile, Waterfall, etc.) and tools (e.g., JIRA, MS Project).
* Excellent leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
* Ability to manage multiple workstreams simultaneously and work effectively under pressure.
* Strong analytical and problem\-solving skills with a focus on delivering results.
* Excellent communication skills, both verbal and written \& ability to collaborate across departments and cultures
* Knowledge of MetricStream features and technology (BAPI journeys, PL\-SQL, JAVA and MetricStream reporting tools, Power BI etc.)
* Knowledge of data governance and the integration of Risk, Audit, and HSEC processes.


**Key strengths include:**
* A solutions\-focused individual who can work with teams through complex challenges while maintaining clarity on priorities and outcomes.
* Project Management Professional (PMP) or similar certification is a plus.
* Familiarity with compliance, risk management, and audit processes.
* Awareness of natural resources sector compliance challenges and emerging GRC \& ERM trends, is a plus.


**Benefits**
* We are committed to providing benefits, which promote mental, physical, and financial well\-being. From healthy meal options in our restaurants and bistros to free use of the in\-house gym including sport classes with professional trainers.
* We reimburse public transport for commuting to work; alternatively, we offer free parking space.
* We have a competitive parental leave policy. Our childcare benefits also include emergency childcare services and financial assistance towards daycare costs.


**Who We Are**
 Glencore is one of the world’s largest global diversified natural resource companies and a major producer and marketer of more than 60 commodities that advance everyday life. Through a network of assets, customers and suppliers that spans the globe, we produce, process, recycle, source, market and distribute the commodities that support decarbonisation while meeting the energy needs of today.
   

  

 With over 150,000 employees and contractors and a strong footprint in over 35 countries in both established and emerging regions for natural resources, our marketing and industrial activities are supported by a global network of more than 50 offices.
   

  

 Glencore’s customers are industrial consumers, such as those in the automotive, steel, power generation, battery manufacturing and oil sectors. We also provide financing, logistics and other services to producers and consumers of commodities.
   

  

 Glencore is proud to be a member of the Voluntary Principles on Security and Human Rights and the International Council on Mining and Metals. We are an active participant in the Extractive Industries Transparency Initiative.
   

  

 We will support the global effort to achieve the goals of the Paris Agreement through our efforts to decarbonise our own operational footprint. We believe that we should take a holistic approach and have considered our commitment through the lens of our global industrial emissions. Against a restated 2019 baseline, we are targeting to reduce our Scope 1, 2 and 3 industrial emissions by 15% by the end of 2026, 25% by the end of 2030, 50% by the end of 2035 and we have an ambition to achieve net zero industrial emissions by the end of 2050, subject to a supportive policy environment. For more information see our 2024\-2026 Climate Action Transition Plan and the About our emissions calculation and reporting section in our 2023 Annual Report, available on our website at glencore.com/publications.
   

  

 Note\*: All applications will be subject to potential background checks. You will be informed if this will be the case. Further information about the processing of your personal data will be made available during the application process. We'll seek your explicit consent prior to processing the data.

b2f4f017.title: Delivery Manager
b2f4f017.description:
**Job Title: Delivery Manager**
* I identify and oversee delivery of value stream outcomes aligned with Business Outcome Leads, especially where delivery is complex or affects multiple products or value streams. I ensure outcomes are measurable, documented, tracked and realised, so benefits and operating model impacts are evidenced and dependencies surface early in line with the change framework.


**In This Role, You Will**
* Agree business\-approved outcome and success measures
* Define scope, assumptions, dependencies and success criteria
* Work with relevant outcome owners to co\-create an outcome\-specific roadmap.
* Track benefits and measures with owners, explain variances
* Manage dependencies, risks and issues; remove blockers
* Prepare governance materials; track decisions and actions
* Align product roadmaps to strategic cross\-product outcomes; flag orphan work
* Coordinate integration points and enablement work
* Engage architects early; record constraints and decisions
* Facilitate process mapping and improvement workshops
* Capture role, control and handoff impacts in delivery plans
* Provide planning inputs: objectives, milestones and risks
* Run cross\-team rhythms: dependency reviews and check\-ins as required to add value and maintain control.
* Maintain audit\-ready delivery records and evidence


**To Be Successful You Will**
* Aligning multiple products to one outcome and measures
* Establishing credible baselines and benefit attribution
* Slicing target architecture into deliverable increments
* Securing timely decisions on trade\-offs
* Avoiding outcomes framed as outputs, not impacts
* Keeping measures consistent and not manual
* Preventing roadmap churn without outcome traceability
* Ensuring process work drives improvement, not documents
* Engaging architecture early to avoid rework and delay
* Escalating blockers with options, not just status
* Business owners and governance stakeholders
* Product owners and product leadership
* Technology and engineering leads
* Solution and domain architects
* Outcome analysts and process specialists
* Risk, controls and security partners
* Operations and service management teams


**Hsbc.Com/Careers**
**You’ll achieve more at HSBC**
 HSBC is an equal opportunity employer committed to building a culture where all employees are valued, respected and opinions count. We take pride in providing a workplace that fosters continuous professional development, flexible working and, opportunities to grow within an inclusive and diverse environment. We encourage applications from all suitably qualified persons irrespective of, but not limited to, their gender or genetic information, sexual orientation, ethnicity, religion, social status, medical care leave requirements, political affiliation, people with disabilities, color, national origin, veteran status, etc., We consider all applications based on merit and suitability to the role.”
   

  

 Personal data held by the Bank relating to employment applications will be used in accordance with our Privacy Statement, which is available on our website.
   

  

* Issued By HSBC Electronic Data Processing (India) Private LTD\*\*\*

0b5bc57e.title: Sr Delivery Manager
0b5bc57e.description:
Do you want to help solve the world's most pressing challenges? Feeding the world's growing population and slowing climate change are two of the world's greatest challenges. AGCO is a part of the solution! Join us to make your contribution.
   

  

 AGCO is seeking a highly skilled Delivery Manager to lead the execution of data‑driven initiatives within the AI \& DataOps Department. This role is pivotal in driving the creation of scalable data products, ensuring seamless delivery of complex data platform projects, and enabling the organization’s vision of becoming a truly data‑driven enterprise.
   

  

**Your Impact**
* FinOps Management: Drive financial accountability by monitoring cloud spend, optimizing resource utilization, and embedding cost visibility into dashboards and reporting.
* Quality Assurance: Ensure the accuracy, consistency, and reliability of data across ingestion, transformation, and consumption layers.
* AI \& DataOps Enablement: Partner with technical teams to embed automation, CI/CD pipelines, and AI‑driven efficiencies into delivery processes.
* Data Product Delivery: Lead the design, development, and delivery of reusable, enterprise‑grade data products that serve diverse business needs.
* Project Management: Define project plans, manage timelines, and ensure successful execution of data platform migrations, refactoring, and modernization initiatives.


**Your Experience And Qualifications**
* Proven experience in data delivery, AI and DataOPs and cloud based data platforms with minimum 5 years of experience in data management and project delivery
* Strong understanding of DataOps principles, AI adoption strategies, and modern data architecture.
* Hands‑on expertise with cloud ecosystems (AWS, GCP, Databricks, or equivalent).
* Proficiency in data management tools and platforms (e.g., SQL, Python, ETL processes), and familiarity with AI and machine learning concepts.
* Experience in implementing FinOps frameworks and optimizing cloud costs.


**Your Benefits**
* GLOBAL DIVERSITY – Diversity means many things to us, different brands, cultures, nationalities, genders, generations – even variety in our roles. You make us unique!
* ENTERPRISING SPIRIT\- Every role adds value. We're committed to helping you develop and grow to realize your potential.
* POSITIVE IMPACT – Make it personal and help us feed the world.
* INNOVATIVE TECHNOLOGIES \- You can combine your love for technology with manufacturing excellence – and work alongside teams of people worldwide who share your enthusiasm.
* MAKE THE MOST OF YOU – Benefits include health care and wellness plans and flexible and virtual work options.


**Your Workplace**
 We value inclusion and recognize the innovation a diverse workforce delivers to our farmers. Through our recruitment efforts, we are committed to building a team that includes a variety of experiences, backgrounds, cultures and perspectives.
   

  

 Join us as we bring agriculture into the future and apply now!
   

  

 Please note that this job posting is not designed to cover or contain a comprehensive listing of all required activities, duties, responsibilities, or benefits and may change at any time with or without notice.
   

  

**AGCO is proud to be an Equal Opportunity Employer.**

79491396.title: Agile Delivery Lead
79491396.description:
The Company
   

  

 Veovo is a market leader in Airport Smart Technology. With a global footprint of customers and capabilities that cover Airport Operations, Revenue management and Passenger Flow. Some of the world’s largest airports rely on Veovo.  Focused on driving airport performance, our solutions enable airports to handle more aircraft and more passengers, with less delays and less queues. Our platforms are built on a modern tech stack, often delivered from the cloud as SaaS and leveraging intelligence to enable our customer to “go brilliantly”.
   

  

 Our clients span continents, but all share one thing in common\~ they’re big names in airport excellence, with even bigger digital goals. With offices in the UK, Poland, Denmark, New Zealand, India and the US, Veovo offers a world of opportunity
   

  

 At Veovo we strive to deliver predictable collaborative solutions that are the platform of great airports.
   

  

 The Opportunity
   

  

 The Agile Delivery Lead ensures operational excellence across our implementation teams by driving sprint execution, Jira administration, and resource management. Reporting directly to the Solution Delivery Manager, this role bridges the gap between project management and technical execution for our distributed team spanning Aalborg (Denmark) and Pune (India). They complement our Project Managers by taking absolute ownership of sprint elements, managing smaller\-scale projects, and balancing ongoing support tickets with core deliverables. By anchoring daily operations, managing utilization KPIs, and closely guiding the implementation team, they ensure the team operates efficiently while setting a strong foundation for long\-term operational leadership and team mentorship.
   

  

 The Specifics
   

  

* Synchronize daily priorities, handoffs, and communication between the Aalborg and Pune offices to ensure a seamless, unified, delivery pipeline.
* Take absolute ownership of all Agile processes, expertly facilitating sprint planning, daily stand\-ups, and retrospectives to keep the team aligned, unblocked, productive and continuously improving
* Collaborate with Project Managers to align on sprint goals, autonomously coordinate smaller\-scale projects, and balance complex milestones with the triage of ongoing support tickets.
* Act as the first point of escalation for pune team delivery, people management, performance issues, resolving independently and escalating with context when required.
* Act as the teams Jira tool owner including space configuration, designing workflows, configuring boards, dashboards, shared filters, automations and plans to ensure seamless tracking across all work streams. This role will also provide oversight of Jira data quality and drive its improvement.
* Own decision making related to sprint commitments, capacity allocation, and work scheduling within agreed delivery framework.
* Track and manage team KPIs (focusing on resource utilization, capacity, and sprint velocity) and translate this data into concrete process improvements that refine how the team operates. Additionally, provide analysis and stakeholder views of this data to aid wider decision making within the team and business.
* Serve as the daily operational anchor, fostering a highly accountable environment by driving best\-practice adoption and guiding local team dynamics.
* Hold regular 1\-on\-1 touchpoints with individual team members to ensure process alignment, remove personal blockers, and support ongoing skills development.
* Provide day\-to\-day leadership and direction to the team, ensuring priorities are understood, decisions are made promptly, and delivery risks are actively managed.
* Champion the onboarding of new team members into our delivery framework, ensuring they are quickly integrated into Jira workflows, KPIs, and local team norms.
* Actively drive team engagement, morale, and psychological safety.


 What we are looking for
   

  

* 8 – 10 years of experience in Agile delivery, sprint coordination, technical project management, or 3 – 5 years in team management, specifically working with distributed or international teams.
* Proven expertise as a Jira administrator or power user, with a detailed understanding of how to select, design, maintain and implement tool configuration. Includes projects/spaces, workflows boards, filters, dashboards, automations, plans and associated features for clean, well\-structured, data. Exposure to a range of add\-ons is also an advantage.
* Strong facilitation skills with a track record of owning and running effective sprint ceremonies (planning, dailies, retrospectives) that drive actual results.
* Strong analytical skills with the ability to manage team KPIs, specifically resource utilization and capacity planning, and generate actionable delivery reports for leadership.
* Demonstrated ability to plan \& coordinate smaller projects independently while working closely with PMs to balance strategic project work with unpredictable support ticket volumes.
* Exceptional communication and peer\-mentoring skills, with a natural ability to anchor daily operations, run meaningful 1\-on\-1s, guide implementation engineers, and build a strong, collaborative, culture.


 What we offer in return
   

  

* Working with innovative technologies in a small and ambitious team in a flat company structure
* Rapid growth opportunities and structured professional training
* Flexible working hours and remote work possible
* Exciting and innovative projects in the aviation industry

aa8ce640.title: Technical Delivery Manager – P&C Insurance
aa8ce640.description:
**Job Title: Technical Delivery Manager – P\&C Insurance** 




  





**Location: Chennai and Hyderabad** 




  





**Role Summary** 




 Lead end\-to\-end technology delivery across the Property \& Casualty (P\&C) Insurance portfolio, with primary focus on Guidewire\-based platforms (Policy, Claims). Drive business outcomes through strong delivery governance, deep insurance domain expertise, and modern engineering practices. Own P\&L performance, ensure customer\-centric execution, and embed an AI\-first, automation\-driven mindset across delivery and operations.
 



  





 Key Responsibilities
 



 ·Own delivery, execution governance, and P\&L accountability for P\&C Insurance programs.
 



 ·Lead large\-scale Guidewire implementation, enhancement, and modernization initiatives.
 



 ·Partner with business stakeholders to translate insurance product requirements into scalable technology solutions.
 



 ·Provide technical leadership across Guidewire (PolicyCenter, ClaimCenter), Java, Spring Boot, APIs, ReactJS, and cloud platforms (AWS/Azure).
 



 ·Drive AI\-led transformation across underwriting, claims automation, fraud detection, and customer servicing.
 



 ·Ensure end\-to\-end delivery excellence across Agile teams, vendors, and offshore/onshore models.
 



 ·Oversee solution design, architecture alignment, risk management, and production stability.
 



 ·Champion engineering best practices including DevSecOps, automation, and cloud\-native adoption.
 



  





 Required Experience \& Skills
 



 ·15\+ years of technology delivery experience, including leadership in P\&C Insurance domain.
 



 ·Strong hands\-on or program\-level expertise in Guidewire suite (PolicyCenter, ClaimCenter).
 



 ·Proven experience delivering large\-scale insurance transformation programs.
 



 ·Strong technical background in Java, Spring Boot, APIs, ReactJS, cloud (AWS/Azure), microservices architecture.
 



 ·Experience managing P\&L, client relationships, and executive stakeholder engagement.
 



 ·Demonstrated ability to apply AI/ML, automation, and data\-driven capabilities in insurance workflows.
 



  





 Core Competencies
 


* P\&C Insurance Domain Expertise
* Guidewire Platform Leadership
* P\&L \& Delivery Ownership
* Solution \& Architecture Thinking
* AI\-First \& Automation Mindset
* Customer \& Stakeholder Management
* Agile \& Program Delivery Excellence
* Cloud \& Modern Engineering Practices

04c3521c.title: Technical Program Manager III
04c3521c.description:
**JOB DESCRIPTION**  

  

  

Join our dynamic team to innovate and drive technology advancements, contributing to significant business growth and client success.


As a Technical Project Manager III in Commercial \& Investment Bank Payments Technology team, you will help lead complex technology projects and programs that drive business goals and create value for clients, employees, and stakeholders. Applying a broad knowledge of technical principles, practices, and theories is essential to developing innovative solutions, along with leveraging analytical reasoning and adaptability skills to navigate through ambiguity and change. Your strong communication abilities will enable you to effectively collaborate with cross\-functional teams and manage stakeholder relationships, ensuring alignment on project objectives and governance. By optimizing resources and managing risks, you will contribute to the successful delivery of high\-impact projects that shape the future of the firm.

**Job responsibilities**

* Develop and execute comprehensive project plans, incorporating technical requirements, resource allocation, and timelines to ensure timely and successful delivery of technology projects
* Identify and mitigate project risks, proactively addressing potential roadblocks and implementing risk management strategies to minimize impact on project outcomes
* Collaborate with cross\-functional teams, including software development, quality assurance, and business stakeholders, to define project scope, objectives, and deliverables, ensuring alignment with business goals
* Utilize technical fluency to evaluate and recommend appropriate technologies, platforms, and vendor products for project implementation
* Monitor project progress, adjusting plans and schedules as needed, and providing regular status updates to stakeholders, ensuring transparency and effective communication throughout the project or program lifecycle
* Uses enterprise\-authorized AI capabilities within the work environment to accelerate project planning and risk synthesis (e.g., drafting plans, RAID, and status narratives), validating outputs and handling data according to sensitivity requirements
* Promotes reuse\-first, AI\-assisted practices for project governance artifacts and reporting, ensuring human review and alignment to delivery standards




**Required qualifications, capabilities, and skills**

* 3\+ years of experience or equivalent expertise in technical program management, leading complex technology projects and programs in a fast\-paced environment
* Demonstrated proficiency in applying analytical reasoning and problem\-solving techniques to break down business, technical, or operational objectives into manageable tasks and activities
* Proven experience leading through the project lifecycle management, including influencing decision makers and adapting to changes as business needs evolve
* Prior experience as a business analyst or project management role. Excellent analytical, problem solving and time management skills
* Ability to organize and prioritize work against competing demands
* Knowledge and experience using various desktop and project management tools such as Microsoft Project, Excel, Confluence, JIRA
* Strong technical fluency, with familiarity in current and relevant platforms, software tools, and technologies
* Proficient in stakeholder management, with a track record of establishing productive working relationships and driving mutually beneficial outcomes
* Demonstrated experience using enterprise\-authorized AI capabilities within the work environment to support technical program management workflows with strong validation habits and awareness of data sensitivity
* Ability to review and validate AI\-assisted plans, risks, and recommendations before use, escalating when uncertain and following data handling expectations




**Preferred qualifications, capabilities, and skills**

* Project Management Professional (PMP) certification is preferable
* Preferably experience working within an Agile development lifecycle

  



  

**ABOUT US**

0c5d29c1.title: Sr. Program Manager, RBS Tech
0c5d29c1.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Do you want to work on empowering brands to build awesome products that delight your customers? Sounds great. Tell me more.  

  

Launching new products in market is a risky proposition with probable failure rates as high as 80%. The R\&D investment required to launch a new product has increased 4x the cost of five years ago. Despite the high risk, brands are stuck with outdated and expensive insights that limits their ability to launch products quickly and efficiently. Also, there are various defects reported by the customers in their feedback and brands are not sure which is the more critical and priority to be addressed first to boost their product rating. Amazon’s Product Insights platform is attempting to solve these intricate problems and help brands improve their revenue and product rating.  

  

RBSTech team is looking for a Senior Program Manager to define program strategies and deliver impactful and actionable insights to our brands. You will drive simple and elegant seller and brands facing features with complex data and ML based systems behind them. You will manage implementation of multiple projects ensuring product strategy goals and requirements are delivered with quality.  

  

As Sr PM, you will interact with product managers, software development managers, developers, and senior leaders across teams in the RBS organization to deliver complex projects and programs. You will define roadmap deliverables, develop program execution plans, track progress, anticipate risks, provide escalation management, make sound trade off decisions, and balance business needs versus technical constraints.  

  

The successful candidate has technical skills to devise solutions, design, build, and deliver it. You are expected to be detail oriented, with technical background and excellent problem solving skills. You develop a deep understanding of product design and implementation details to effectively represent engineering teams to senior leadership and customers. Your expertise in operational excellence enables teams to deliver robust solutions in highly reliable, low latency systems. You possess verbal and written communication skills, are self\-driven and deliver high quality results in a fast paced environment. You really enjoy working closely with talented teams. You obsess over customers and have a passion for improving customer experience on Amazon portal WW.  

  

RBSTech has a top tier culture, with brilliant team members who take great pride in technical and business contributions of their work. As part of RBSTech you will have significant impacts on Amazon's business, sellers, and customers.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

Develop and manage a program management governance (e.g., charter, project plans, stakeholder communications, etc.) for each initiative. Manage multiple medium and large programs.  

Lead the execution of all programs/projects and enable Engineering and Product teams in the successful delivery of all programs.  

Drive technical projects from requirements through launch, including managing complex project schedules, removing roadblocks, and keeping processes working smoothly.  

Work with the Engineering and Product Leadership team to transform the operation and effectiveness of the organization. Develop a framework of processes to scale.  

Partner with Engineering, Product Management, and User Experience teams to define, prioritize, and implement features, infrastructure, processes, and workflow, and oversee the framework that drives product backlog management and product/feature releases.

**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 5\+ years of working cross functionally with tech and non\-tech teams experience
* 5\+ years of program or project management experience
* 5\+ years of delivering cross functional projects experience
* Experience defining program requirements and using data and metrics to determine improvements

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* 2\+ years of driving process improvements experience
* Master's degree, or MBA in business, operations, human resources, adult education, organizational development, instructional design or related field

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

ce116cac.title: Program Manager, Leo, Leo Global Command Center - NPaaS
ce116cac.description:
**DESCRIPTION**
---------------


Amazon Leo is Amazon’s low Earth orbit satellite network. Our mission is to deliver fast, reliable internet connectivity to customers beyond the reach of existing networks. From individual households to schools, hospitals, businesses, and government agencies, Amazon Leo will serve people and organizations operating in locations without reliable connectivity.  

We're at the frontier of space\-based internet technology, and with that comes the thrill of building something entirely new, along with the unique challenges of operating a service that spans ground infrastructure, orbital assets, and customer homes. When things go wrong at scale, a firmware update impacts thousands of devices, satellite coverage doesn't meet demand, or a field service visit makes headlines on social media, someone needs to take command. That someone is you.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

The Network Solutions Global Command Center (GCC) Leo team is looking for a Program Manager who thrives in high\-stakes, fast\-moving environments. You'll be the calm in the storm, coordinating across Field Services, Engineering, Legal, PR, and Security Operations to protect our customers and our brand in real\-time. If you're excited about satellite technology, love solving complex problems under pressure, and want to be part of a venture that's literally changing the world from space, we want to hear from you.  

  

Key job responsibilities  

  

* Manage high\-severity incidents impacting Leo satellite internet customers by running bridge calls and coordinating with Field Services, Product, Engineering, PR, Legal, and Security Operations teams to drive resolution
* Triage technical incidents (firmware failures, weather events, bandwidth degradation) and coordinate with relevant teams to identify root cause and resolution path
* Initiate and manage proactive customer communications including website/app banners, IVR updates, and mass notifications to reduce anxiety contacts during known issues
* Protect contact channels by identifying known\-issue volume and ensuring customers with genuine issues can reach Leo Customer Service without congestion
* Provide regular, timely updates to senior leadership with clear customer impact assessments, resolution timelines, and status indicators
* Monitor social media escalations involving field service agents or customer property incidents, and coordinate PR/Legal/Security response to protect Leo brand
* Coordinate with Legal and PR teams on sensitive incidents requiring external messaging — particularly those involving customer property damage, social media traction, or regulatory implications
* Dive deep into incident data, identify systemic problems, and present solutions and preventive measures to leadership
* Develop, maintain, and execute Standard Operating Procedures for incident response scenarios, including coordination playbooks for cross\-functional teams
* Track satellite coverage vs. customer demand mismatches and coordinate with Marketing to pause promotions when capacity is insufficient
**BASIC QUALIFICATIONS**
------------------------

* 2\+ years of program or project management experience
* 3\+ years of Computerized Maintenance Management System program experience
* 3\+ years of maintenance planner/scheduler in industrial maintenance, manufacturing, or distribution industries experience
* 3\+ years of advanced Microsoft Word and Excel experience
* Bachelor's degree in relevant field, or 2\+ years of Amazon RME (BB/3P) full time experience
* Work a flexible schedule/shift/work area, including weekends, nights, and/or holidays

**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS**
----------------------------

* Knowledge of Lean principles and DMAIC methodology
* Experience in MS Access and SQL
* Experience in requirement gathering and ability to write clear and detailed requirement document
* Experience using Microsoft Projects software
* Experience with material handling systems (MHS) installation, operation and maintenance
* Experience working in an analytical environment with cross\-functional teams

  

Our inclusive culture empowers Amazonians to deliver the best results for our customers. If you have a disability and need a workplace accommodation or adjustment during the application and hiring process, including support for the interview or onboarding process, please visit https://amazon.jobs/content/en/how\-we\-hire/accommodations for more information. If the country/region you’re applying in isn’t listed, please contact your Recruiting Partner.

cf25477e.title: Principal Technical Program Manager
cf25477e.description:
Gurugram, India
   

  

**About GreyOrange**
 GreyOrange is a global leader in AI\-driven robotic automation software and hardware, transforming distribution and fulfillment centers worldwide. Our solutions increase productivity, empower growth and scale, mitigate labor challenges, reduce risk and time to market, and create better experiences for customers and employees. Founded in 2012, GreyOrange is headquartered in Atlanta, Georgia, with offices and partners across the Americas, Europe, and Asia.
   

  

**Our Solutions**
 The GreyMatter is GreyOrange's AI orchestration layer that automates Warehouse Execution Systems (WES). Currently operating 50\+ fulfillment sites across the globe (with 700\+ robots at a single site), it enables customers to decrease their fulfillment Cost Per Unit by 50%, reduce worker onboarding time by 90%, and optimize peak season performance. The GreyMatter platform provides vendor\-agnostic fulfillment orchestration to continuously optimize performance in real time: the right order, with the right bot and agent, taking the right path and action.
   

  

**Role Overview**
 We are looking for a Principal TPM to drive our most complex, cross\-functional technical initiatives from core orchestration engine capabilities to large\-scale customer go\-lives spanning software, robotics integration, and operations. You'll operate at the intersection of engineering, AI/ML systems, product, robotics integration, warehouse operations and business strategy; translating ambiguous, high\-stakes problems into clear execution plans, and holding teams accountable to outcomes rather than just outputs. This is a senior IC role for someone who thrives on ambiguity, has deep technical fluency, and can influence at every level of the organization without relying on formal authority.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Own end\-to\-end program strategy and execution for GreyMatter's largest initiatives, e.g., new orchestration engine capabilities, multi\-site customer deployments, robotics fleet integrations, WES/WMS interoperability programs
* Partner with engineering, product, data science/ML, and GreyOrange's hardware/robotics teams to define scope, sequencing, and success metrics across programs that touch software, algorithms, and physical infrastructure
* Coordinate technical readiness for customer go\-lives and warehouse rollouts, working closely with Solutions Engineering, Deployment, and Customer Success to de\-risk launches on live operational floors
* Identify technical, integration, and operational risks across the orchestration stack (real\-time decisioning, robot/conveyor/WMS integrations, edge\-cloud architecture) before they become blockers
* Build and evolve program management frameworks, rituals, and tooling that scale with GreyMatter's engineering org and the pace of customer deployments
* Act as a thought partner to engineering leadership on architecture tradeoffs with cross\-system impact (e.g., latency\-sensitive orchestration decisions, fault tolerance for warehouse\-floor systems)
* Communicate program status, risk, and technical tradeoffs clearly to executive stakeholders and, at times, enterprise customers
* Mentor other TPMs/PMs, raising the bar for program rigor and technical depth org\-wide
* Drive retrospectives on major programs and incidents (including production/live\-site issues), converting learnings into concrete process and architectural improvements
* Represent the voice of execution in planning cycles, ensuring roadmaps are technically grounded, realistically sequenced, and account for hardware/deployment dependencies


**Minimum Qualifications**
* Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering or equivalent
* 10\+ years in technical program management, engineering, or a related technical discipline, with experience leading complex, multi\-team programs at scale
* Strong technical fluency across distributed systems and real\-time/near\-real\-time architectures; comfort reading system architecture and engaging deeply in design reviews
* Experience with (or strong aptitude for learning) systems that bridge software and physical operations (robotics, IoT, industrial automation, supply chain/logistics tech, or similar)
* Track record owning ambiguous, cross\-functional programs spanning multiple engineering teams and, ideally, customer\-facing deployment teams
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills; able to translate deep technical complexity for engineers, executives, and operationally\-minded customers
* Experience influencing senior stakeholders without direct authority
* Comfort with incomplete information, shifting priorities, and the operational stakes of live production systems


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Technical knowledge and/or prior experience in warehouse/supply chain tech, robotics, WMS/WES systems, or AI/ML\-driven orchestration or planning systems
* Masters of Science in Software Engineering or equivalent

600c623b.title: Technical Program Manager, Long Haul Planner, Global Network Acquisition
600c623b.description:
**Minimum qualifications:**
* Bachelor's degree in a technical field, or equivalent practical experience.
* 5 years of experience in technical projects or program management.


**Preferred qualifications:**
* Experience with program management in the networking area with delivering infrastructure assets and vendor management.
* Experience with data visualization in business intelligence platform.
* Knowledge of fiber optic systems/submarine cable ecosystem.
* Understanding of Asian and global carrier networks.
* Ability to exercise business and technical understanding to drive the long\-term objectives of the organization.


**About the job** 
 Google's projects, like our users, span the globe and require managers to keep the big picture in focus while being able to dive into the unique engineering challenges we face daily. As a Technical Program Manager at Google, you lead complex, multi\-disciplinary engineering projects using your engineering expertise. You plan requirements with internal customers and usher projects through the entire project lifecycle. This includes managing project schedules, identifying risks and clearly communicating them to project stakeholders. You're equally at home explaining your team's analyses and recommendations to executives as you are discussing the technical trade\-offs in product development with engineers.
   

  

 Using your extensive technical and leadership expertise, you manage projects of various size and scope, identifying future opportunities, improving processes and driving the technical directions of your programs.Google Cloud accelerates every organization’s ability to digitally transform its business and industry. We deliver enterprise\-grade solutions that leverage Google’s cutting\-edge technology, and tools that help developers build more sustainably. Customers in more than 200 countries and territories turn to Google Cloud as their trusted partner to enable growth and solve their most critical business problems.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Collaborate with internal business and cross\-functional Networking Technical teams to identify and define strategic initiatives necessary to meet Google's network infrastructure needs for both expansion and cost optimization across Asia. Perform data\-motivated analysis to develop network topology plan.
* Present network plans for approval by all internal stakeholders. Plan complexity will range from short\-term metro augments to long\-term region\-wide strategies for Google network in Asia.
* Manage the approved network plan with internal contributors such as network negotiators or vendor delivery managers to ensure infrastructure is delivered on time.
* Partner with cross\-functional teams to define and improve business processes to enable automation, reduce lead time and manage changes.
* Communicate progress internally and collaborate with network deployment and other Technical teams to track timeline and dependencies of infrastructure turn up.


 Google is proud to be an equal opportunity workplace and is an affirmative action employer. We are committed to equal employment opportunity regardless of race, color, ancestry, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, age, citizenship, marital status, disability, gender identity or Veteran status. We also consider qualified applicants regardless of criminal histories, consistent with legal requirements. See also Google's EEO Policy and EEO is the Law. If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please let us know by completing our Accommodations for Applicants form .

4fa665e7.title: Technical Program Manager
4fa665e7.description:
**About ArmorCode**
**ArmorCode** 
 is on a mission to supercharge security teams with a new model to reduce risk and burn down critical security tech debt. With its AI\-powered ASPM platform, ArmorCode integrates with all your security scanners across applications, infrastructure, containers, and cloud to unify and normalize findings, correlates them with business context and threat intel through adaptive risk scoring, and orchestrates security workflows to empower developers to remediate issues without disrupting their flow. ArmorCode delivers unified visibility, AI\-enhanced prioritization, and scalable automation for customers so they can realize a complete understanding of risk, respond at scale, and collaborate more effectively.
   

  

 Enterprises of all sizes scale their security effectiveness by more than 10x and maximize their ROI on existing security investments with ArmorCode through managing Application Security Posture, Risk\-Based Vulnerability Management, Software Supply Chain Security, DevSecOps, and Risk \& Compliance.
   

  

 ArmorCoders believe in 5 core values: Hungry. Humble. Hardworking. Honest. Human. Our organization is powered by exceptional professionals who bring fresh ideas and passion to their roles, believing that nothing is beyond reach when our "5H" principles are applied. In their work and professional relationships, ArmorCoders commit to excellence and experiences that leave an impression.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking an experienced Senior Technical Program Manager to drive ArmorCode’s engineering execution while ensuring customer commitments are tracked, coordinated, and delivered. This is primarily an engineering program management role, with a strong customer\-facing dimension spanning escalation management, delivery coordination, and reporting to leadership.
   

  

 You will act as a bridge between engineering, product, sales engineering and customer success teams, ensuring seamless alignment between priorities and delivery and keeping customer commitments visible and on track.
   

  

 The ideal candidate brings 12\+ years of experience with proven success in technical program management and customer\-facing delivery at scale, with PMP, PMI\-ACP, CSM, or equivalent certification.
   

  

**What You'll Own**
**Release Management \& Execution**
* Own the release calendar and keep stakeholders informed on timelines, status, and changes.
* Utilize data analytics and AI to break down ticket distribution into detailed categories, identify trends such as recurring high\-priority issues or clusters of technical debt, and refine sprint planning accordingly.
* Forecast workload and adjust resource allocation based on insights.


**Dependency Tracking \& Risk Management**
* Proactively identify and track dependencies, ensuring they do not become bottlenecks.
* Monitor critical tickets and customer commitment deadlines.
* Keep teams aligned on timelines and flag risks early with clear escalation paths.


**Roadmap \& Timeline Management**
* Help define clear start and end timelines for roadmap commitments.
* Work with engineering and product teams to break down critical tickets into manageable work items.
* Identify and prioritize prerequisite work (research, spikes) before execution begins.


**Capacity Planning \& Resource Forecasting**
* Develop and implement capacity planning processes to forecast team bandwidth.
* Leverage historical velocity data to identify bottlenecks.
* Collaborate with engineering and product to ensure resource allocation aligns with strategic objectives.


**Engineering OKR Alignment**
* Track and report on progress against engineering OKRs, maintaining visibility into how execution maps to business goals.
* Flag when delivery is drifting from stated objectives and surface risks to engineering leadership early.
* Drive best practices in execution tracking and reporting to improve engineering efficiency and support data\-driven decision\-making.


**Cross\-Functional Alignment**
* Bridge engineering, product, sales engineering and customer success teams to ensure customer commitments are understood, tracked, and delivered.
* Maintain clear visibility into roadmap status and escalation status for leadership through regular reporting and reviews.


**Customer Escalation Management**
* Own cross\-functional customer escalations: understand impact, coordinate resolution with engineering, and communicate progress to Customer Success and Sales Engineering until closure.
* Act as the customer advocate internally, ensuring escalations are triaged, prioritized, and resolved with urgency.
* Identify patterns in escalations and work with product and engineering to drive systemic fixes that prevent recurrence


**Private Deployments \& Delivery Management**
* Manage the delivery lifecycle for private and on\-prem customer deployments, coordinating with infrastructure, engineering, sales engineering and customer success teams.
* Ensure customers on private deployments receive timely updates, upgrades, and support with clear communication throughout.


**Who You Are**
* 12\+ years of technical program management experience, including customer\-facing delivery.
* PMP, PMI\-ACP, CSM, or equivalent program management certification (required).
* Proven track record managing both engineering execution and customer\-facing programs at scale in SaaS or security environments.
* Deep expertise in JIRA, Confluence, and engineering analytics tools.
* Strong ability to translate customer needs into engineering requirements and communicate technical constraints back to customers.
* Excellent communication skills across engineering teams, product, leadership, and customers.
* Experience mentoring junior managers and fostering a culture of continuous improvement and accountability.
* Demonstrated ability to work under pressure, manage competing priorities, and escalate risks proactively.
* Strong analytical and data\-driven mindset with ability to build and interpret dashboards.
* Exposure to GenAI LLM\-based systems (Claude, Codex, Gemini etc).


**Preferred Qualifications**
* Deep understanding of software development lifecycle, DevSecOps, and application security.
* Experience with AI\-powered platforms and engineering OKRs.
* Prior experience managing private deployments or enterprise customer implementations.
* History of introducing process innovations that measurably improved sprint planning, customer onboarding, and delivery excellence.
* Experience at a scaled SaaS company (50\+ person engineering org) operating across multiple time zones.


**Why You Will Love It**
* Career Growth Opportunities: We believe in promoting from within and provide career progression paths, enabling our employees to advance in their careers
* Work\-Life Balance: We understand the importance of a healthy work\-life balance, offering flexible hours and remote work options to promote a sustainable lifestyle
* Collaborative Environment: Our company fosters a collaborative and inclusive workplace culture, where employees can collaborate and learn from each other's experiences
* Employee Recognition: We value and recognize the contributions of our team members through awards, employee of the month programs, and other forms of acknowledgment.
* Competitive Compensation: We offer competitive salaries and performance\-based bonuses, recognizing and rewarding the hard work and dedication of our team
* Comprehensive Benefits: Our benefits package includes health insurance for employees and dependents, to support the overall well\-being of our employees. We encourage learning and skilling, and aid our employees to continuously upskill themselves.
* Diversity and Inclusion: We are committed to diversity and inclusion, striving to create an environment where all employees feel valued, respected, and empowered


 Join ArmorCode and lead the charge in reducing signal fatigue, prioritizing risk and streamlining key cybersecurity workflows. Apply today to be part of a close\-knit team, dedicated to democratizing software security and helping build the safest software possible.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity**
 ArmorCode is an Equal Opportunity Employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age, genetic information, disability, or any other legally protected category. All qualified individuals are encouraged to apply and will receive consideration for employment regardless of their background or characteristics. We are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace where everyone is treated with respect and dignity.

 There are plenty of amazing opportunities at Convera for talented, creative problem solvers who never settle for good enough and are looking to transform Business to Business payments. Apply now if you’re ready to unleash your potential.

87301c1a.title: Technical Program Manager
87301c1a.description:
**SUMMARY** 




 The Technical Program Manager owns Armor’s problem\-management program and the analytical work that drives down the volume of issues customers experience. This is a program and analysis role, not a day\-to\-day ticket\-resolution role: rather than working individual customer tickets, the Technical Program Manager digs into the data behind them to find the systemic problems that generate recurring work, and drives those to permanent resolution or a clear, repeatable framework. That work is grounded in understanding how data flows into Armor’s systems—the connectors, APIs, and ingestion pipelines behind platforms such as Microsoft Sentinel and Microsoft Defender—so root causes and data\-quality issues can be identified, not guessed. The role partners closely with Engineering, SRE, and support delivery teams and thinks in terms of measurable, repeatable outcomes rather than one\-off fixes—an approach that matters deeply for a cybersecurity company where recurring problems carry real customer risk. Based in Pune, India, the role works primarily on India business hours and carries the flexibility to overlap with US Central hours as needed to collaborate with Armor’s Dallas\-based Engineering, SRE, and delivery teams. It reports to and takes strategic direction from the Head of Global Support.
 



  





**ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES** 



* Analyze incident and ticket data to identify the systemic drivers of ticket volume, and target measurable reductions in recurring work and customer\-impacting incidents.
* Investigate how data flows into Armor’s systems—connectors, APIs, and ingestion pipelines from Microsoft Sentinel, Microsoft Defender, Qualys/VMDR, log/SIEM sources, and Azure and cloud telemetry—to surface data\-quality issues and the root causes behind recurring problems.
* Work through ambiguity: develop hypotheses about recurring and systemic problems, validate root cause with data, and ensure problems are genuinely understood before solutions are pursued.
* Consolidate recurring incidents and service requests into managed problem records and drive them to permanent resolution or a clear, repeatable framework—without taking over day\-to\-day ticket execution, which is owned by dedicated delivery teams.
* Build the queries, dashboards, and reports that surface trends and quantify customer and business impact (e.g., KQL over Sentinel/Defender, SQL, Power BI, and Jira reporting).
* Lead root cause analysis (RCA) for major and recurring problems; document root causes, workarounds, and known errors so delivery teams resolve recurrences consistently.
* Partner with Engineering, SRE, and delivery teams to land systemic fixes, and coordinate permanent fixes that require change through Armor’s change process.
* Define and report the metrics that matter—reduction in recurring customer\-impacting incidents and ticket volume as the headline, with operational signals (recurring\-problem count, MTTR, RCA compliance, and SLA adherence) as supporting measures.
* Run problem\-review cadences, maintain and drive down a prioritized problem backlog, and track held known errors so workarounds do not quietly become permanent technical debt.
* Identify automation and process\-improvement opportunities and program\-manage their delivery to reduce manual, repetitive work.
* Maintain authoritative documentation and a known\-error knowledge base in Confluence, and provide clear, executive\-level status, risks, and escalations.



  





**REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS** 



* 10\-12 years of experience in technical program management, security or IT operations, data and analytics, or service/problem management; Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Proven ability to manage cross\-functional programs and drive outcomes across multiple teams without direct authority.
* Hands\-on data analysis: able to query operational and security data using KQL (Microsoft Sentinel/Defender) and SQL, and to build reports and dashboards (e.g., Power BI, Jira) that surface trends and quantify impact.
* Working understanding of data integrations—connectors, APIs, and ingestion pipelines—and how security telemetry reaches a SIEM or analytics platform (e.g., Microsoft Sentinel, Microsoft Defender).
* Solid grounding in problem management and root cause analysis, aligned to ITIL (Problem, Incident, and Service Management).
* Familiarity (conceptual, not hands\-on delivery) with the security domains Armor operates: vulnerability management (Qualys/VMDR), endpoint and EDR (Microsoft Defender), and cloud and identity (Azure, Okta/Entra).
* Ability to read incident and ticket data and translate it into prioritized, measurable action.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management in English, including executive\-level reporting and clear RCAs and resolution frameworks.
* Proficiency with Jira and Confluence.
* Strategic, systemic thinker with a bias for repeatable, automation\-assisted solutions over one\-off fixes.
* Self\-directed, taking strategic direction and prioritization from the Head of Support.



  





**Alignment to Armor Core Values** 



* COMMITMENT TO GROWTH
* INTEGRITY ALWAYS
* EMPATHY IN ACTION
* IMMEDIATE IMPACT
* FOLLOW\-THROUGH



  





**PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS** 



* Depth in KQL/Kusto, Power BI, or Power Automate, or exposure to data engineering and pipeline troubleshooting.
* Experience building or troubleshooting API\-based integrations and data connectors.
* PMP, ITIL v4, or Microsoft security/Azure certifications.
* Experience in a cybersecurity or managed\-security services (MSSP) environment.



  





**WORK ENVIRONMENT** 




 This role is based in Armor’s Pune, India office and works primarily on India business hours. Because several partner teams are based in Dallas, the role calls for flexibility to shift part of the working day into US Central time as needed to collaborate with Engineering, SRE, and delivery teams and to run problem reviews and escalations. As a program role rather than a customer\-facing ticket role, it does not require continuous late\-night coverage; the emphasis is on dependable overlap and responsiveness. The noise level in the work environment is usually low to moderate, and the environment may be an office setting, the company’s data center, or remote. Occasional extended or off\-hours work may be required during major incidents.
 



 Equal Opportunity Employer \- It is the policy of the company to comply with all employment laws and to afford equal employment opportunity to individuals in all aspects of employment, including in selection for job opportunities, without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, age, disability, genetic information, veteran status, or any other consideration protected by federal, state or local laws.

**About the Role:**

You will play a critical role in shaping how our clients modernize their core banking operations across Retail and Corporate Banking.


This role focuses on functional knowledge areas such as **deposits, payments, customer onboarding, loan servicing, limits \& collateral management, compliance, and product lifecycle management** within a modern core banking transformation.

* Proven experience delivering business‑oriented demos and presentations.

* Excellent verbal and written communication skills.

**Privacy Statement**

**Sourcing Model**


Recruitment at FIS works primarily on a direct sourcing model; a relatively small portion of our hiring is through recruitment agencies.
